{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01GAdfSUBb3VuzTDHs9QWJsP","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { notifyApplicationDecision, notifyGroupFull } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n     5→\n     6→export async function PATCH(\n     7→  req: NextRequest,\n     8→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n     9→) {\n    10→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    11→  if (!session) {\n    12→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    13→  }\n    14→\n    15→  const { id } = await params;\n    16→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    17→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    18→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    19→  }\n    20→\n    21→  const listing = db\n    22→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    23→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    24→\n    25→  if (!listing) {\n    26→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    27→  }\n    28→\n    29→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    30→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the organizer can manage applications\" }, { status: 403 });\n    31→  }\n    32→\n    33→  const body = await req.json();\n    34→  const { applicationId, action } = body;\n    35→\n    36→  if (!applicationId || typeof applicationId !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(applicationId) || applicationId < 1 || ![\"approve\", \"reject\"].includes(action)) {\n    37→    return NextResponse.json(\n    38→      { error: \"Invalid request. Provide applicationId and action (approve/reject).\" },\n    39→      { status: 400 }\n    40→    );\n    41→  }\n    42→\n    43→  // Verify application belongs to this listing and is pending\n    44→  const application = db\n    45→    .prepare(\n    46→      \"SELECT * FROM listing_applications WHERE id = ? AND listing_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n    47→    )\n    48→    .get(applicationId, listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    49→\n    50→  if (!application) {\n    51→    return NextResponse.json(\n    52→      { error: \"Application not found or already decided\" },\n    53→      { status: 404 }\n    54→    );\n    55→  }\n    56→\n    57→  const applicantUserId = application.user_id as number;\n    58→\n    59→  if (action === \"approve\") {\n    60→    // Use transaction to ensure atomicity\n    61→    const approveTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n    62→      // Check if group is already full\n    63→      const { count } = db\n    64→        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n    65→        .get(listingId) as { count: number };\n    66→\n    67→      if (count >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n    68→        throw new Error(\"Group is already full\");\n    69→      }\n    70→\n    71→      // Update application status\n    72→      db.prepare(\n    73→        \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'approved', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n    74→      ).run(applicationId);\n    75→\n    76→      // Add to members\n    77→      db.prepare(\n    78→        \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n    79→      ).run(listingId, applicantUserId);\n    80→\n    81→      // Check if group is now full\n    82→      const newCount = count + 1;\n    83→      let rejectedApps: { id: number; user_id: number }[] = [];\n    84→      if (newCount >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n    85→        db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET is_full = 1 WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n    86→\n    87→        // Reject remaining pending applications inside the transaction\n    88→        rejectedApps = db\n    89→          .prepare(\n    90→            \"SELECT id, user_id FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n    91→          )\n    92→          .all(listingId) as { id: number; user_id: number }[];\n    93→\n    94→        for (const app of rejectedApps) {\n    95→          db.prepare(\n    96→            \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n    97→          ).run(app.id);\n    98→        }\n    99→\n   100→        return { isFull: true, rejectedApps };\n   101→      }\n   102→      return { isFull: false, rejectedApps };\n   103→    });\n   104→\n   105→    try {\n   106→      const result = approveTransaction();\n   107→\n   108→      // Send notifications outside the transaction (non-critical)\n   109→      try {\n   110→        notifyApplicationDecision(applicantUserId, listingId, \"approved\");\n   111→\n   112→        if (result.isFull) {\n   113→          notifyGroupFull(listingId);\n   114→          for (const app of result.rejectedApps) {\n   115→            notifyApplicationDecision(app.user_id, listingId, \"rejected\");\n   116→          }\n   117→        }\n   118→      } catch (notifErr) {\n   119→        console.error(\"Notification error (approval succeeded):\", notifErr);\n   120→      }\n   121→\n   122→      return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n   123→    } catch (err) {\n   124→      const message = err instanceof Error ? err.message : \"Failed to approve\";\n   125→      return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 400 });\n   126→    }\n   127→  } else {\n   128→    // Reject\n   129→    db.prepare(\n   130→      \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n   131→    ).run(applicationId);\n   132→\n   133→    notifyApplicationDecision(applicantUserId, listingId, \"rejected\");\n   134→\n   135→    return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n   136→  }\n   137→}\n   138→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01Y5rP4Mk1d9p8wjjy5RPqKm","session_id":"71b3594c-3c92-4960-b469-8f6636094264","uuid":"c6c5ccab-d36b-42bb-8e03-95fd9702bea7","timestamp":"2026-03-24T00:01:42.139Z"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01H2u9gBzqLoxi7jDaRrYPZb","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { getSession, requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n     5→import { isBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/telegram\";\n     6→import { isBotConfigured as isDiscordBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/discord\";\n     7→\n     8→export async function GET(\n     9→  _req: NextRequest,\n    10→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n    11→) {\n    12→  const { id } = await params;\n    13→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    14→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    15→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    16→  }\n    17→\n    18→  const listing = db\n    19→    .prepare(\n    20→      `SELECT\n    21→        l.*,\n    22→        u.display_name as author_name\n    23→      FROM listings l\n    24→      JOIN users u ON l.author_id = u.id\n    25→      WHERE l.id = ?`\n    26→    )\n    27→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    28→\n    29→  if (!listing) {\n    30→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    31→  }\n    32→\n    33→  const members = db\n    34→    .prepare(\n    35→      `SELECT u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, lm.joined_at\n    36→       FROM listing_members lm\n    37→       JOIN users u ON lm.user_id = u.id\n    38→       WHERE lm.listing_id = ?\n    39→       ORDER BY lm.joined_at ASC`\n    40→    )\n    41→    .all(listingId) as { id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; joined_at: string }[];\n    42→\n    43→  const session = await getSession();\n    44→  const isMember = session.userId\n    45→    ? members.some((m) => m.id === session.userId)\n    46→    : false;\n    47→  const isAuthor = session.userId\n    48→    ? listing.author_id === session.userId\n    49→    : false;\n    50→\n    51→  // PRD: full listings should be invisible to non-participants\n    52→  if (listing.is_full && !isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    53→    return NextResponse.json(\n    54→      { error: \"This listing is no longer available\" },\n    55→      { status: 404 }\n    56→    );\n    57→  }\n    58→\n    59→  // Check if the current user has an application (regardless of requires_approval,\n    60→  // since the flag may have been toggled after the application was submitted)\n    61→  let hasApplied = false;\n    62→  let applicationStatus = \"\";\n    63→  if (session.userId && !isMember) {\n    64→    const app = db\n    65→      .prepare(\n    66→        \"SELECT status FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    67→      )\n    68→      .get(listingId, session.userId) as { status: string } | undefined;\n    69→    if (app) {\n    70→      hasApplied = app.status === \"pending\";\n    71→      applicationStatus = app.status;\n    72→    }\n    73→  }\n    74→\n    75→  // Fetch pending applicants if the viewer is the author\n    76→  let pendingApplicants: { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[] = [];\n    77→  if (isAuthor && listing.requires_approval) {\n    78→    pendingApplicants = db\n    79→      .prepare(\n    80→        `SELECT la.id as application_id, u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, la.applied_at\n    81→         FROM listing_applications la\n    82→         JOIN users u ON la.user_id = u.id\n    83→         WHERE la.listing_id = ? AND la.status = 'pending'\n    84→         ORDER BY la.applied_at ASC`\n    85→      )\n    86→      .all(listingId) as { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[];\n    87→  }\n    88→\n    89→  // Strip platform links for non-members to prevent leaking invite URLs\n    90→  const safeListingData = { ...listing };\n    91→  if (!isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    92→    delete safeListingData.telegram_link;\n    93→    delete safeListingData.discord_link;\n    94→  }\n    95→\n    96→  return NextResponse.json({\n    97→    listing: {\n    98→      ...safeListingData,\n    99→      members,\n   100→      memberCount: members.length,\n   101→      isMember,\n   102→      isAuthor,\n   103→      hasApplied,\n   104→      applicationStatus,\n   105→      pendingApplicants,\n   106→      currentUserId: session.userId || null,\n   107→      telegramBotConfigured: isBotConfigured(),\n   108→      discordBotConfigured: isDiscordBotConfigured(),\n   109→    },\n   110→  });\n   111→}\n   112→\n   113→export async function PATCH(\n   114→  req: NextRequest,\n   115→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n   116→) {\n   117→  const session = await requireAuth();\n   118→  if (!session) {\n   119→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n   120→  }\n   121→\n   122→  const { id } = await params;\n   123→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n   124→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n   125→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n   126→  }\n   127→\n   128→  const listing = db\n   129→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   130→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n   131→\n   132→  if (!listing) {\n   133→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n   134→  }\n   135→\n   136→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n   137→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the author can edit this listing\" }, { status: 403 });\n   138→  }\n   139→\n   140→  // Cannot edit if a platform link has been shared (group already formed)\n   141→  if (listing.telegram_link || listing.discord_link) {\n   142→    return NextResponse.json(\n   143→      { error: \"Cannot edit a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" },\n   144→      { status: 400 }\n   145→    );\n   146→  }\n   147→\n   148→  try {\n   149→    const body = await req.json();\n   150→    const {\n   151→      language,\n   152→      readingPace,\n   153→      startDate,\n   154→      meetingFormat,\n   155→      maxGroupSize,\n   156→      requiresApproval,\n   157→      platformPreference,\n   158→    } = body;\n   159→\n   160→    // Validate fields that are provided\n   161→    if (readingPace !== undefined && (!readingPace || readingPace.length > 200)) {\n   162→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Reading pace is required (max 200 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n   163→    }\n   164→\n   165→    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n   166→      if (!/^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$/.test(startDate)) {\n   167→        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid start date format (expected YYYY-MM-DD)\" }, { status: 400 });\n   168→      }\n   169→      const today = new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n   170→      if (startDate < today) {\n   171→        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Start date cannot be in the past\" }, { status: 400 });\n   172→      }\n   173→    }\n   174→\n   175→    if (meetingFormat !== undefined && ![\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat)) {\n   176→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid meeting format\" }, { status: 400 });\n   177→    }\n   178→\n   179→    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n   180→      const size = parseInt(maxGroupSize, 10);\n   181→      if (isNaN(size) || size < 2 || size > 20) {\n   182→        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Group size must be between 2 and 20\" }, { status: 400 });\n   183→      }\n   184→\n   185→      // Cannot reduce below current member count\n   186→      const memberCount = (db\n   187→        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n   188→        .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n   189→\n   190→      if (size < memberCount) {\n   191→        return NextResponse.json(\n   192→          { error: `Cannot reduce group size below current member count (${memberCount})` },\n   193→          { status: 400 }\n   194→        );\n   195→      }\n   196→    }\n   197→\n   198→    if (language !== undefined && (!language || typeof language !== \"string\" || language.length > 100)) {\n   199→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Language is required (max 100 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n   200→    }\n   201→\n   202→    if (platformPreference !== undefined && ![\"telegram\", \"discord\"].includes(platformPreference)) {\n   203→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid platform preference\" }, { status: 400 });\n   204→    }\n   205→\n   206→    // Build dynamic UPDATE\n   207→    const updates: string[] = [];\n   208→    const values: unknown[] = [];\n   209→\n   210→    if (language !== undefined) {\n   211→      updates.push(\"language = ?\");\n   212→      values.push(language);\n   213→    }\n   214→    if (readingPace !== undefined) {\n   215→      updates.push(\"reading_pace = ?\");\n   216→      values.push(readingPace.trim());\n   217→    }\n   218→    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n   219→      updates.push(\"start_date = ?\");\n   220→      values.push(startDate);\n   221→    }\n   222→    if (meetingFormat !== undefined) {\n   223→      updates.push(\"meeting_format = ?\");\n   224→      values.push(meetingFormat);\n   225→    }\n   226→    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n   227→      const newSize = parseInt(maxGroupSize, 10);\n   228→      updates.push(\"max_group_size = ?\");\n   229→      values.push(newSize);\n   230→\n   231→      // If increasing group size on a full listing, reopen it\n   232→      const currentMemberCount = (db\n   233→        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n   234→        .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n   235→      if (newSize > currentMemberCount && listing.is_full) {\n   236→        updates.push(\"is_full = ?\");\n   237→        values.push(0);\n   238→      }\n   239→    }\n   240→    if (requiresApproval !== undefined) {\n   241→      updates.push(\"requires_approval = ?\");\n   242→      values.push(requiresApproval ? 1 : 0);\n   243→    }\n   244→    if (platformPreference !== undefined) {\n   245→      updates.push(\"platform_preference = ?\");\n   246→      values.push(platformPreference);\n   247→    }\n   248→\n   249→    if (updates.length === 0) {\n   250→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"No fields to update\" }, { status: 400 });\n   251→    }\n   252→\n   253→    values.push(listingId);\n   254→    db.prepare(`UPDATE listings SET ${updates.join(\", \")} WHERE id = ?`).run(...values);\n   255→\n   256→    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n   257→  } catch (error) {\n   258→    console.error(\"Update listing error:\", error);\n   259→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });\n   260→  }\n   261→}\n   262→\n   263→export async function DELETE(\n   264→  _req: NextRequest,\n   265→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n   266→) {\n   267→  const session = await requireAuth();\n   268→  if (!session) {\n   269→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n   270→  }\n   271→\n   272→  const { id } = await params;\n   273→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n   274→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n   275→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n   276→  }\n   277→\n   278→  const listing = db\n   279→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   280→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n   281→\n   282→  if (!listing) {\n   283→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n   284→  }\n   285→\n   286→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n   287→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the author can delete this listing\" }, { status: 403 });\n   288→  }\n   289→\n   290→  // Cannot delete if a platform link has been shared\n   291→  if (listing.telegram_link || listing.discord_link) {\n   292→    return NextResponse.json(\n   293→      { error: \"Cannot delete a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" },\n   294→      { status: 400 }\n   295→    );\n   296→  }\n   297→\n   298→  try {\n   299→    // Get members to notify (excluding the author)\n   300→    const members = db\n   301→      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id != ?\")\n   302→      .all(listingId, session.userId) as { user_id: number }[];\n   303→\n   304→    // Delete in a transaction (notifications sent after, so they aren't wiped)\n   305→    const deleteTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n   306→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   307→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   308→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM notifications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   309→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM ratings WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   310→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   311→    });\n   312→\n   313→    deleteTransaction();\n   314→\n   315→    // Send deletion notifications after transaction (listing_id is NULL since listing is gone)\n   316→    for (const member of members) {\n   317→      try {\n   318→        createNotification(\n   319→          member.user_id,\n   320→          null,\n   321→          \"listing_deleted\",\n   322→          `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" has been cancelled by the organizer.`\n   323→        );\n   324→      } catch {\n   325→        // Notification failure should not block response\n   326→      }\n   327→    }\n   328→\n   329→    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n   330→  } catch (error) {\n   331→    console.error(\"Delete listing error:\", error);\n   332→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });\n   333→  }\n   334→}\n   335→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01Y5rP4Mk1d9p8wjjy5RPqKm","session_id":"71b3594c-3c92-4960-b469-8f6636094264","uuid":"0b19b70b-df55-4310-83d7-defcdb712e58","timestamp":"2026-03-24T00:01:42.222Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01VofmsSskR6Bnb9PPFKJ9zD","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { checkRateLimit } from \"@/lib/rate-limit\";\n     5→\n     6→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n     7→  const session = await requireAuth();\n     8→  if (!session) {\n     9→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    10→  }\n    11→\n    12→  // Rate limit: 10 listings per 15 minutes per user\n    13→  const rateLimitKey = `create-listing:${session.userId}`;\n    14→  const { allowed, retryAfter } = checkRateLimit(rateLimitKey, 10);\n    15→  if (!allowed) {\n    16→    return NextResponse.json(\n    17→      { error: \"Too many listings created. Please try again later.\" },\n    18→      { status: 429, headers: { \"Retry-After\": String(retryAfter) } }\n    19→    );\n    20→  }\n    21→\n    22→  try {\n    23→    const body = await req.json();\n    24→    const {\n    25→      bookTitle,\n    26→      bookAuthor,\n    27→      bookCoverUrl,\n    28→      bookOlid,\n    29→      language,\n    30→      readingPace,\n    31→      startDate,\n    32→      meetingFormat,\n    33→      maxGroupSize,\n    34→      requiresApproval,\n    35→      platformPreference,\n    36→    } = body;\n    37→\n    38→    if (!bookTitle || !bookAuthor || !readingPace || !startDate || !meetingFormat || !maxGroupSize) {\n    39→      return NextResponse.json(\n    40→        { error: \"Missing required fields\" },\n    41→        { status: 400 }\n    42→      );\n    43→    }\n    44→\n    45→    // Input length limits to prevent abuse\n    46→    if (bookTitle.length > 300 || bookAuthor.length > 200 || readingPace.length > 200) if (![\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat)) {\n    54→      return NextResponse.json(\n    55→        { error: \"Invalid meeting format\" },\n    56→        { status: 400 }\n    57→      );\n    58→    }\n    59→\n    60→    if (!startDate || !/^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$/.test(startDate)) {\n    61→      return NextResponse.json(\n    62→        { error: \"Invalid start date format (expected YYYY-MM-DD)\" },\n    63→        { status: 400 }\n    64→      );\n    65→    }\n    66→\n    67→    const today = new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n    68→    if (startDate < today) {\n    69→      return NextResponse.json(\n    70→        { error: \"Start date cannot be in the past\" },\n    71→        { status: 400 }\n    72→      );\n    73→    }\n    74→\n    75→    const size = parseInt(maxGroupSize, 10);\n    76→    if (isNaN(size) || size < 2 || size > 20) {\n    77→      return NextResponse.json(\n    78→        { error: \"Group size must be between 2 and 20\" },\n    79→        { status: 400 }\n    80→      );\n    81→    }\n    82→\n    83→    const platform = [\"telegram\", \"discord\"].includes(platformPreference)\n    84→      ? platformPreference\n    85→      : \"telegram\";\n    86→\n    87→    // Validate book cover URL — only allow Open Library covers to prevent SSRF/tracking\n    88→    const sanitizedCoverUrl =\n    89→      bookCoverUrl && typeof bookCoverUrl === \"string\" &&\n    90→      bookCoverUrl.startsWith(\"https://covers.openlibrary.org/\")\n    91→        ? bookCoverUrl\n    92→        : \"\";\n    93→\n    94→    // Wrap listing creation + auto-join in a transaction for atomicity\n    95→    const createTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n    96→      const result = db\n    97→        .prepare(\n    98→          `INSERT INTO listings (author_id, book_title, book_author, book_cover_url, book_olid, language, reading_pace, start_date, meeting_format, max_group_size, requires_approval, platform_preference)\n    99→           VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`\n   100→        )\n   101→        .run(\n   102→          session.userId,\n   103→          bookTitle.trim(),\n   104→          bookAuthor.trim(),\n   105→          sanitizedCoverUrl,\n   106→          bookOlid || \"\",\n   107→          language || \"English\",\n   108→          readingPace.trim(),\n   109→          startDate,\n   110→          meetingFormat,\n   111→          size,\n   112→          requiresApproval ? 1 : 0,\n   113→          platform\n   114→        );\n   115→\n   116→      // Auto-join the author as a member\n   117→      db.prepare(\n   118→        \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n   119→      ).run(result.lastInsertRowid, session.userId);\n   120→\n   121→      return result.lastInsertRowid;\n   122→    });\n   123→\n   124→    const listingId = createTransaction();\n   125→\n   126→    return NextResponse.json(\n   127→      { id: listingId },\n   128→      { status: 201 }\n   129→    );\n   130→  } catch (error) {\n   131→    console.error(\"Create listing error:\", error);\n   132→    return NextResponse.json(\n   133→      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n   134→      { status: 500 }\n   135→    );\n   136→  }\n   137→}\n   138→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01Y5rP4Mk1d9p8wjjy5RPqKm","session_id":"71b3594c-3c92-4960-b469-8f6636094264","uuid":"ecd477d8-6a5a-4dea-b225-74922522d15c","timestamp":"2026-03-24T00:01:45.603Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01FR78FskEeJ2KUWKbLjPAf6","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n     5→\n     6→/**\n     7→ * POST /api/ratings — Submit a rating for a group member\n     8→ *\n     9→ * Body: { listingId, ratedUserId, score (1-5), comment? }\n    10→ *\n    11→ * Rules:\n    12→ * - Both rater and rated must be members of the listing\n    13→ * - The listing must be full (group completed)\n    14→ * - Cannot rate yourself\n    15→ * - One rating per rater-rated pair per listing (can update)\n    16→ */\n    17→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n    18→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    19→  if (!session) {\n    20→    return NextResponse.json(\n    21→      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n    22→      { status: 401 }\n    23→    );\n    24→  }\n    25→\n    26→  const body = await req.json();\n    27→  const { listingId, ratedUserId, score, comment } = body;\n    28→\n    29→  if (listingId == null || ratedUserId == null || score == null) {\n    30→    return NextResponse.json(\n    31→      { error: \"listingId, ratedUserId, and score are required\" },\n    32→      { status: 400 }\n    33→    );\n    34→  }\n    35→\n    36→  // Validate listingId and ratedUserId are positive integers\n    37→  if (typeof listingId !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(listingId) || listingId < 1) {\n    38→    return NextResponse.json(\n    39→      { error: \"Invalid listingId\" },\n    40→      { status: 400 }\n    41→    );\n    42→  }\n    43→\n    44→  if (typeof ratedUserId !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(ratedUserId) || ratedUserId < 1) {\n    45→    return NextResponse.json(\n    46→      { error: \"Invalid ratedUserId\" },\n    47→      { status: 400 }\n    48→    );\n    49→  }\n    50→\n    51→  if (score < 1 || score > 5 || !Number.isInteger(score)) {\n    52→    return NextResponse.json(\n    53→      { error: \"Score must be an integer between 1 and 5\" },\n    54→      { status: 400 }\n    55→    );\n    56→  }\n    57→\n    58→  if (ratedUserId === session.userId) {\n    59→    return NextResponse.json(\n    60→      { error: \"You cannot rate yourself\" },\n    61→      { status: 400 }\n    62→    );\n    63→  }\n    64→\n    65→  if (comment && comment.length > 1000) {\n    66→    return NextResponse.json(\n    67→      { error: \"Comment must be at most 1000 characters\" },\n    68→      { status: 400 }\n    69→    );\n    70→  }\n    71→\n    72→  // Verify listing exists and is full\n    73→  const listing = db\n    74→    .prepare(\"SELECT id, book_title, is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    75→    .get(listingId) as { id: number; book_title: string; is_full: number } | undefined;\n    76→\n    77→  if (!listing) {\n    78→    return NextResponse.json(\n    79→      { error: \"Listing not found\" },\n    80→      { status: 404 }\n    81→    );\n    82→  }\n    83→\n    84→  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    85→    return NextResponse.json(\n    86→      { error: \"Ratings are only available for completed reading groups\" },\n    87→      { status: 400 }\n    88→    );\n    89→  }\n    90→\n    91→  // Verify both users are members\n    92→  const raterMember = db\n    93→    .prepare(\n    94→      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    95→    )\n    96→    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n    97→\n    98→  if (!raterMember) {\n    99→    return NextResponse.json(\n   100→      { error: \"You must be a member of this group to rate\" },\n   101→      { status: 403 }\n   102→    );\n   103→  }\n   104→\n   105→  const ratedMember = db\n   106→    .prepare(\n   107→      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n   108→    )\n   109→    .get(listingId, ratedUserId);\n   110→\n   111→  if (!ratedMember) {\n   112→    return NextResponse.json(\n   113→      { error: \"The user you are rating must be a member of this group\" },\n   114→      { status: 400 }\n   115→    );\n   116→  }\n   117→\n   118→  // Upsert rating (update if exists)\n   119→  const existing = db\n   120→    .prepare(\n   121→      \"SELECT id FROM ratings WHERE listing_id = ? AND rater_id = ? AND rated_user_id = ?\"\n   122→    )\n   123→    .get(listingId, session.userId, ratedUserId) as { id: number } | undefined;\n   124→\n   125→  if (existing) {\n   126→    db.prepare(\n   127→      \"UPDATE ratings SET score = ?, comment = ?, created_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n   128→    ).run(score, comment || \"\", existing.id);\n   129→  } else {\n   130→    db.prepare(\n   131→      \"INSERT INTO ratings (listing_id, rater_id, rated_user_id, score, comment) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\"\n   132→    ).run(listingId, session.userId, ratedUserId, score, comment || \"\");\n   133→\n   134→    // Notify the rated user\n   135→    createNotification(\n   136→      ratedUserId,\n   137→      listingId,\n   138→      \"rating_received\",\n   139→      `Someone rated your participation in \"${listing.book_title}\"`\n   140→    );\n   141→  }\n   142→\n   143→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n   144→}\n   145→\n   146→/**\n   147→ * GET /api/ratings?listingId=X — Get ratings for a listing\n   148→ *\n   149→ * Returns ratings the current user has given and received in a listing,\n   150→ * plus the members who can still be rated.\n   151→ */\n   152→export async function GET(req: NextRequest) {\n   153→  const session = await requireAuth();\n   154→  if (!session) {\n   155→    return NextResponse.json(\n   156→      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n   157→      { status: 401 }\n   158→    );\n   159→  }\n   160→\n   161→  const listingIdParam = req.nextUrl.searchParams.get(\"listingId\");\n   162→  if (!listingIdParam) {\n   163→    return NextResponse.json(\n   164→      { error: \"listingId parameter required\" },\n   165→      { status: 400 }\n   166→    );\n   167→  }\n   168→  const listingId = parseInt(listingIdParam, 10);\n   169→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n   170→    return NextResponse.json(\n   171→      { error: \"Invalid listingId\" },\n   172→      { status: 400 }\n   173→    );\n   174→  }\n   175→\n   176→  // Verify the current user is a member of this listing\n   177→  const isMember = db\n   178→    .prepare(\"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\")\n   179→    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n   180→  if (!isMember) {\n   181→    return NextResponse.json(\n   182→      { error: \"You are not a member of this group\" },\n   183→      { status: 403 }\n   184→    );\n   185→  }\n   186→\n   187→  // Ratings the current user has given in this listing\n   188→  const givenRatings = db\n   189→    .prepare(\n   190→      `SELECT r.rated_user_id, r.score, r.comment, u.display_name\n   191→       FROM ratings r\n   192→       JOIN users u ON r.rated_user_id = u.id\n   193→       WHERE r.listing_id = ? AND r.rater_id = ?`\n   194→    )\n   195→    .all(listingId, session.userId) as {\n   196→      rated_user_id: number;\n   197→      score: number;\n   198→      comment: string;\n   199→      display_name: string;\n   200→    }[];\n   201→\n   202→  // Ratings the current user has received in this listing\n   203→  const receivedRatings = db\n   204→    .prepare(\n   205→      `SELECT r.rater_id, r.score, r.comment, u.display_name\n   206→       FROM ratings r\n   207→       JOIN users u ON r.rater_id = u.id\n   208→       WHERE r.listing_id = ? AND r.rated_user_id = ?`\n   209→    )\n   210→    .all(listingId, session.userId) as {\n   211→      rater_id: number;\n   212→      score: number;\n   213→      comment: string;\n   214→      display_name: string;\n   215→    }[];\n   216→\n   217→  return NextResponse.json({\n   218→    givenRatings,\n   219→    receivedRatings,\n   220→  });\n   221→}\n   222→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01Y5rP4Mk1d9p8wjjy5RPqKm","session_id":"71b3594c-3c92-4960-b469-8f6636094264","uuid":"a3b0c8df-0727-4126-87d4-3b8b52eee651","timestamp":"2026-03-24T00:01:45.980Z"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01CiztvpAE2h6oRAXs59khgY","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_013VdtzuvRY8K9ZHNpEtRQyi","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/profile/reputation/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":3167,"cache_creation_input_tokens":4616,"cache_read_input_tokens":22345,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":4616,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":36,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01Y5rP4Mk1d9p8wjjy5RPqKm","session_id":"71b3594c-3c92-4960-b469-8f6636094264","uuid":"321aee15-6847-4b98-ad10-f8d9708ed522"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_013VdtzuvRY8K9ZHNpEtRQyi","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→/**\n     6→ * GET /api/profile/reputation?userId=X\n     7→ *\n     8→ * Returns a user's reputation score and rating breakdown.\n     9→ * If no userId is provided, returns the current user's reputation.\n    10→ */\n    11→export async function GET(req: NextRequest) {\n    12→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    13→  if (!session) {\n    14→    return NextResponse.json(\n    15→      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n    16→      { status: 401 }\n    17→    );\n    18→  }\n    19→\n    20→  const userIdParam = req.nextUrl.searchParams.get(\"userId\");\n    21→  const userId = userIdParam ? parseInt(userIdParam, 10) : session.userId;\n    22→  const isOwnProfile = userId === session.userId;\n    23→\n    24→  if (userIdParam && isNaN(userId as number)) {\n    25→    return NextResponse.json(\n    26→      { error: \"Invalid userId parameter\" },\n    27→      { status: 400 }\n    28→    );\n    29→  }\n    30→\n    31→  // Average score\n    32→  const stats = db\n    33→    .prepare(\n    34→      `SELECT\n    35→        COUNT(*) as total_ratings,\n    36→        ROUND(AVG(score), 1) as average_score,\n    37→        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as five_star,\n    38→        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as four_star,\n    39→        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as three_star,\n    40→        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as two_star,\n    41→        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as one_star\n    42→       FROM ratings\n    43→       WHERE rated_user_id = ?`\n    44→    )\n    45→    .get(userId) as {\n    46→      total_ratings: number;\n    47→      average_score: number | null;\n    48→      five_star: number;\n    49→      four_star: number;\n    50→      three_star: number;\n    51→      two_star: number;\n    52→      one_star: number;\n    53→    };\n    54→\n    55→  // Number of completed groups\n    56→  const completedGroups = db\n    57→    .prepare(\n    58→      `SELECT COUNT(*) as count\n    59→       FROM listing_members lm\n    60→       JOIN listings l ON lm.listing_id = l.id\n    61→       WHERE lm.user_id = ? AND l.is_full = 1`\n    62→    )\n    63→    .get(userId) as { count: number };\n    64→\n    65→  // Number of groups where this user has given ratings\n    66→  const groupsRated = db\n    67→    .prepare(\n    68→      `SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT listing_id) as count\n    69→       FROM ratings\n    70→       WHERE rater_id = ?`\n    71→    )\n    72→    .get(userId) as { count: number };\n    73→\n    74→  // Recent ratings received (with anonymized feedback)\n    75→  const recentRatings = db\n    76→    .prepare(\n    77→      `SELECT r.score, r.comment, r.created_at, l.book_title\n    78→       FROM ratings r\n    79→       JOIN listings l ON r.listing_id = l.id\n    80→       WHERE r.rated_user_id = ?\n    81→       ORDER BY r.created_at DESC\n    82→       LIMIT 10`\n    83→    )\n    84→    .all(userId) as {\n    85→      score: number;\n    86→      comment: string;\n    87→      created_at: string;\n    88→      book_title: string;\n    89→    }[];\n    90→\n    91→  // Strip comments from ratings when viewing other users' profiles (privacy)\n    92→  const sanitizedRatings = isOwnProfile\n    93→    ? recentRatings\n    94→    : recentRatings.map(({ score, created_at, book_title }) => ({\n    95→        score,\n    96→        created_at,\n    97→        book_title,\n    98→      }));\n    99→\n   100→  return NextResponse.json({\n   101→    reputation: {\n   102→      averageScore: stats.average_score || 0,\n   103→      totalRatings: stats.total_ratings,\n   104→      completedGroups: completedGroups.count,\n   105→      groupsRated: groupsRated.count,\n   106→      breakdown: {\n   107→        5: stats.five_star || 0,\n   108→        4: stats.four_star || 0,\n   109→        3: stats.three_star || 0,\n   110→        2: stats.two_star || 0,\n   111→        1: stats.one_star || 0,\n   112→      },\n   113→      recentRatings: sanitizedRatings,\n   114→    },\n   115→  });\n   116→}\n   117→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01Y5rP4Mk1d9p8wjjy5RPqKm","session_id":"71b3594c-3c92-4960-b469-8f6636094264","uuid":"049fea94-7419-49e9-8976-883504d1423d","timestamp":"2026-03-24T00:01:46.220Z"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01Rxwx8teNR8DfTsBvPbezZW","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01AQafVPoj8tK2BSdvTste3T","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/telegram/webhook/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":9238,"cache_read_input_tokens":26961,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":9238,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":37,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01Y5rP4Mk1d9p8wjjy5RPqKm","session_id":"71b3594c-3c92-4960-b469-8f6636094264","uuid":"aa96cb30-57a9-423f-8aca-d5ce1564ce01"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01AQafVPoj8tK2BSdvTste3T","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import {\n     4→  createChatInviteLink,\n     5→  exportChatInviteLink,\n     6→  sendMessage,\n     7→  parseListingIdFromPayload,\n     8→} from \"@/lib/telegram\";\n     9→import { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n    10→\n    11→/**\n    12→ * Telegram webhook endpoint.\n    13→ *\n    14→ * Handles two types of updates:\n    15→ *\n    16→ * 1. `my_chat_member` — bot was added to a group\n    17→ *    When the author creates a group via the deep link, the bot is\n    18→ *    automatically added. We detect this, generate an invite link,\n    19→ *    and save it to the listing.\n    20→ *\n    21→ * 2. `message` with `/start listing_ID` — the bot receives a start\n    22→ *    command in a group with a payload referencing a listing.\n    23→ */\n    24→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n    25→  // Verify webhook secret — fail closed if not configured\n    26→  const webhookSecret = process.env.TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET;\n    27→  if (!webhookSecret) {\n    28→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Webhook not configured\" }, { status: 500 });\n    29→  }\n    30→  const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\");\n    31→  if (headerSecret !== webhookSecret) {\n    32→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n    33→  }\n    34→\n    35→  let update: Record<string, unknown>;\n    36→  try {\n    37→    update = await req.json();\n    38→  } catch {\n    39→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid JSON\" }, { status: 400 });\n    40→  }\n    41→\n    42→  // Handle bot being added to a group chat\n    43→  if (update.my_chat_member) {\n    44→    await handleChatMemberUpdate(\n    45→      update.my_chat_member as ChatMemberUpdate\n    46→    );\n    47→  }\n    48→\n    49→  // Handle /start command in groups (fallback mechanism)\n    50→  if (update.message) {\n    51→    await handleMessage(update.message as TelegramMessage);\n    52→  }\n    53→\n    54→  // Always return 200 to Telegram to avoid retries\n    55→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    56→}\n    57→\n    58→interface ChatMemberUpdate {\n    59→  chat: {\n    60→    id: number;\n    61→    title?: string;\n    62→    type: string;\n    63→  };\n    64→  from: {\n    65→    id: number;\n    66→    first_name: string;\n    67→  };\n    68→  new_chat_member: {\n    69→    user: {\n    70→      id: number;\n    71→      is_bot: boolean;\n    72→    };\n    73→    status: string;\n    74→  };\n    75→}\n    76→\n    77→interface TelegramMessage {\n    78→  chat: {\n    79→    id: number;\n    80→    type: string;\n    81→    title?: string;\n    82→  };\n    83→  text?: string;\n    84→  from?: {\n    85→    id: number;\n    86→  };\n    87→}\n    88→\n    89→/**\n    90→ * When the bot is added to a group, check if it's related to a listing.\n    91→ *\n    92→ * The deep link format is: t.me/BOT?startgroup=listing_ID\n    93→ * When a user creates a group through this link, Telegram:\n    94→ * 1. Creates the group\n    95→ * 2. Adds the bot as a member\n    96→ * 3. Sends a `my_chat_member` update\n    97→ *\n    98→ * We use the group title or a pending mapping to associate the chat with a listing.\n    99→ */\n   100→async function handleChatMemberUpdate(update: ChatMemberUpdate) {\n   101→  const { chat, new_chat_member } = update;\n   102→\n   103→  // Only process when bot is added (member or administrator)\n   104→  if (\n   105→    !new_chat_member.user.is_bot ||\n   106→    ![\"member\", \"administrator\"].includes(new_chat_member.status)\n   107→  ) {\n   108→    return;\n   109→  }\n   110→\n   111→  // Only process group chats\n   112→  if (![\"group\", \"supergroup\"].includes(chat.type)) {\n   113→    return;\n   114→  }\n   115→\n   116→  // Try to find the listing this group belongs to.\n   117→  // Strategy 1: Check pending_telegram_groups mapping table\n   118→  const pending = db\n   119→    .prepare(\n   120→      \"SELECT listing_id FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE telegram_chat_id = ?\"\n   121→    )\n   122→    .get(chat.id) as { listing_id: number } | undefined;\n   123→\n   124→  if (pending) {\n   125→    await linkTelegramToListing(pending.listing_id, chat.id);\n   126→    db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE telegram_chat_id = ?\").run(\n   127→      chat.id\n   128→    );\n   129→    return;\n   130→  }\n   131→\n   132→  // Strategy 2: Check for listings awaiting auto-telegram (most recent unlinked full listing by this author)\n   133→  // We store the chat ID and wait for the /start command or title match\n   134→  // For now, store the mapping and send a welcome message\n   135→  await sendMessage(\n   136→    chat.id,\n   137→    \"Hello! I'm the Bookmate bot. I'll help set up this reading group.\\n\\n\" +\n   138→      'If this group was created for a Bookmate listing, I\\'ll automatically generate an invite link. ' +\n   139→      \"The organizer can also type <code>/link</code> to manually trigger the setup.\"\n   140→  );\n   141→\n   142→  // Store the chat for potential later linking\n   143→  try {\n   144→    db.prepare(\n   145→      \"INSERT OR IGNORE INTO telegram_chats (chat_id, chat_title, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, datetime('now'))\"\n   146→    ).run(chat.id, chat.title || \"\");\n   147→  } catch {\n   148→    // Table might not exist yet on first run — handled gracefully\n   149→  }\n   150→}\n   151→\n   152→/**\n   153→ * Handle messages in group chats.\n   154→ * Supports /start with payload and /link command.\n   155→ */\n   156→async function handleMessage(message: TelegramMessage) {\n   157→  if (!message.text || ![\"group\", \"supergroup\"].includes(message.chat.type)) {\n   158→    return;\n   159→  }\n   160→\n   161→  const text = message.text.trim();\n   162→\n   163→  // Handle /start with listing payload (sent when group is created via deep link)\n   164→  if (text.startsWith(\"/start \")) {\n   165→    const payload = text.replace(\"/start \", \"\").trim();\n   166→    const listingId = parseListingIdFromPayload(payload);\n   167→    if (listingId) {\n   168→      await linkTelegramToListing(listingId, message.chat.id);\n   169→      return;\n   170→    }\n   171→  }\n   172→\n   173→  // Handle /link command — allow manual linking\n   174→  // Security: only show listings authored by a Bookmate user linked to this Telegram user\n   175→  if (text === \"/link\") {\n   176→    const telegramUserId = message.from?.id;\n   177→    if (!telegramUserId) {\n   178→      await sendMessage(message.chat.id, \"Could not identify the sender.\");\n   179→      return;\n   180→    }\n   181→\n   182→    // Look up the Bookmate user linked to this Telegram user\n   183→    const linkedUser = db\n   184→      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM telegram_user_links WHERE telegram_user_id = ?\")\n   185→      .get(telegramUserId) as { user_id: number } | undefined;\n   186→\n   187→    if (!linkedUser) {\n   188→      await sendMessage(\n   189→        message.chat.id,\n   190→        \"Your Telegram account is not linked to a Bookmate account. \" +\n   191→          \"Please use the Telegram setup link from your Bookmate listing page to link your account first.\"\n   192→      );\n   193→      return;\n   194→    }\n   195→\n   196→    // Only show unlinked listings authored by this verified user\n   197→    const unlinkedListings = db\n   198→      .prepare(\n   199→        `SELECT id, book_title FROM listings\n   200→         WHERE is_full = 1 AND (telegram_link = '' OR telegram_link IS NULL)\n   201→         AND telegram_chat_id IS NULL\n   202→         AND author_id = ?\n   203→         ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5`\n   204→      )\n   205→      .all(linkedUser.user_id) as { id: number; book_title: string }[];\n   206→\n   207→    if (unlinkedListings.length === 0) {\n   208→      await sendMessage(\n   209→        message.chat.id,\n   210→        \"No unlinked reading groups found for your account. The group may already be set up!\"\n   211→      );\n   212→      return;\n   213→    }\n   214→\n   215→    if (unlinkedListings.length === 1) {\n   216→      await linkTelegramToListing(unlinkedListings[0].id, message.chat.id);\n   217→      return;\n   218→    }\n   219→\n   220→    const listText = unlinkedListings\n   221→      .map((l) => `  /link_${l.id} — \"${l.book_title}\"`)\n   222→      .join(\"\\n\");\n   223→    await sendMessage(\n   224→      message.chat.id,\n   225→      `Multiple reading groups need a Telegram link. Pick one:\\n\\n${listText}`\n   226→    );\n   227→    return;\n   228→  }\n   229→\n   230→  // Handle /link_ID command — require verified ownership\n   231→  const linkMatch = text.match(/^\\/link_(\\d+)$/);\n   232→  if (linkMatch) {\n   233→    const telegramUserId = message.from?.id;\n   234→    if (!telegramUserId) {\n   235→      await sendMessage(message.chat.id, \"Could not identify the sender.\");\n   236→      return;\n   237→    }\n   238→\n   239→    const linkedUser = db\n   240→      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM telegram_user_links WHERE telegram_user_id = ?\")\n   241→      .get(telegramUserId) as { user_id: number } | undefined;\n   242→\n   243→    if (!linkedUser) {\n   244→      await sendMessage(\n   245→        message.chat.id,\n   246→        \"Your Telegram account is not linked to a Bookmate account.\"\n   247→      );\n   248→      return;\n   249→    }\n   250→\n   251→    const listingId = parseInt(linkMatch[1], 10);\n   252→\n   253→    // Verify this user is the listing author and the listing is full\n   254→    const listing = db\n   255→      .prepare(\"SELECT author_id, is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   256→      .get(listingId) as { author_id: number; is_full: number } | undefined;\n   257→\n   258→    if (!listing || listing.author_id !== linkedUser.user_id) {\n   259→      await sendMessage(\n   260→        message.chat.id,\n   261→        \"You can only link Telegram groups to your own Bookmate listings.\"\n   262→      );\n   263→      return;\n   264→    }\n   265→\n   266→    if (!listing.is_full) {\n   267→      await sendMessage(\n   268→        message.chat.id,\n   269→        \"This listing's group is not full yet. You can link a Telegram group once the group reaches its maximum size.\"\n   270→      );\n   271→      return;\n   272→    }\n   273→\n   274→    await linkTelegramToListing(listingId, message.chat.id);\n   275→  }\n   276→}\n   277→\n   278→/**\n   279→ * Link a Telegram chat to a listing:\n   280→ * 1. Generate an invite link\n   281→ * 2. Save it to the listing\n   282→ * 3. Notify all members\n   283→ * 4. Send a confirmation message to the Telegram group\n   284→ */\n   285→async function linkTelegramToListing(listingId: number, chatId: number) {\n   286→  const listing = db\n   287→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   288→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n   289→\n   290→  if (!listing) {\n   291→    await sendMessage(chatId, \"Could not find that reading group on Bookmate.\");\n   292→    return;\n   293→  }\n   294→\n   295→  if (listing.telegram_link) {\n   296→    await sendMessage(chatId, \"This reading group already has a Telegram link set up!\");\n   297→    return;\n   298→  }\n   299→\n   300→  // Try to create an invite link\n   301→  let inviteLink = await createChatInviteLink(chatId);\n   302→  if (!inviteLink) {\n   303→    // Fallback: export the default invite link\n   304→    inviteLink = await exportChatInviteLink(chatId);\n   305→  }\n   306→\n   307→  if (!inviteLink) {\n   308→    await sendMessage(\n   309→      chatId,\n   310→      \"I couldn't generate an invite link. Please make sure I have admin permissions in this group, \" +\n   311→        \"then try again with /link\"\n   312→    );\n   313→    return;\n   314→  }\n   315→\n   316→  // Save to database\n   317→  db.prepare(\n   318→    \"UPDATE listings SET telegram_link = ?, telegram_chat_id = ? WHERE id = ?\"\n   319→  ).run(inviteLink, chatId, listingId);\n   320→\n   321→  // Notify all members on Bookmate\n   322→  const members = db\n   323→    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n   324→    .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];\n   325→\n   326→  const bookTitle = listing.book_title as string;\n   327→  for (const member of members) {\n   328→    createNotification(\n   329→      member.user_id,\n   330→      listingId,\n   331→      \"telegram_ready\",\n   332→      `The Telegram group for \"${bookTitle}\" is ready! Click to view the invite link.`\n   333→    );\n   334→  }\n   335→\n   336→  // Send confirmation to the Telegram group\n   337→  await sendMessage(\n   338→    chatId,\n   339→    `This group is now linked to the Bookmate reading group for \"<b>${bookTitle}</b>\".\\n\\n` +\n   340→      `Invite link: ${inviteLink}\\n\\n` +\n   341→      \"All group members have been notified on Bookmate. Happy reading!\"\n   342→  );\n   343→}\n   344→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01Y5rP4Mk1d9p8wjjy5RPqKm","session_id":"71b3594c-3c92-4960-b469-8f6636094264","uuid":"9c7270ab-2c13-41a4-bd83-4d92f86d15ef","timestamp":"2026-03-24T00:01:49.197Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_014LEVagFWXJcXurPd5tsgj6","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import {\n     4→  createTextChannel,\n     5→  createChannelInvite,\n     6→  sendChannelMessage,\n     7→} from \"@/lib/discord\";\n     8→import { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n     9→\n    10→/**\n    11→ * Discord webhook endpoint for bot events.\n    12→ *\n    13→ * This endpoint handles:\n    14→ * 1. POST with { type: \"link\", guildId, listingId } - Link a Discord server to a listing\n    15→ *    (called by the bot or by an admin setup flow)\n    16→ *\n    17→ * Note: Unlike Telegram's push-based webhook, Discord uses Gateway (WebSocket)\n    18→ * for real-time events. This endpoint is used as an HTTP callback for\n    19→ * simpler integration scenarios or manual triggering.\n    20→ */\n    21→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n    22→  // Verify webhook secret — fail closed if not configured\n    23→  const webhookSecret = process.env.DISCORD_WEBHOOK_SECRET;\n    24→  if (!webhookSecret) {\n    25→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Webhook not configured\" }, { status: 500 });\n    26→  }\n    27→  const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\");\n    28→  if (headerSecret !== webhookSecret) {\n    29→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n    30→  }\n    31→\n    32→  try {\n    33→    const body = await req.json();\n    34→    const { type } = body;\n    35→\n    36→    if (type === \"link\") {\n    37→      return handleLink(body);\n    38→    }\n    39→\n    40→    // Discord Interaction verification (for future slash command support)\n    41→    if (type === 1) {\n    42→      // PING - respond with PONG\n    43→      return NextResponse.json({ type: 1 });\n    44→    }\n    45→\n    46→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unknown event type\" }, { status: 400 });\n    47→  } catch (err) {\n    48→    console.error(\"Discord webhook error:\", err);\n    49→    return NextResponse.json(\n    50→      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n    51→      { status: 500 }\n    52→    );\n    53→  }\n    54→}\n    55→\n    56→async function handleLink(body: {\n    57→  guildId: string;\n    58→  listingId: number;\n    59→  channelId?: string;\n    60→}) {\n    61→  const { guildId, listingId, channelId } = body;\n    62→\n    63→  if (!guildId || !listingId) {\n    64→    return NextResponse.json(\n    65→      { error: \"Missing guildId or listingId\" },\n    66→      { status: 400 }\n    67→    );\n    68→  }\n    69→\n    70→  if (typeof listingId !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(listingId) || listingId < 1) {\n    71→    return NextResponse.json(\n    72→      { error: \"Invalid listingId\" },\n    73→      { status: 400 }\n    74→    );\n    75→  }\n    76→\n    77→  const listing = db\n    78→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    79→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    80→\n    81→  if (!listing) {\n    82→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    83→  }\n    84→\n    85→  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    86→    return NextResponse.json(\n    87→      { error: \"Cannot link Discord until the group is full\" },\n    88→      { status: 400 }\n    89→    );\n    90→  }\n    91→\n    92→  if (listing.discord_link) {\n    93→    return NextResponse.json(\n    94→      { error: \"Discord link already set for this listing\" },\n    95→      { status: 400 }\n    96→    );\n    97→  }\n    98→\n    99→  let targetChannelId = channelId;\n   100→\n   101→  // If no channel specified, create one\n   102→  if (!targetChannelId) {\n   103→    const bookTitle = String(listing.book_title || \"reading-group\");\n   104→    const channelName = `bookmate-${bookTitle\n   105→      .toLowerCase()\n   106→      .replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, \"-\")\n   107→      .slice(0, 80)}`;\n   108→\n   109→    const channel = await createTextChannel(\n   110→      guildId,\n   111→      channelName,\n   112→      `Bookmate reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" by ${listing.book_author}`\n   113→    );\n   114→\n   115→    if (!channel) {\n   116→      return NextResponse.json(\n   117→        { error: \"Failed to create Discord channel. Make sure the bot has Manage Channels permission.\" },\n   118→        { status: 500 }\n   119→      );\n   120→    }\n   121→\n   122→    targetChannelId = channel.id;\n   123→  }\n   124→\n   125→  // Create invite link\n   126→  const inviteLink = await createChannelInvite(targetChannelId);\n   127→  if (!inviteLink) {\n   128→    return NextResponse.json(\n   129→      { error: \"Failed to create invite link. Make sure the bot has Create Instant Invite permission.\" },\n   130→      { status: 500 }\n   131→    );\n   132→  }\n   133→\n   134→  // Save to DB\n   135→  db.prepare(\n   136→    \"UPDATE listings SET discord_link = ?, discord_channel_id = ? WHERE id = ?\"\n   137→  ).run(inviteLink, targetChannelId, listingId);\n   138→\n   139→  // Notify all members\n   140→  const members = db\n   141→    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n   142→    .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];\n   143→\n   144→  for (const member of members) {\n   145→    createNotification(\n   146→      member.user_id,\n   147→      listingId,\n   148→      \"discord_ready\",\n   149→      `The Discord channel for \"${listing.book_title}\" is ready! Join to start discussing.`\n   150→    );\n   151→  }\n   152→\n   153→  // Send welcome message to the channel\n   154→  await sendChannelMessage(\n   155→    targetChannelId,\n   156→    `Welcome to the **${listing.book_title}** reading group! 📚\\n\\n` +\n   157→      `This channel was created by Bookmate for your reading group.\\n` +\n   158→      `**Reading pace:** ${listing.reading_pace}\\n` +\n   159→      `**Start date:** ${listing.start_date}\\n\\n` +\n   160→      `Happy reading! 🎉`\n   161→  );\n   162→\n   163→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true, inviteLink });\n   164→}\n   165→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01Y5rP4Mk1d9p8wjjy5RPqKm","session_id":"71b3594c-3c92-4960-b469-8f6636094264","uuid":"18c3435f-87ee-4dac-8c1d-c0b11541dad6","timestamp":"2026-03-24T00:01:49.367Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01GVf1XEjmSpUwHcSTTEb1vq","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { isBotConfigured, generateGroupDeepLink } from \"@/lib/telegram\";\n     5→\n     6→/**\n     7→ * GET /api/listings/[id]/auto-telegram\n     8→ *\n     9→ * Returns the Telegram deep link for one-click group creation.\n    10→ * Only available to the listing author when the group is full\n    11→ * and no Telegram link has been set yet.\n    12→ */\n    13→export async function GET(\n    14→  _req: NextRequest,\n    15→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n    16→) {\n    17→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    18→  if (!session) {\n    19→    return NextResponse.json(\n    20→      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n    21→      { status: 401 }\n    22→    );\n    23→  }\n    24→\n    25→  if (!isBotConfigured()) {\n    26→    return NextResponse.json(\n    27→      { error: \"Telegram bot not configured\", botConfigured: false },\n    28→      { status: 404 }\n    29→    );\n    30→  }\n    31→\n    32→  const { id } = await params;\n    33→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    34→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    35→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    36→  }\n    37→\n    38→  const listing = db\n    39→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    40→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    41→\n    42→  if (!listing) {\n    43→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    44→  }\n    45→\n    46→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    47→    return NextResponse.json(\n    48→      { error: \"Only the organizer can create the Telegram group\" },\n    49→      { status: 403 }\n    50→    );\n    51→  }\n    52→\n    53→  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    54→    return NextResponse.json(\n    55→      { error: \"Group must be full before creating a Telegram group\" },\n    56→      { status: 400 }\n    57→    );\n    58→  }\n    59→\n    60→  if (listing.telegram_link) {\n    61→    return NextResponse.json(\n    62→      { error: \"Telegram link already set\", telegramLink: listing.telegram_link },\n    63→      { status: 400 }\n    64→    );\n    65→  }\n    66→\n    67→  const deepLink = await generateGroupDeepLink(listingId);\n    68→  if (!deepLink) {\n    69→    return NextResponse.json(\n    70→      { error: \"Failed to generate deep link. Check bot configuration.\" },\n    71→      { status: 500 }\n    72→    );\n    73→  }\n    74→\n    75→  return NextResponse.json({\n    76→    deepLink,\n    77→    instructions:\n    78→      \"Click the link to open Telegram and create a group. The bot will automatically generate an invite link for your reading group.\",\n    79→  });\n    80→}\n    81→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01Y5rP4Mk1d9p8wjjy5RPqKm","session_id":"71b3594c-3c92-4960-b469-8f6636094264","uuid":"6f871ea3-cbe3-45a2-8869-8c0fb55325b1","timestamp":"2026-03-24T00:01:49.740Z"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01KsaG8XbbaSZNoK63KzgTtr","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01CQ7YBzJkN1qnWfqN2LmL7W","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/auto-discord/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":7395,"cache_read_input_tokens":36199,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":7395,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":39,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01Y5rP4Mk1d9p8wjjy5RPqKm","session_id":"71b3594c-3c92-4960-b469-8f6636094264","uuid":"e56ce285-1a8e-43cb-9076-fe3e315bffa0"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01CQ7YBzJkN1qnWfqN2LmL7W","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { getSession } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { isBotConfigured, generateBotInviteUrl } from \"@/lib/discord\";\n     5→\n     6→export async function GET(\n     7→  _req: NextRequest,\n     8→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n     9→) {\n    10→  const session = await getSession();\n    11→  if (!session.userId) {\n    12→    return NextResponse.json(\n    13→      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n    14→      { status: 401 }\n    15→    );\n    16→  }\n    17→\n    18→  if (!isBotConfigured()) {\n    19→    return NextResponse.json(\n    20→      { error: \"Discord bot is not configured\" },\n    21→      { status: 503 }\n    22→    );\n    23→  }\n    24→\n    25→  const { id } = await params;\n    26→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    27→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    28→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    29→  }\n    30→\n    31→  const listing = db\n    32→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    33→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    34→\n    35→  if (!listing) {\n    36→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    37→  }\n    38→\n    39→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    40→    return NextResponse.json(\n    41→      { error: \"Only the listing author can set up the Discord group\" },\n    42→      { status: 403 }\n    43→    );\n    44→  }\n    45→\n    46→  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    47→    return NextResponse.json(\n    48→      { error: \"The group is not full yet\" },\n    49→      { status: 400 }\n    50→    );\n    51→  }\n    52→\n    53→  if (listing.discord_link) {\n    54→    return NextResponse.json(\n    55→      { error: \"A Discord link has already been set\" },\n    56→      { status: 400 }\n    57→    );\n    58→  }\n    59→\n    60→  const inviteUrl = generateBotInviteUrl(listingId);\n    61→\n    62→  return NextResponse.json({\n    63→    inviteUrl,\n    64→    instructions:\n    65→      \"Click the link to add the Bookmate bot to your Discord server. \" +\n    66→      \"The bot will create a reading group channel and generate an invite link for your members.\",\n    67→  });\n    68→}\n    69→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01Y5rP4Mk1d9p8wjjy5RPqKm","session_id":"71b3594c-3c92-4960-b469-8f6636094264","uuid":"eefe1cda-30c0-41ad-b0fa-25b268e1efb2","timestamp":"2026-03-24T00:01:52.783Z"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01KsaG8XbbaSZNoK63KzgTtr","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_0142ahoSuw3sXeC5Q3FMZCg2","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":7395,"cache_read_input_tokens":36199,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":7395,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":39,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01Y5rP4Mk1d9p8wjjy5RPqKm","session_id":"71b3594c-3c92-4960-b469-8f6636094264","uuid":"78cd8201-b0d0-489e-b2e9-f476cb1bf429"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_0142ahoSuw3sXeC5Q3FMZCg2","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→\n     4→const PAGE_SIZE = 20;\n     5→\n     6→export async function GET(request: NextRequest) {\n     7→  const { searchParams } = request.nextUrl;\n     8→\n     9→  const q = searchParams.get(\"q\")?.trim() || \"\";\n    10→  const meetingFormat = searchParams.get(\"meeting_format\") || \"\";\n    11→  const readingPace = searchParams.get(\"reading_pace\") || \"\";\n    12→  const startDateFrom = searchParams.get(\"start_date_from\") || \"\";\n    13→  const sort = searchParams.get(\"sort\") || \"newest\";\n    14→  const includePast = searchParams.get(\"include_past\") === \"true\";\n    15→  const pageParam = parseInt(searchParams.get(\"page\") || \"1\", 10);\n    16→  const page = isNaN(pageParam) || pageParam < 1 ? 1 : Math.min(pageParam, 1000);\n    17→\n    18→  const conditions: string[] = [\"l.is_full = 0\"];\n    19→  const params: (string | number)[] = [];\n    20→\n    21→  // Apply date floor: use the more restrictive of today or startDateFrom\n    22→  const today = new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n    23→  const hasStartDateFilter = startDateFrom && /^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$/.test(startDateFrom);\n    24→\n    25→  if (!includePast) {\n    26→    // Use whichever is later: today or the explicit start_date_from filter\n    27→    const effectiveDate = hasStartDateFilter && startDateFrom > today ? startDateFrom : today;\n    28→    conditions.push(\"l.start_date >= ?\");\n    29→    params.push(effectiveDate);\n    30→  } else if (hasStartDateFilter) {\n    31→    // includePast is true, but user wants a specific start date floor\n    32→    conditions.push(\"l.start_date >= ?\");\n    33→    params.push(startDateFrom);\n    34→  }\n    35→\n    36→  if (q && q.length <= 300) {\n    37→    conditions.push(\"(l.book_title LIKE ? OR l.book_author LIKE ?)\");\n    38→    params.push(`%${q}%`, `%${q}%`);\n    39→  }\n    40→\n    41→  if (meetingFormat && [\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat)) {\n    42→    conditions.push(\"l.meeting_format = ?\");\n    43→    params.push(meetingFormat);\n    44→  }\n    45→\n    46→  if (readingPace && readingPace.length <= 200) {\n    47→    conditions.push(\"l.reading_pace LIKE ?\");\n    48→    params.push(`%${readingPace}%`);\n    49→  }\n    50→\n    51→  const whereClause = conditions.join(\" AND \");\n    52→\n    53→  let orderClause = \"l.created_at DESC\";\n    54→  if (sort === \"oldest\") orderClause = \"l.created_at ASC\";\n    55→  else if (sort === \"start_date\") orderClause = \"l.start_date ASC\";\n    56→\n    57→  const offset = (page - 1) * PAGE_SIZE;\n    58→\n    59→  // Get total count for pagination metadata\n    60→  const countResult = db\n    61→    .prepare(\n    62→      `SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM listings l WHERE ${whereClause}`\n    63→    )\n    64→    .get(...params) as { total: number };\n    65→\n    66→  const listings = db\n    67→    .prepare(\n    68→      `SELECT\n    69→        l.*,\n    70→        u.display_name as author_name,\n    71→        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = l.id) as member_count\n    72→      FROM listings l\n    73→      JOIN users u ON l.author_id = u.id\n    74→      WHERE ${whereClause}\n    75→      ORDER BY ${orderClause}\n    76→      LIMIT ? OFFSET ?`\n    77→    )\n    78→    .all(...params, PAGE_SIZE, offset);\n    79→\n    80→  return NextResponse.json({\n    81→    listings,\n    82→    pagination: {\n    83→      page,\n    84→      pageSize: PAGE_SIZE,\n    85→      total: countResult.total,\n    86→      totalPages: Math.ceil(countResult.total / PAGE_SIZE),\n    87→    },\n    88→  });\n    89→}\n    90→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01Y5rP4Mk1d9p8wjjy5RPqKm","session_id":"71b3594c-3c92-4960-b469-8f6636094264","uuid":"a83b0945-0a3b-4fe2-a97e-325cc5c4eb2f","timestamp":"2026-03-24T00:01:53.260Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01SkC4Mtgs9wQUuv29ZTyHpR","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→export async function PATCH(req: NextRequest) {\n     6→  const session = await requireAuth();\n     7→  if (!session) {\n     8→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n     9→  }\n    10→\n    11→  const { displayName, bio } = await req.json();\n    12→\n    13→  if (!displayName || displayName.trim().length === 0) {\n    14→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Display name is required\" }, { status: 400 });\n    15→  }\n    16→\n    17→  if (displayName.length > 100) {\n    18→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Display name must be at most 100 characters\" }, { status: 400 });\n    19→  }\n    20→\n    21→  if (bio && bio.length > 500) {\n    22→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Bio must be at most 500 characters\" }, { status: 400 });\n    23→  }\n    24→\n    25→  db.prepare(\"UPDATE users SET display_name = ?, bio = ? WHERE id = ?\").run(\n    26→    displayName.trim(),\n    27→    (bio || \"\").trim(),\n    28→    session.userId\n    29→  );\n    30→\n    31→  // Update session\n    32→  session.displayName = displayName.trim();\n    33→  await session.save();\n    34→\n    35→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    36→}\n    37→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01Y5rP4Mk1d9p8wjjy5RPqKm","session_id":"71b3594c-3c92-4960-b469-8f6636094264","uuid":"de486924-eb36-4269-90ee-333a07ca9e97","timestamp":"2026-03-24T00:01:53.527Z"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01LvjyLsfMm6JgGxqmtLSemW","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01KeGSMLRM5DiJJ4wE8hdyGV","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/auth/register/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":2923,"cache_read_input_tokens":43594,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":2923,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":36,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01Y5rP4Mk1d9p8wjjy5RPqKm","session_id":"71b3594c-3c92-4960-b469-8f6636094264","uuid":"92ca6637-1c81-40e2-9259-daab8baf42f6"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01KeGSMLRM5DiJJ4wE8hdyGV","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import bcrypt from \"bcryptjs\";\n     3→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     4→import { getSession } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     5→import { checkRateLimit } from \"@/lib/rate-limit\";\n     6→\n     7→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n     8→  try {\n     9→    const { email, password, displayName } = await req.json();\n    10→\n    11→    if (!email || !password || !displayName) {\n    12→      return NextResponse.json(\n    13→        { error: \"Email, password, and display name are required\" },\n    14→        { status: 400 }\n    15→      );\n    16→    }\n    17→\n    18→    // Rate limit: 3 registrations per IP per 15 minutes\n    19→    const ip = req.headers.get(\"x-forwarded-for\")?.split(\",\")[0]?.trim() || \"unknown\";\n    20→    const { allowed, retryAfter } = checkRateLimit(`register:${ip}`, 3);\n    21→    if (!allowed) {\n    22→      return NextResponse.json(\n    23→        { error: \"Too many registration attempts. Please try again later.\" },\n    24→        { status: 429, headers: { \"Retry-After\": String(retryAfter) } }\n    25→      );\n    26→    }\n    27→\n    28→    if (password.length < 8) {\n    29→      return NextResponse.json(\n    30→        { error: \"Password must be at least 8 characters\" },\n    31→        { status: 400 }\n    32→      );\n    33→    }\n    34→\n    35→    // bcrypt only uses the first 72 bytes; cap to prevent DoS via slow hashing\n    36→    if (password.length > 72) {\n    37→      return NextResponse.json(\n    38→        { error: \"Password must be at most 72 characters\" },\n    39→        { status: 400 }\n    40→      );\n    41→    }\n    42→\n    43→    if (displayName.length > 100) {\n    44→      return NextResponse.json(\n    45→        { error: \"Display name must be at most 100 characters\" },\n    46→        { status: 400 }\n    47→      );\n    48→    }\n    49→\n    50→    if (email.length > 254) {\n    51→      return NextResponse.json(\n    52→        { error: \"Email address is too long\" },\n    53→        { status: 400 }\n    54→      );\n    55→    }\n    56→\n    57→    if (!/^[^\\s@]+@[^\\s@]+\\.[^\\s@]+$/.test(email.trim())) {\n    58→      return NextResponse.json(\n    59→        { error: \"Please provide a valid email address\" },\n    60→        { status: 400 }\n    61→      );\n    62→    }\n    63→\n    64→    // Normalize email before duplicate check (INSERT stores lowercase)\n    65→    const normalizedEmail = email.toLowerCase().trim();\n    66→\n    67→    // Check if email is already taken\n    68→    const existing = db\n    69→      .prepare(\"SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = ?\")\n    70→      .get(normalizedEmail);\n    71→    if (existing) {\n    72→      return NextResponse.json(\n    73→        { error: \"An account with this email already exists\" },\n    74→        { status: 409 }\n    75→      );\n    76→    }\n    77→\n    78→    const passwordHash = await bcrypt.hash(password, 12);\n    79→\n    80→    const result = db\n    81→      .prepare(\n    82→        \"INSERT INTO users (email, password_hash, display_name) VALUES (?, ?, ?)\"\n    83→      )\n    84→      .run(normalizedEmail, passwordHash, displayName.trim());\n    85→\n    86→    // Auto-login after registration\n    87→    const session = await getSession();\n    88→    session.userId = Number(result.lastInsertRowid);\n    89→    session.email = normalizedEmail;\n    90→    session.displayName = displayName.trim();\n    91→    await session.save();\n    92→\n    93→    return NextResponse.json(\n    94→      {\n    95→        user: {\n    96→          id: result.lastInsertRowid,\n    97→          email: normalizedEmail,\n    98→          displayName: displayName.trim(),\n    99→        },\n   100→      },\n   101→      { status: 201 }\n   102→    );\n   103→  } catch (error) {\n   104→    console.error(\"Registration error:\", error);\n   105→    return NextResponse.json(\n   106→      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n   107→      { status: 500 }\n   108→    );\n   109→  }\n   110→}\n   111→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01Y5rP4Mk1d9p8wjjy5RPqKm","session_id":"71b3594c-3c92-4960-b469-8f6636094264","uuid":"bcdb441e-016b-44c5-9bb7-f6fcb4b9af0e","timestamp":"2026-03-24T00:01:56.354Z"}
