{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_012KQRZZ9DBqmxAxsEdr56aa","type":"tool_result","content":"   106→/**\n   107→ * Send a message to a Telegram chat.\n   108→ */\n   109→export async function sendMessage(\n   110→  chatId: number | string,\n   111→  text: string\n   112→): Promise<boolean> {\n   113→  const res = await callApi(\"sendMessage\", {\n   114→    chat_id: chatId,\n   115→    text,\n   116→    parse_mode: \"HTML\",\n   117→  });\n   118→  return res.ok;\n   119→}\n   120→\n   121→/**\n   122→ * Set up webhook URL for receiving Telegram updates.\n   123→ */\n   124→export async function setWebhook(url: string): Promise<boolean> {\n   125→  const res = await callApi(\"setWebhook\", {"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"71b3594c-3c92-4960-b469-8f6636094264","uuid":"4ae73279-d737-4796-9ee8-561447976851","timestamp":"2026-03-24T00:17:50.148Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/telegram.ts","content":"/**\n * Send a message to a Telegram chat.\n */\nexport async function sendMessage(\n  chatId: number | string,\n  text: string\n): Promise<boolean> {\n  const res = await callApi(\"sendMessage\", {\n    chat_id: chatId,\n    text,\n    parse_mode: \"HTML\",\n  });\n  return res.ok;\n}\n\n/**\n * Set up webhook URL for receiving Telegram updates.\n */\nexport async function setWebhook(url: string): Promise<boolean> {\n  const res = await callApi(\"setWebhook\", {","numLines":20,"startLine":106,"totalLines":142}}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_013hangiCZLDH3EFCFRj9e4p","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01DfJpDCAyFG4S6syA7hGgDw","name":"Edit","input":{"replace_all":false,"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/telegram.ts","old_string":"/**\n * Send a message to a Telegram chat.\n */\nexport async function sendMessage(","new_string":"/**\n * Escape HTML special characters for Telegram HTML parse mode.\n * Telegram's HTML parser interprets <, >, &, and \" — all must be escaped\n * in user-supplied content to prevent message injection.\n */\nexport function escapeHtml(text: string): string {\n  return text\n    .replace(/&/g, \"&amp;\")\n    .replace(/</g, \"&lt;\")\n    .replace(/>/g, \"&gt;\")\n    .replace(/\"/g, \"&quot;\");\n}\n\n/**\n * Send a message to a Telegram chat.\n */\nexport async function sendMessage("},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":347,"cache_read_input_tokens":46571,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":347},"output_tokens":60,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"71b3594c-3c92-4960-b469-8f6636094264","uuid":"25d0785d-c15f-4acb-bebf-0bc84f9e99b6"}

{"type":"stream_event","event":{"type":"message_stop"},"session_id":"71b3594c-3c92-4960-b469-8f6636094264","parent_tool_use_id":null,"uuid":"03351ccf-18a6-487e-9e42-0297a27b1a07"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01DfJpDCAyFG4S6syA7hGgDw","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/telegram.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"71b3594c-3c92-4960-b469-8f6636094264","uuid":"41b77e33-5b57-4d92-9e8a-bcde362eb989","timestamp":"2026-03-24T00:17:58.687Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/telegram.ts","oldString":"/**\n * Send a message to a Telegram chat.\n */\nexport async function sendMessage(","newString":"/**\n * Escape HTML special characters for Telegram HTML parse mode.\n * Telegram's HTML parser interprets <, >, &, and \" — all must be escaped\n * in user-supplied content to prevent message injection.\n */\nexport function escapeHtml(text: string): string {\n  return text\n    .replace(/&/g, \"&amp;\")\n    .replace(/</g, \"&lt;\")\n    .replace(/>/g, \"&gt;\")\n    .replace(/\"/g, \"&quot;\");\n}\n\n/**\n * Send a message to a Telegram chat.\n */\nexport async function sendMessage(","originalFile":"/**\n * Telegram Bot API integration for automatic group creation.\n *\n * When TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN is set, the system can:\n * 1. Generate deep links for one-click group creation\n * 2. Detect when the bot is added to a group (via webhook)\n * 3. Auto-generate and save invite links\n *\n * Flow:\n * - Author clicks \"Create Telegram Group\" → opens deep link in Telegram\n * - Telegram prompts author to create a group with the bot\n * - Bot receives `my_chat_member` update via webhook\n * - Bot creates an invite link and saves it to the listing\n */\n\nconst BOT_TOKEN = process.env.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN || \"\";\nconst TELEGRAM_API = `https://api.telegram.org/bot${BOT_TOKEN}`;\n\nexport function isBotConfigured(): boolean {\n  return BOT_TOKEN.length > 0;\n}\n\n/**\n * Call the Telegram Bot API.\n */\nasync function callApi<T = unknown>(\n  method: string,\n  params?: Record<string, unknown>\n): Promise<{ ok: boolean; result?: T; description?: string }> {\n  const res = await fetch(`${TELEGRAM_API}/${method}`, {\n    method: \"POST\",\n    headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n    body: JSON.stringify(params || {}),\n  });\n  return res.json();\n}\n\n/**\n * Get bot info (username, id).\n */\nexport async function getBotInfo(): Promise<{\n  id: number;\n  username: string;\n  first_name: string;\n} | null> {\n  const res = await callApi<{\n    id: number;\n    username: string;\n    first_name: string;\n  }>(\"getMe\");\n  return res.ok ? res.result! : null;\n}\n\n/**\n * Generate a deep link that opens Telegram and prompts the user\n * to create a new group with the bot already added.\n *\n * Format: https://t.me/BOT_USERNAME?startgroup=listing_LISTING_ID\n *\n * When the user creates the group, Telegram adds the bot and\n * sends a `my_chat_member` update to our webhook.\n */\nexport async function generateGroupDeepLink(\n  listingId: number\n): Promise<string | null> {\n  const bot = await getBotInfo();\n  if (!bot) return null;\n  return `https://t.me/${bot.username}?startgroup=listing_${listingId}`;\n}\n\n/**\n * Create an invite link for a chat where the bot is an admin.\n */\nexport async function createChatInviteLink(\n  chatId: number | string\n): Promise<string | null> {\n  const res = await callApi<{ invite_link: string }>(\n    \"createChatInviteLink\",\n    {\n      chat_id: chatId,\n      name: \"Bookmate Reading Group\",\n      creates_join_request: false,\n    }\n  );\n  if (res.ok && res.result) {\n    return res.result.invite_link;\n  }\n  return null;\n}\n\n/**\n * Export the existing invite link for a chat (fallback).\n */\nexport async function exportChatInviteLink(\n  chatId: number | string\n): Promise<string | null> {\n  const res = await callApi<string>(\"exportChatInviteLink\", {\n    chat_id: chatId,\n  });\n  if (res.ok && res.result) {\n    return res.result;\n  }\n  return null;\n}\n\n/**\n * Send a message to a Telegram chat.\n */\nexport async function sendMessage(\n  chatId: number | string,\n  text: string\n): Promise<boolean> {\n  const res = await callApi(\"sendMessage\", {\n    chat_id: chatId,\n    text,\n    parse_mode: \"HTML\",\n  });\n  return res.ok;\n}\n\n/**\n * Set up webhook URL for receiving Telegram updates.\n */\nexport async function setWebhook(url: string): Promise<boolean> {\n  const res = await callApi(\"setWebhook\", {\n    url,\n    allowed_updates: [\"my_chat_member\", \"message\"],\n  });\n  return res.ok;\n}\n\n/**\n * Parse the listing ID from a /start command payload.\n * Expected format: \"listing_123\"\n */\nexport function parseListingIdFromPayload(\n  payload: string\n): number | null {\n  const match = payload.match(/^listing_(\\d+)$/);\n  return match ? parseInt(match[1], 10) : null;\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":104,"oldLines":6,"newStart":104,"newLines":19,"lines":[" }"," "," /**","+ * Escape HTML special characters for Telegram HTML parse mode.","+ * Telegram's HTML parser interprets <, >, &, and \" — all must be escaped","+ * in user-supplied content to prevent message injection.","+ */","+export function escapeHtml(text: string): string {","+  return text","+    .replace(/&/g, \"&amp;\")","+    .replace(/</g, \"&lt;\")","+    .replace(/>/g, \"&gt;\")","+    .replace(/\"/g, \"&quot;\");","+}","+","+/**","  * Send a message to a Telegram chat.","  */"," export async function sendMessage("]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01TDatULu7sbMdkCLUWgszci","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/telegram/webhook/route.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"71b3594c-3c92-4960-b469-8f6636094264","uuid":"30fb62cd-482a-45db-a881-56d80237fa94","timestamp":"2026-03-24T00:18:04.396Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/telegram/webhook/route.ts","oldString":"import {\n  createChatInviteLink,\n  exportChatInviteLink,\n  sendMessage,\n  parseListingIdFromPayload,\n} from \"@/lib/telegram\";","newString":"import {\n  createChatInviteLink,\n  exportChatInviteLink,\n  sendMessage,\n  parseListingIdFromPayload,\n  escapeHtml,\n} from \"@/lib/telegram\";","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport {\n  createChatInviteLink,\n  exportChatInviteLink,\n  sendMessage,\n  parseListingIdFromPayload,\n} from \"@/lib/telegram\";\nimport { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n\n/**\n * Telegram webhook endpoint.\n *\n * Handles two types of updates:\n *\n * 1. `my_chat_member` — bot was added to a group\n *    When the author creates a group via the deep link, the bot is\n *    automatically added. We detect this, generate an invite link,\n *    and save it to the listing.\n *\n * 2. `message` with `/start listing_ID` — the bot receives a start\n *    command in a group with a payload referencing a listing.\n */\nexport async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n  // Verify webhook secret — fail closed if not configured\n  const webhookSecret = process.env.TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET;\n  if (!webhookSecret) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Webhook not configured\" }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n  const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\");\n  if (headerSecret !== webhookSecret) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  let update: Record<string, unknown>;\n  try {\n    update = await req.json();\n  } catch {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid JSON\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  // Handle bot being added to a group chat\n  if (update.my_chat_member) {\n    await handleChatMemberUpdate(\n      update.my_chat_member as ChatMemberUpdate\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Handle /start command in groups (fallback mechanism)\n  if (update.message) {\n    await handleMessage(update.message as TelegramMessage);\n  }\n\n  // Always return 200 to Telegram to avoid retries\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n}\n\ninterface ChatMemberUpdate {\n  chat: {\n    id: number;\n    title?: string;\n    type: string;\n  };\n  from: {\n    id: number;\n    first_name: string;\n  };\n  new_chat_member: {\n    user: {\n      id: number;\n      is_bot: boolean;\n    };\n    status: string;\n  };\n}\n\ninterface TelegramMessage {\n  chat: {\n    id: number;\n    type: string;\n    title?: string;\n  };\n  text?: string;\n  from?: {\n    id: number;\n  };\n}\n\n/**\n * When the bot is added to a group, check if it's related to a listing.\n *\n * The deep link format is: t.me/BOT?startgroup=listing_ID\n * When a user creates a group through this link, Telegram:\n * 1. Creates the group\n * 2. Adds the bot as a member\n * 3. Sends a `my_chat_member` update\n *\n * We use the group title or a pending mapping to associate the chat with a listing.\n */\nasync function handleChatMemberUpdate(update: ChatMemberUpdate) {\n  const { chat, new_chat_member } = update;\n\n  // Only process when bot is added (member or administrator)\n  if (\n    !new_chat_member.user.is_bot ||\n    ![\"member\", \"administrator\"].includes(new_chat_member.status)\n  ) {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Only process group chats\n  if (![\"group\", \"supergroup\"].includes(chat.type)) {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Try to find the listing this group belongs to.\n  // Strategy 1: Check pending_telegram_groups mapping table\n  const pending = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT listing_id FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE telegram_chat_id = ?\"\n    )\n    .get(chat.id) as { listing_id: number } | undefined;\n\n  if (pending) {\n    await linkTelegramToListing(pending.listing_id, chat.id);\n    db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE telegram_chat_id = ?\").run(\n      chat.id\n    );\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Strategy 2: Check for listings awaiting auto-telegram (most recent unlinked full listing by this author)\n  // We store the chat ID and wait for the /start command or title match\n  // For now, store the mapping and send a welcome message\n  await sendMessage(\n    chat.id,\n    \"Hello! I'm the Bookmate bot. I'll help set up this reading group.\\n\\n\" +\n      'If this group was created for a Bookmate listing, I\\'ll automatically generate an invite link. ' +\n      \"The organizer can also type <code>/link</code> to manually trigger the setup.\"\n  );\n\n  // Store the chat for potential later linking\n  try {\n    db.prepare(\n      \"INSERT OR IGNORE INTO telegram_chats (chat_id, chat_title, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, datetime('now'))\"\n    ).run(chat.id, chat.title || \"\");\n  } catch {\n    // Table might not exist yet on first run — handled gracefully\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Handle messages in group chats.\n * Supports /start with payload and /link command.\n */\nasync function handleMessage(message: TelegramMessage) {\n  if (!message.text || ![\"group\", \"supergroup\"].includes(message.chat.type)) {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  const text = message.text.trim();\n\n  // Handle /start with listing payload (sent when group is created via deep link)\n  if (text.startsWith(\"/start \")) {\n    const payload = text.replace(\"/start \", \"\").trim();\n    const listingId = parseListingIdFromPayload(payload);\n    if (listingId) {\n      await linkTelegramToListing(listingId, message.chat.id);\n      return;\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Handle /link command — allow manual linking\n  // Security: only show listings authored by a Bookmate user linked to this Telegram user\n  if (text === \"/link\") {\n    const telegramUserId = message.from?.id;\n    if (!telegramUserId) {\n      await sendMessage(message.chat.id, \"Could not identify the sender.\");\n      return;\n    }\n\n    // Look up the Bookmate user linked to this Telegram user\n    const linkedUser = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM telegram_user_links WHERE telegram_user_id = ?\")\n      .get(telegramUserId) as { user_id: number } | undefined;\n\n    if (!linkedUser) {\n      await sendMessage(\n        message.chat.id,\n        \"Your Telegram account is not linked to a Bookmate account. \" +\n          \"Please use the Telegram setup link from your Bookmate listing page to link your account first.\"\n      );\n      return;\n    }\n\n    // Only show unlinked listings authored by this verified user\n    const unlinkedListings = db\n      .prepare(\n        `SELECT id, book_title FROM listings\n         WHERE is_full = 1 AND (telegram_link = '' OR telegram_link IS NULL)\n         AND telegram_chat_id IS NULL\n         AND author_id = ?\n         ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5`\n      )\n      .all(linkedUser.user_id) as { id: number; book_title: string }[];\n\n    if (unlinkedListings.length === 0) {\n      await sendMessage(\n        message.chat.id,\n        \"No unlinked reading groups found for your account. The group may already be set up!\"\n      );\n      return;\n    }\n\n    if (unlinkedListings.length === 1) {\n      await linkTelegramToListing(unlinkedListings[0].id, message.chat.id);\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const listText = unlinkedListings\n      .map((l) => `  /link_${l.id} — \"${l.book_title}\"`)\n      .join(\"\\n\");\n    await sendMessage(\n      message.chat.id,\n      `Multiple reading groups need a Telegram link. Pick one:\\n\\n${listText}`\n    );\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Handle /link_ID command — require verified ownership\n  const linkMatch = text.match(/^\\/link_(\\d+)$/);\n  if (linkMatch) {\n    const telegramUserId = message.from?.id;\n    if (!telegramUserId) {\n      await sendMessage(message.chat.id, \"Could not identify the sender.\");\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const linkedUser = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM telegram_user_links WHERE telegram_user_id = ?\")\n      .get(telegramUserId) as { user_id: number } | undefined;\n\n    if (!linkedUser) {\n      await sendMessage(\n        message.chat.id,\n        \"Your Telegram account is not linked to a Bookmate account.\"\n      );\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const listingId = parseInt(linkMatch[1], 10);\n\n    // Verify this user is the listing author and the listing is full\n    const listing = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT author_id, is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n      .get(listingId) as { author_id: number; is_full: number } | undefined;\n\n    if (!listing || listing.author_id !== linkedUser.user_id) {\n      await sendMessage(\n        message.chat.id,\n        \"You can only link Telegram groups to your own Bookmate listings.\"\n      );\n      return;\n    }\n\n    if (!listing.is_full) {\n      await sendMessage(\n        message.chat.id,\n        \"This listing's group is not full yet. You can link a Telegram group once the group reaches its maximum size.\"\n      );\n      return;\n    }\n\n    await linkTelegramToListing(listingId, message.chat.id);\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Link a Telegram chat to a listing:\n * 1. Generate an invite link\n * 2. Save it to the listing\n * 3. Notify all members\n * 4. Send a confirmation message to the Telegram group\n */\nasync function linkTelegramToListing(listingId: number, chatId: number) {\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    await sendMessage(chatId, \"Could not find that reading group on Bookmate.\");\n    return;\n  }\n\n  if (listing.telegram_link) {\n    await sendMessage(chatId, \"This reading group already has a Telegram link set up!\");\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Try to create an invite link\n  let inviteLink = await createChatInviteLink(chatId);\n  if (!inviteLink) {\n    // Fallback: export the default invite link\n    inviteLink = await exportChatInviteLink(chatId);\n  }\n\n  if (!inviteLink) {\n    await sendMessage(\n      chatId,\n      \"I couldn't generate an invite link. Please make sure I have admin permissions in this group, \" +\n        \"then try again with /link\"\n    );\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Save to database\n  db.prepare(\n    \"UPDATE listings SET telegram_link = ?, telegram_chat_id = ? WHERE id = ?\"\n  ).run(inviteLink, chatId, listingId);\n\n  // Notify all members on Bookmate\n  const members = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n    .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];\n\n  const bookTitle = listing.book_title as string;\n  for (const member of members) {\n    createNotification(\n      member.user_id,\n      listingId,\n      \"telegram_ready\",\n      `The Telegram group for \"${bookTitle}\" is ready! Click to view the invite link.`\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Send confirmation to the Telegram group\n  await sendMessage(\n    chatId,\n    `This group is now linked to the Bookmate reading group for \"<b>${bookTitle}</b>\".\\n\\n` +\n      `Invite link: ${inviteLink}\\n\\n` +\n      \"All group members have been notified on Bookmate. Happy reading!\"\n  );\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":5,"oldLines":6,"newStart":5,"newLines":7,"lines":["   exportChatInviteLink,","   sendMessage,","   parseListingIdFromPayload,","+  escapeHtml,"," } from \"@/lib/telegram\";"," import { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";"," "]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01MarGtMJNRtxQvnxooKvSPc","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01VSQ1LwdSc88UDpziT46EEh","name":"Edit","input":{"replace_all":false,"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/telegram/webhook/route.ts","old_string":"  // Send confirmation to the Telegram group\n  await sendMessage(\n    chatId,\n    `This group is now linked to the Bookmate reading group for \"<b>${bookTitle}</b>\".\\n\\n` +\n      `Invite link: ${inviteLink}\\n\\n` +\n      \"All group members have been notified on Bookmate. Happy reading!\"\n  );","new_string":"  // Send confirmation to the Telegram group\n  // Escape book title to prevent HTML injection via Telegram's HTML parser\n  await sendMessage(\n    chatId,\n    `This group is now linked to the Bookmate reading group for \"<b>${escapeHtml(bookTitle)}</b>\".\\n\\n` +\n      `Invite link: ${inviteLink}\\n\\n` +\n      \"All group members have been notified on Bookmate. Happy reading!\"\n  );"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":390,"cache_read_input_tokens":47244,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":390},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"71b3594c-3c92-4960-b469-8f6636094264","uuid":"d446dd07-12a8-431a-b7e6-2d9d553dfda7"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01VSQ1LwdSc88UDpziT46EEh","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/telegram/webhook/route.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"71b3594c-3c92-4960-b469-8f6636094264","uuid":"147369bd-3a35-40b4-b0e2-53b60f309a49","timestamp":"2026-03-24T00:18:15.470Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/telegram/webhook/route.ts","oldString":"  // Send confirmation to the Telegram group\n  await sendMessage(\n    chatId,\n    `This group is now linked to the Bookmate reading group for \"<b>${bookTitle}</b>\".\\n\\n` +\n      `Invite link: ${inviteLink}\\n\\n` +\n      \"All group members have been notified on Bookmate. Happy reading!\"\n  );","newString":"  // Send confirmation to the Telegram group\n  // Escape book title to prevent HTML injection via Telegram's HTML parser\n  await sendMessage(\n    chatId,\n    `This group is now linked to the Bookmate reading group for \"<b>${escapeHtml(bookTitle)}</b>\".\\n\\n` +\n      `Invite link: ${inviteLink}\\n\\n` +\n      \"All group members have been notified on Bookmate. Happy reading!\"\n  );","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport {\n  createChatInviteLink,\n  exportChatInviteLink,\n  sendMessage,\n  parseListingIdFromPayload,\n  escapeHtml,\n} from \"@/lib/telegram\";\nimport { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n\n/**\n * Telegram webhook endpoint.\n *\n * Handles two types of updates:\n *\n * 1. `my_chat_member` — bot was added to a group\n *    When the author creates a group via the deep link, the bot is\n *    automatically added. We detect this, generate an invite link,\n *    and save it to the listing.\n *\n * 2. `message` with `/start listing_ID` — the bot receives a start\n *    command in a group with a payload referencing a listing.\n */\nexport async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n  // Verify webhook secret — fail closed if not configured\n  const webhookSecret = process.env.TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET;\n  if (!webhookSecret) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Webhook not configured\" }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n  const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\");\n  if (headerSecret !== webhookSecret) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  let update: Record<string, unknown>;\n  try {\n    update = await req.json();\n  } catch {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid JSON\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  // Handle bot being added to a group chat\n  if (update.my_chat_member) {\n    await handleChatMemberUpdate(\n      update.my_chat_member as ChatMemberUpdate\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Handle /start command in groups (fallback mechanism)\n  if (update.message) {\n    await handleMessage(update.message as TelegramMessage);\n  }\n\n  // Always return 200 to Telegram to avoid retries\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n}\n\ninterface ChatMemberUpdate {\n  chat: {\n    id: number;\n    title?: string;\n    type: string;\n  };\n  from: {\n    id: number;\n    first_name: string;\n  };\n  new_chat_member: {\n    user: {\n      id: number;\n      is_bot: boolean;\n    };\n    status: string;\n  };\n}\n\ninterface TelegramMessage {\n  chat: {\n    id: number;\n    type: string;\n    title?: string;\n  };\n  text?: string;\n  from?: {\n    id: number;\n  };\n}\n\n/**\n * When the bot is added to a group, check if it's related to a listing.\n *\n * The deep link format is: t.me/BOT?startgroup=listing_ID\n * When a user creates a group through this link, Telegram:\n * 1. Creates the group\n * 2. Adds the bot as a member\n * 3. Sends a `my_chat_member` update\n *\n * We use the group title or a pending mapping to associate the chat with a listing.\n */\nasync function handleChatMemberUpdate(update: ChatMemberUpdate) {\n  const { chat, new_chat_member } = update;\n\n  // Only process when bot is added (member or administrator)\n  if (\n    !new_chat_member.user.is_bot ||\n    ![\"member\", \"administrator\"].includes(new_chat_member.status)\n  ) {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Only process group chats\n  if (![\"group\", \"supergroup\"].includes(chat.type)) {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Try to find the listing this group belongs to.\n  // Strategy 1: Check pending_telegram_groups mapping table\n  const pending = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT listing_id FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE telegram_chat_id = ?\"\n    )\n    .get(chat.id) as { listing_id: number } | undefined;\n\n  if (pending) {\n    await linkTelegramToListing(pending.listing_id, chat.id);\n    db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE telegram_chat_id = ?\").run(\n      chat.id\n    );\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Strategy 2: Check for listings awaiting auto-telegram (most recent unlinked full listing by this author)\n  // We store the chat ID and wait for the /start command or title match\n  // For now, store the mapping and send a welcome message\n  await sendMessage(\n    chat.id,\n    \"Hello! I'm the Bookmate bot. I'll help set up this reading group.\\n\\n\" +\n      'If this group was created for a Bookmate listing, I\\'ll automatically generate an invite link. ' +\n      \"The organizer can also type <code>/link</code> to manually trigger the setup.\"\n  );\n\n  // Store the chat for potential later linking\n  try {\n    db.prepare(\n      \"INSERT OR IGNORE INTO telegram_chats (chat_id, chat_title, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, datetime('now'))\"\n    ).run(chat.id, chat.title || \"\");\n  } catch {\n    // Table might not exist yet on first run — handled gracefully\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Handle messages in group chats.\n * Supports /start with payload and /link command.\n */\nasync function handleMessage(message: TelegramMessage) {\n  if (!message.text || ![\"group\", \"supergroup\"].includes(message.chat.type)) {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  const text = message.text.trim();\n\n  // Handle /start with listing payload (sent when group is created via deep link)\n  if (text.startsWith(\"/start \")) {\n    const payload = text.replace(\"/start \", \"\").trim();\n    const listingId = parseListingIdFromPayload(payload);\n    if (listingId) {\n      await linkTelegramToListing(listingId, message.chat.id);\n      return;\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Handle /link command — allow manual linking\n  // Security: only show listings authored by a Bookmate user linked to this Telegram user\n  if (text === \"/link\") {\n    const telegramUserId = message.from?.id;\n    if (!telegramUserId) {\n      await sendMessage(message.chat.id, \"Could not identify the sender.\");\n      return;\n    }\n\n    // Look up the Bookmate user linked to this Telegram user\n    const linkedUser = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM telegram_user_links WHERE telegram_user_id = ?\")\n      .get(telegramUserId) as { user_id: number } | undefined;\n\n    if (!linkedUser) {\n      await sendMessage(\n        message.chat.id,\n        \"Your Telegram account is not linked to a Bookmate account. \" +\n          \"Please use the Telegram setup link from your Bookmate listing page to link your account first.\"\n      );\n      return;\n    }\n\n    // Only show unlinked listings authored by this verified user\n    const unlinkedListings = db\n      .prepare(\n        `SELECT id, book_title FROM listings\n         WHERE is_full = 1 AND (telegram_link = '' OR telegram_link IS NULL)\n         AND telegram_chat_id IS NULL\n         AND author_id = ?\n         ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5`\n      )\n      .all(linkedUser.user_id) as { id: number; book_title: string }[];\n\n    if (unlinkedListings.length === 0) {\n      await sendMessage(\n        message.chat.id,\n        \"No unlinked reading groups found for your account. The group may already be set up!\"\n      );\n      return;\n    }\n\n    if (unlinkedListings.length === 1) {\n      await linkTelegramToListing(unlinkedListings[0].id, message.chat.id);\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const listText = unlinkedListings\n      .map((l) => `  /link_${l.id} — \"${l.book_title}\"`)\n      .join(\"\\n\");\n    await sendMessage(\n      message.chat.id,\n      `Multiple reading groups need a Telegram link. Pick one:\\n\\n${listText}`\n    );\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Handle /link_ID command — require verified ownership\n  const linkMatch = text.match(/^\\/link_(\\d+)$/);\n  if (linkMatch) {\n    const telegramUserId = message.from?.id;\n    if (!telegramUserId) {\n      await sendMessage(message.chat.id, \"Could not identify the sender.\");\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const linkedUser = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM telegram_user_links WHERE telegram_user_id = ?\")\n      .get(telegramUserId) as { user_id: number } | undefined;\n\n    if (!linkedUser) {\n      await sendMessage(\n        message.chat.id,\n        \"Your Telegram account is not linked to a Bookmate account.\"\n      );\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const listingId = parseInt(linkMatch[1], 10);\n\n    // Verify this user is the listing author and the listing is full\n    const listing = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT author_id, is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n      .get(listingId) as { author_id: number; is_full: number } | undefined;\n\n    if (!listing || listing.author_id !== linkedUser.user_id) {\n      await sendMessage(\n        message.chat.id,\n        \"You can only link Telegram groups to your own Bookmate listings.\"\n      );\n      return;\n    }\n\n    if (!listing.is_full) {\n      await sendMessage(\n        message.chat.id,\n        \"This listing's group is not full yet. You can link a Telegram group once the group reaches its maximum size.\"\n      );\n      return;\n    }\n\n    await linkTelegramToListing(listingId, message.chat.id);\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Link a Telegram chat to a listing:\n * 1. Generate an invite link\n * 2. Save it to the listing\n * 3. Notify all members\n * 4. Send a confirmation message to the Telegram group\n */\nasync function linkTelegramToListing(listingId: number, chatId: number) {\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    await sendMessage(chatId, \"Could not find that reading group on Bookmate.\");\n    return;\n  }\n\n  if (listing.telegram_link) {\n    await sendMessage(chatId, \"This reading group already has a Telegram link set up!\");\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Try to create an invite link\n  let inviteLink = await createChatInviteLink(chatId);\n  if (!inviteLink) {\n    // Fallback: export the default invite link\n    inviteLink = await exportChatInviteLink(chatId);\n  }\n\n  if (!inviteLink) {\n    await sendMessage(\n      chatId,\n      \"I couldn't generate an invite link. Please make sure I have admin permissions in this group, \" +\n        \"then try again with /link\"\n    );\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Save to database\n  db.prepare(\n    \"UPDATE listings SET telegram_link = ?, telegram_chat_id = ? WHERE id = ?\"\n  ).run(inviteLink, chatId, listingId);\n\n  // Notify all members on Bookmate\n  const members = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n    .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];\n\n  const bookTitle = listing.book_title as string;\n  for (const member of members) {\n    createNotification(\n      member.user_id,\n      listingId,\n      \"telegram_ready\",\n      `The Telegram group for \"${bookTitle}\" is ready! Click to view the invite link.`\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Send confirmation to the Telegram group\n  await sendMessage(\n    chatId,\n    `This group is now linked to the Bookmate reading group for \"<b>${bookTitle}</b>\".\\n\\n` +\n      `Invite link: ${inviteLink}\\n\\n` +\n      \"All group members have been notified on Bookmate. Happy reading!\"\n  );\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":335,"oldLines":9,"newStart":335,"newLines":10,"lines":["   }"," ","   // Send confirmation to the Telegram group","+  // Escape book title to prevent HTML injection via Telegram's HTML parser","   await sendMessage(","     chatId,","-    `This group is now linked to the Bookmate reading group for \"<b>${bookTitle}</b>\".\\n\\n` +","+    `This group is now linked to the Bookmate reading group for \"<b>${escapeHtml(bookTitle)}</b>\".\\n\\n` +","       `Invite link: ${inviteLink}\\n\\n` +","       \"All group members have been notified on Bookmate. Happy reading!\"","   );"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01CuA4fgQavPLAbhrHmgy7xG","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/telegram/webhook/route.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"71b3594c-3c92-4960-b469-8f6636094264","uuid":"3e22a09b-c90f-464b-baf6-51ed7df7ca18","timestamp":"2026-03-24T00:18:25.093Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/telegram/webhook/route.ts","oldString":"    const listText = unlinkedListings\n      .map((l) => `  /link_${l.id} — \"${l.book_title}\"`)\n      .join(\"\\n\");","newString":"    const listText = unlinkedListings\n      .map((l) => `  /link_${l.id} — \"${escapeHtml(l.book_title)}\"`)\n      .join(\"\\n\");","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport {\n  createChatInviteLink,\n  exportChatInviteLink,\n  sendMessage,\n  parseListingIdFromPayload,\n  escapeHtml,\n} from \"@/lib/telegram\";\nimport { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n\n/**\n * Telegram webhook endpoint.\n *\n * Handles two types of updates:\n *\n * 1. `my_chat_member` — bot was added to a group\n *    When the author creates a group via the deep link, the bot is\n *    automatically added. We detect this, generate an invite link,\n *    and save it to the listing.\n *\n * 2. `message` with `/start listing_ID` — the bot receives a start\n *    command in a group with a payload referencing a listing.\n */\nexport async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n  // Verify webhook secret — fail closed if not configured\n  const webhookSecret = process.env.TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET;\n  if (!webhookSecret) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Webhook not configured\" }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n  const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\");\n  if (headerSecret !== webhookSecret) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  let update: Record<string, unknown>;\n  try {\n    update = await req.json();\n  } catch {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid JSON\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  // Handle bot being added to a group chat\n  if (update.my_chat_member) {\n    await handleChatMemberUpdate(\n      update.my_chat_member as ChatMemberUpdate\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Handle /start command in groups (fallback mechanism)\n  if (update.message) {\n    await handleMessage(update.message as TelegramMessage);\n  }\n\n  // Always return 200 to Telegram to avoid retries\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n}\n\ninterface ChatMemberUpdate {\n  chat: {\n    id: number;\n    title?: string;\n    type: string;\n  };\n  from: {\n    id: number;\n    first_name: string;\n  };\n  new_chat_member: {\n    user: {\n      id: number;\n      is_bot: boolean;\n    };\n    status: string;\n  };\n}\n\ninterface TelegramMessage {\n  chat: {\n    id: number;\n    type: string;\n    title?: string;\n  };\n  text?: string;\n  from?: {\n    id: number;\n  };\n}\n\n/**\n * When the bot is added to a group, check if it's related to a listing.\n *\n * The deep link format is: t.me/BOT?startgroup=listing_ID\n * When a user creates a group through this link, Telegram:\n * 1. Creates the group\n * 2. Adds the bot as a member\n * 3. Sends a `my_chat_member` update\n *\n * We use the group title or a pending mapping to associate the chat with a listing.\n */\nasync function handleChatMemberUpdate(update: ChatMemberUpdate) {\n  const { chat, new_chat_member } = update;\n\n  // Only process when bot is added (member or administrator)\n  if (\n    !new_chat_member.user.is_bot ||\n    ![\"member\", \"administrator\"].includes(new_chat_member.status)\n  ) {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Only process group chats\n  if (![\"group\", \"supergroup\"].includes(chat.type)) {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Try to find the listing this group belongs to.\n  // Strategy 1: Check pending_telegram_groups mapping table\n  const pending = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT listing_id FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE telegram_chat_id = ?\"\n    )\n    .get(chat.id) as { listing_id: number } | undefined;\n\n  if (pending) {\n    await linkTelegramToListing(pending.listing_id, chat.id);\n    db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE telegram_chat_id = ?\").run(\n      chat.id\n    );\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Strategy 2: Check for listings awaiting auto-telegram (most recent unlinked full listing by this author)\n  // We store the chat ID and wait for the /start command or title match\n  // For now, store the mapping and send a welcome message\n  await sendMessage(\n    chat.id,\n    \"Hello! I'm the Bookmate bot. I'll help set up this reading group.\\n\\n\" +\n      'If this group was created for a Bookmate listing, I\\'ll automatically generate an invite link. ' +\n      \"The organizer can also type <code>/link</code> to manually trigger the setup.\"\n  );\n\n  // Store the chat for potential later linking\n  try {\n    db.prepare(\n      \"INSERT OR IGNORE INTO telegram_chats (chat_id, chat_title, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, datetime('now'))\"\n    ).run(chat.id, chat.title || \"\");\n  } catch {\n    // Table might not exist yet on first run — handled gracefully\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Handle messages in group chats.\n * Supports /start with payload and /link command.\n */\nasync function handleMessage(message: TelegramMessage) {\n  if (!message.text || ![\"group\", \"supergroup\"].includes(message.chat.type)) {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  const text = message.text.trim();\n\n  // Handle /start with listing payload (sent when group is created via deep link)\n  if (text.startsWith(\"/start \")) {\n    const payload = text.replace(\"/start \", \"\").trim();\n    const listingId = parseListingIdFromPayload(payload);\n    if (listingId) {\n      await linkTelegramToListing(listingId, message.chat.id);\n      return;\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Handle /link command — allow manual linking\n  // Security: only show listings authored by a Bookmate user linked to this Telegram user\n  if (text === \"/link\") {\n    const telegramUserId = message.from?.id;\n    if (!telegramUserId) {\n      await sendMessage(message.chat.id, \"Could not identify the sender.\");\n      return;\n    }\n\n    // Look up the Bookmate user linked to this Telegram user\n    const linkedUser = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM telegram_user_links WHERE telegram_user_id = ?\")\n      .get(telegramUserId) as { user_id: number } | undefined;\n\n    if (!linkedUser) {\n      await sendMessage(\n        message.chat.id,\n        \"Your Telegram account is not linked to a Bookmate account. \" +\n          \"Please use the Telegram setup link from your Bookmate listing page to link your account first.\"\n      );\n      return;\n    }\n\n    // Only show unlinked listings authored by this verified user\n    const unlinkedListings = db\n      .prepare(\n        `SELECT id, book_title FROM listings\n         WHERE is_full = 1 AND (telegram_link = '' OR telegram_link IS NULL)\n         AND telegram_chat_id IS NULL\n         AND author_id = ?\n         ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5`\n      )\n      .all(linkedUser.user_id) as { id: number; book_title: string }[];\n\n    if (unlinkedListings.length === 0) {\n      await sendMessage(\n        message.chat.id,\n        \"No unlinked reading groups found for your account. The group may already be set up!\"\n      );\n      return;\n    }\n\n    if (unlinkedListings.length === 1) {\n      await linkTelegramToListing(unlinkedListings[0].id, message.chat.id);\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const listText = unlinkedListings\n      .map((l) => `  /link_${l.id} — \"${l.book_title}\"`)\n      .join(\"\\n\");\n    await sendMessage(\n      message.chat.id,\n      `Multiple reading groups need a Telegram link. Pick one:\\n\\n${listText}`\n    );\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Handle /link_ID command — require verified ownership\n  const linkMatch = text.match(/^\\/link_(\\d+)$/);\n  if (linkMatch) {\n    const telegramUserId = message.from?.id;\n    if (!telegramUserId) {\n      await sendMessage(message.chat.id, \"Could not identify the sender.\");\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const linkedUser = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM telegram_user_links WHERE telegram_user_id = ?\")\n      .get(telegramUserId) as { user_id: number } | undefined;\n\n    if (!linkedUser) {\n      await sendMessage(\n        message.chat.id,\n        \"Your Telegram account is not linked to a Bookmate account.\"\n      );\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const listingId = parseInt(linkMatch[1], 10);\n\n    // Verify this user is the listing author and the listing is full\n    const listing = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT author_id, is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n      .get(listingId) as { author_id: number; is_full: number } | undefined;\n\n    if (!listing || listing.author_id !== linkedUser.user_id) {\n      await sendMessage(\n        message.chat.id,\n        \"You can only link Telegram groups to your own Bookmate listings.\"\n      );\n      return;\n    }\n\n    if (!listing.is_full) {\n      await sendMessage(\n        message.chat.id,\n        \"This listing's group is not full yet. You can link a Telegram group once the group reaches its maximum size.\"\n      );\n      return;\n    }\n\n    await linkTelegramToListing(listingId, message.chat.id);\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Link a Telegram chat to a listing:\n * 1. Generate an invite link\n * 2. Save it to the listing\n * 3. Notify all members\n * 4. Send a confirmation message to the Telegram group\n */\nasync function linkTelegramToListing(listingId: number, chatId: number) {\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    await sendMessage(chatId, \"Could not find that reading group on Bookmate.\");\n    return;\n  }\n\n  if (listing.telegram_link) {\n    await sendMessage(chatId, \"This reading group already has a Telegram link set up!\");\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Try to create an invite link\n  let inviteLink = await createChatInviteLink(chatId);\n  if (!inviteLink) {\n    // Fallback: export the default invite link\n    inviteLink = await exportChatInviteLink(chatId);\n  }\n\n  if (!inviteLink) {\n    await sendMessage(\n      chatId,\n      \"I couldn't generate an invite link. Please make sure I have admin permissions in this group, \" +\n        \"then try again with /link\"\n    );\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Save to database\n  db.prepare(\n    \"UPDATE listings SET telegram_link = ?, telegram_chat_id = ? WHERE id = ?\"\n  ).run(inviteLink, chatId, listingId);\n\n  // Notify all members on Bookmate\n  const members = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n    .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];\n\n  const bookTitle = listing.book_title as string;\n  for (const member of members) {\n    createNotification(\n      member.user_id,\n      listingId,\n      \"telegram_ready\",\n      `The Telegram group for \"${bookTitle}\" is ready! Click to view the invite link.`\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Send confirmation to the Telegram group\n  // Escape book title to prevent HTML injection via Telegram's HTML parser\n  await sendMessage(\n    chatId,\n    `This group is now linked to the Bookmate reading group for \"<b>${escapeHtml(bookTitle)}</b>\".\\n\\n` +\n      `Invite link: ${inviteLink}\\n\\n` +\n      \"All group members have been notified on Bookmate. Happy reading!\"\n  );\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":219,"oldLines":7,"newStart":219,"newLines":7,"lines":["     }"," ","     const listText = unlinkedListings","-      .map((l) => `  /link_${l.id} — \"${l.book_title}\"`)","+      .map((l) => `  /link_${l.id} — \"${escapeHtml(l.book_title)}\"`)","       .join(\"\\n\");","     await sendMessage(","       message.chat.id,"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_017SJKy9TxQEDMAdfkYxsdn4","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01HufcsrRo6k1cqJz6SutN3h","name":"Edit","input":{"replace_all":false,"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/discord.ts","old_string":"export function isBotConfigured(): boolean {\n  return BOT_TOKEN.length > 0 && CLIENT_ID.length > 0;\n}","new_string":"export function isBotConfigured(): boolean {\n  return BOT_TOKEN.length > 0 && CLIENT_ID.length > 0;\n}\n\n/**\n * Validate a Discord snowflake ID (numeric string, 17-20 digits).\n * Used to prevent path traversal in Discord API URL construction.\n */\nexport function isValidSnowflake(id: string): boolean {\n  return /^\\d{17,20}$/.test(id);\n}"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":274,"cache_read_input_tokens":48015,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":274},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"71b3594c-3c92-4960-b469-8f6636094264","uuid":"295d9538-4eb7-4b30-a9fc-ed18554584f5"}

{"type":"stream_event","event":{"type":"message_stop"},"session_id":"71b3594c-3c92-4960-b469-8f6636094264","parent_tool_use_id":null,"uuid":"9d0b500a-0434-4355-abcd-995f760d5851"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01HufcsrRo6k1cqJz6SutN3h","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/discord.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"71b3594c-3c92-4960-b469-8f6636094264","uuid":"76a5c799-d5d8-42d5-a93e-37d396ade6b5","timestamp":"2026-03-24T00:22:02.222Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/discord.ts","oldString":"export function isBotConfigured(): boolean {\n  return BOT_TOKEN.length > 0 && CLIENT_ID.length > 0;\n}","newString":"export function isBotConfigured(): boolean {\n  return BOT_TOKEN.length > 0 && CLIENT_ID.length > 0;\n}\n\n/**\n * Validate a Discord snowflake ID (numeric string, 17-20 digits).\n * Used to prevent path traversal in Discord API URL construction.\n */\nexport function isValidSnowflake(id: string): boolean {\n  return /^\\d{17,20}$/.test(id);\n}","originalFile":"/**\n * Discord Bot API integration for automatic server/channel creation.\n *\n * When DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN and DISCORD_CLIENT_ID are set, the system can:\n * 1. Generate bot invite URLs so authors can add the bot to their server\n * 2. Create text channels and invite links via Discord REST API\n * 3. Receive interaction events via webhook\n *\n * Flow:\n * - Author clicks \"Set up Discord\" → opens bot invite URL\n * - Author adds bot to their server\n * - Bot receives an interaction or the author triggers channel creation\n * - Bot creates a text channel + invite link, saves to listing\n */\n\nconst BOT_TOKEN = process.env.DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN || \"\";\nconst CLIENT_ID = process.env.DISCORD_CLIENT_ID || \"\";\nconst DISCORD_API = \"https://discord.com/api/v10\";\n\nexport function isBotConfigured(): boolean {\n  return BOT_TOKEN.length > 0 && CLIENT_ID.length > 0;\n}\n\n/**\n * Call the Discord REST API.\n */\nasync function callApi<T = unknown>(\n  endpoint: string,\n  method: string = \"GET\",\n  body?: Record<string, unknown>\n): Promise<{ ok: boolean; data?: T; error?: string }> {\n  try {\n    const res = await fetch(`${DISCORD_API}${endpoint}`, {\n      method,\n      headers: {\n        Authorization: `Bot ${BOT_TOKEN}`,\n        \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\",\n      },\n      body: body ? JSON.stringify(body) : undefined,\n    });\n\n    if (!res.ok) {\n      const errData = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));\n      return {\n        ok: false,\n        error: (errData as Record<string, string>).message || `HTTP ${res.status}`,\n      };\n    }\n\n    const data = (await res.json()) as T;\n    return { ok: true, data };\n  } catch (err) {\n    return { ok: false, error: String(err) };\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Get bot user info.\n */\nexport async function getBotInfo(): Promise<{\n  id: string;\n  username: string;\n} | null> {\n  const res = await callApi<{ id: string; username: string }>(\"/users/@me\");\n  return res.ok && res.data ? res.data : null;\n}\n\n/**\n * Generate a bot invite URL that includes the listing ID in the state parameter.\n * The bot needs permissions: Manage Channels, Create Instant Invite, Send Messages\n *\n * Permission bits:\n * - MANAGE_CHANNELS (0x10) = 16\n * - CREATE_INSTANT_INVITE (0x1) = 1\n * - SEND_MESSAGES (0x800) = 2048\n * - VIEW_CHANNEL (0x400) = 1024\n * Total: 3089\n */\nexport function generateBotInviteUrl(listingId: number): string {\n  const permissions = 3089;\n  const state = `listing_${listingId}`;\n  return `https://discord.com/oauth2/authorize?client_id=${CLIENT_ID}&permissions=${permissions}&scope=bot&state=${encodeURIComponent(state)}`;\n}\n\n/**\n * Create a text channel in a guild.\n */\nexport async function createTextChannel(\n  guildId: string,\n  name: string,\n  topic?: string\n): Promise<{ id: string; name: string } | null> {\n  const res = await callApi<{ id: string; name: string }>(\n    `/guilds/${guildId}/channels`,\n    \"POST\",\n    {\n      name: name.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9-]/g, \"-\").slice(0, 100),\n      type: 0, // GUILD_TEXT\n      topic: topic || \"Bookmate reading group discussion channel\",\n    }\n  );\n  return res.ok && res.data ? res.data : null;\n}\n\n/**\n * Create an invite for a channel.\n */\nexport async function createChannelInvite(\n  channelId: string,\n  maxAge: number = 0 // 0 = never expires\n): Promise<string | null> {\n  const res = await callApi<{ code: string }>(\n    `/channels/${channelId}/invites`,\n    \"POST\",\n    {\n      max_age: maxAge,\n      max_uses: 0,\n      unique: true,\n    }\n  );\n  if (res.ok && res.data) {\n    return `https://discord.gg/${res.data.code}`;\n  }\n  return null;\n}\n\n/**\n * Send a message to a Discord channel.\n */\nexport async function sendChannelMessage(\n  channelId: string,\n  content: string\n): Promise<boolean> {\n  const res = await callApi(\n    `/channels/${channelId}/messages`,\n    \"POST\",\n    { content }\n  );\n  return res.ok;\n}\n\n/**\n * Get guild (server) info.\n */\nexport async function getGuild(\n  guildId: string\n): Promise<{ id: string; name: string } | null> {\n  const res = await callApi<{ id: string; name: string }>(\n    `/guilds/${guildId}`\n  );\n  return res.ok && res.data ? res.data : null;\n}\n\n/**\n * List guilds the bot is a member of.\n */\nexport async function getBotGuilds(): Promise<\n  { id: string; name: string }[]\n> {\n  const res = await callApi<{ id: string; name: string }[]>(\n    \"/users/@me/guilds\"\n  );\n  return res.ok && res.data ? res.data : [];\n}\n\n/**\n * Parse listing ID from a state or payload string.\n * Expected format: \"listing_123\"\n */\nexport function parseListingIdFromState(state: string): number | null {\n  const match = state.match(/^listing_(\\d+)$/);\n  return match ? parseInt(match[1], 10) : null;\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":22,"oldLines":6,"newStart":22,"newLines":14,"lines":[" }"," "," /**","+ * Validate a Discord snowflake ID (numeric string, 17-20 digits).","+ * Used to prevent path traversal in Discord API URL construction.","+ */","+export function isValidSnowflake(id: string): boolean {","+  return /^\\d{17,20}$/.test(id);","+}","+","+/**","  * Call the Discord REST API.","  */"," async function callApi<T = unknown>("]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01K69tCEbFivMDFaDxkZTyro","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/discord/webhook/route.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"71b3594c-3c92-4960-b469-8f6636094264","uuid":"1c8c7dee-e53f-409c-9ae9-fab1f51bedb5","timestamp":"2026-03-24T00:22:06.710Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/discord/webhook/route.ts","oldString":"import {\n  createTextChannel,\n  createChannelInvite,\n  sendChannelMessage,\n} from \"@/lib/discord\";","newString":"import {\n  createTextChannel,\n  createChannelInvite,\n  sendChannelMessage,\n  isValidSnowflake,\n} from \"@/lib/discord\";","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport {\n  createTextChannel,\n  createChannelInvite,\n  sendChannelMessage,\n} from \"@/lib/discord\";\nimport { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n\n/**\n * Discord webhook endpoint for bot events.\n *\n * This endpoint handles:\n * 1. POST with { type: \"link\", guildId, listingId } - Link a Discord server to a listing\n *    (called by the bot or by an admin setup flow)\n *\n * Note: Unlike Telegram's push-based webhook, Discord uses Gateway (WebSocket)\n * for real-time events. This endpoint is used as an HTTP callback for\n * simpler integration scenarios or manual triggering.\n */\nexport async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n  // Verify webhook secret — fail closed if not configured\n  const webhookSecret = process.env.DISCORD_WEBHOOK_SECRET;\n  if (!webhookSecret) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Webhook not configured\" }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n  const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\");\n  if (headerSecret !== webhookSecret) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  try {\n    const body = await req.json();\n    const { type } = body;\n\n    if (type === \"link\") {\n      return handleLink(body);\n    }\n\n    // Discord Interaction verification (for future slash command support)\n    if (type === 1) {\n      // PING - respond with PONG\n      return NextResponse.json({ type: 1 });\n    }\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unknown event type\" }, { status: 400 });\n  } catch (err) {\n    console.error(\"Discord webhook error:\", err);\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n      { status: 500 }\n    );\n  }\n}\n\nasync function handleLink(body: {\n  guildId: string;\n  listingId: number;\n  channelId?: string;\n}) {\n  const { guildId, listingId, channelId } = body;\n\n  if (!guildId || !listingId) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Missing guildId or listingId\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (typeof listingId !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(listingId) || listingId < 1) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Invalid listingId\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Cannot link Discord until the group is full\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (listing.discord_link) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Discord link already set for this listing\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  let targetChannelId = channelId;\n\n  // If no channel specified, create one\n  if (!targetChannelId) {\n    const bookTitle = String(listing.book_title || \"reading-group\");\n    const channelName = `bookmate-${bookTitle\n      .toLowerCase()\n      .replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, \"-\")\n      .slice(0, 80)}`;\n\n    const channel = await createTextChannel(\n      guildId,\n      channelName,\n      `Bookmate reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" by ${listing.book_author}`\n    );\n\n    if (!channel) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Failed to create Discord channel. Make sure the bot has Manage Channels permission.\" },\n        { status: 500 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    targetChannelId = channel.id;\n  }\n\n  // Create invite link\n  const inviteLink = await createChannelInvite(targetChannelId);\n  if (!inviteLink) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Failed to create invite link. Make sure the bot has Create Instant Invite permission.\" },\n      { status: 500 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Save to DB\n  db.prepare(\n    \"UPDATE listings SET discord_link = ?, discord_channel_id = ? WHERE id = ?\"\n  ).run(inviteLink, targetChannelId, listingId);\n\n  // Notify all members\n  const members = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n    .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];\n\n  for (const member of members) {\n    createNotification(\n      member.user_id,\n      listingId,\n      \"discord_ready\",\n      `The Discord channel for \"${listing.book_title}\" is ready! Join to start discussing.`\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Send welcome message to the channel\n  await sendChannelMessage(\n    targetChannelId,\n    `Welcome to the **${listing.book_title}** reading group! 📚\\n\\n` +\n      `This channel was created by Bookmate for your reading group.\\n` +\n      `**Reading pace:** ${listing.reading_pace}\\n` +\n      `**Start date:** ${listing.start_date}\\n\\n` +\n      `Happy reading! 🎉`\n  );\n\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true, inviteLink });\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":4,"oldLines":6,"newStart":4,"newLines":7,"lines":["   createTextChannel,","   createChannelInvite,","   sendChannelMessage,","+  isValidSnowflake,"," } from \"@/lib/discord\";"," import { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";"," "]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01YM2gzyYVwXSzwY9SaJHVJ1","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01FcguSTexHQBBYWxyueWEAj","name":"Edit","input":{"replace_all":false,"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/discord/webhook/route.ts","old_string":"  if (typeof listingId !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(listingId) || listingId < 1) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Invalid listingId\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }","new_string":"  if (typeof listingId !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(listingId) || listingId < 1) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Invalid listingId\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Validate Discord snowflake IDs to prevent path traversal in API URLs\n  if (typeof guildId !== \"string\" || !isValidSnowflake(guildId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Invalid guildId format\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n  if (channelId !== undefined && (typeof channelId !== \"string\" || !isValidSnowflake(channelId))) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Invalid channelId format\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":252,"cache_read_input_tokens":48612,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":252},"output_tokens":70,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"71b3594c-3c92-4960-b469-8f6636094264","uuid":"db89dbca-2579-4919-9580-b083e137d326"}

{"type":"stream_event","event":{"type":"message_stop"},"session_id":"71b3594c-3c92-4960-b469-8f6636094264","parent_tool_use_id":null,"uuid":"cfff1643-aa57-4641-9678-c9ebe9721471"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01FcguSTexHQBBYWxyueWEAj","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/discord/webhook/route.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"71b3594c-3c92-4960-b469-8f6636094264","uuid":"88e8de31-4736-40da-a2e8-22afad8f8308","timestamp":"2026-03-24T00:22:28.407Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/discord/webhook/route.ts","oldString":"  if (typeof listingId !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(listingId) || listingId < 1) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Invalid listingId\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }","newString":"  if (typeof listingId !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(listingId) || listingId < 1) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Invalid listingId\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Validate Discord snowflake IDs to prevent path traversal in API URLs\n  if (typeof guildId !== \"string\" || !isValidSnowflake(guildId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Invalid guildId format\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n  if (channelId !== undefined && (typeof channelId !== \"string\" || !isValidSnowflake(channelId))) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Invalid channelId format\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport {\n  createTextChannel,\n  createChannelInvite,\n  sendChannelMessage,\n  isValidSnowflake,\n} from \"@/lib/discord\";\nimport { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n\n/**\n * Discord webhook endpoint for bot events.\n *\n * This endpoint handles:\n * 1. POST with { type: \"link\", guildId, listingId } - Link a Discord server to a listing\n *    (called by the bot or by an admin setup flow)\n *\n * Note: Unlike Telegram's push-based webhook, Discord uses Gateway (WebSocket)\n * for real-time events. This endpoint is used as an HTTP callback for\n * simpler integration scenarios or manual triggering.\n */\nexport async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n  // Verify webhook secret — fail closed if not configured\n  const webhookSecret = process.env.DISCORD_WEBHOOK_SECRET;\n  if (!webhookSecret) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Webhook not configured\" }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n  const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\");\n  if (headerSecret !== webhookSecret) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  try {\n    const body = await req.json();\n    const { type } = body;\n\n    if (type === \"link\") {\n      return handleLink(body);\n    }\n\n    // Discord Interaction verification (for future slash command support)\n    if (type === 1) {\n      // PING - respond with PONG\n      return NextResponse.json({ type: 1 });\n    }\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unknown event type\" }, { status: 400 });\n  } catch (err) {\n    console.error(\"Discord webhook error:\", err);\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n      { status: 500 }\n    );\n  }\n}\n\nasync function handleLink(body: {\n  guildId: string;\n  listingId: number;\n  channelId?: string;\n}) {\n  const { guildId, listingId, channelId } = body;\n\n  if (!guildId || !listingId) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Missing guildId or listingId\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (typeof listingId !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(listingId) || listingId < 1) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Invalid listingId\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Cannot link Discord until the group is full\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (listing.discord_link) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Discord link already set for this listing\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  let targetChannelId = channelId;\n\n  // If no channel specified, create one\n  if (!targetChannelId) {\n    const bookTitle = String(listing.book_title || \"reading-group\");\n    const channelName = `bookmate-${bookTitle\n      .toLowerCase()\n      .replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, \"-\")\n      .slice(0, 80)}`;\n\n    const channel = await createTextChannel(\n      guildId,\n      channelName,\n      `Bookmate reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" by ${listing.book_author}`\n    );\n\n    if (!channel) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Failed to create Discord channel. Make sure the bot has Manage Channels permission.\" },\n        { status: 500 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    targetChannelId = channel.id;\n  }\n\n  // Create invite link\n  const inviteLink = await createChannelInvite(targetChannelId);\n  if (!inviteLink) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Failed to create invite link. Make sure the bot has Create Instant Invite permission.\" },\n      { status: 500 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Save to DB\n  db.prepare(\n    \"UPDATE listings SET discord_link = ?, discord_channel_id = ? WHERE id = ?\"\n  ).run(inviteLink, targetChannelId, listingId);\n\n  // Notify all members\n  const members = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n    .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];\n\n  for (const member of members) {\n    createNotification(\n      member.user_id,\n      listingId,\n      \"discord_ready\",\n      `The Discord channel for \"${listing.book_title}\" is ready! Join to start discussing.`\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Send welcome message to the channel\n  await sendChannelMessage(\n    targetChannelId,\n    `Welcome to the **${listing.book_title}** reading group! 📚\\n\\n` +\n      `This channel was created by Bookmate for your reading group.\\n` +\n      `**Reading pace:** ${listing.reading_pace}\\n` +\n      `**Start date:** ${listing.start_date}\\n\\n` +\n      `Happy reading! 🎉`\n  );\n\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true, inviteLink });\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":75,"oldLines":6,"newStart":75,"newLines":20,"lines":["     );","   }"," ","+  // Validate Discord snowflake IDs to prevent path traversal in API URLs","+  if (typeof guildId !== \"string\" || !isValidSnowflake(guildId)) {","+    return NextResponse.json(","+      { error: \"Invalid guildId format\" },","+      { status: 400 }","+    );","+  }","+  if (channelId !== undefined && (typeof channelId !== \"string\" || !isValidSnowflake(channelId))) {","+    return NextResponse.json(","+      { error: \"Invalid channelId format\" },","+      { status: 400 }","+    );","+  }","+","   const listing = db","     .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")","     .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01C4D3wMqwV5RG8sZ2kVXSNA","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01VJHuJRYhmYrxe3RKwyiarA","name":"Edit","input":{"replace_all":false,"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/telegram/webhook/route.ts","old_string":"  // Handle /start with listing payload (sent when group is created via deep link)\n  if (text.startsWith(\"/start \")) {\n    const payload = text.replace(\"/start \", \"\").trim();\n    const listingId = parseListingIdFromPayload(payload);\n    if (listingId) {\n      await linkTelegramToListing(listingId, message.chat.id);\n      return;\n    }\n  }","new_string":"  // Handle /start with listing payload (sent when group is created via deep link)\n  if (text.startsWith(\"/start \")) {\n    const payload = text.replace(\"/start \", \"\").trim();\n    const listingId = parseListingIdFromPayload(payload);\n    if (listingId) {\n      // Verify the sender is the listing author to prevent unauthorized linking\n      const telegramUserId = message.from?.id;\n      if (!telegramUserId) {\n        await sendMessage(message.chat.id, \"Could not identify the sender.\");\n        return;\n      }\n\n      const linkedUser = db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM telegram_user_links WHERE telegram_user_id = ?\")\n        .get(telegramUserId) as { user_id: number } | undefined;\n\n      if (linkedUser) {\n        const listing = db\n          .prepare(\"SELECT author_id FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n          .get(listingId) as { author_id: number } | undefined;\n\n        if (listing && listing.author_id === linkedUser.user_id) {\n          await linkTelegramToListing(listingId, message.chat.id);\n          return;\n        }\n      }\n\n      // If no linked user or not the author, store for later linking via /link command\n      await sendMessage(\n        message.chat.id,\n        \"To link this group to a Bookmate listing, the listing author should use the <code>/link</code> command.\"\n      );\n      return;\n    }\n  }"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":449,"cache_read_input_tokens":48864,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":449},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"71b3594c-3c92-4960-b469-8f6636094264","uuid":"2303e17e-90fd-4b9c-ab1a-5739ae14adfd"}
