listingId = parseListingIdFromPayload(payload);\n    if (listingId) {\n      await linkTelegramToListing(listingId, message.chat.id);\n      return;\n    }\n  }","newString":"  // Handle /start with listing payload (sent when group is created via deep link)\n  if (text.startsWith(\"/start \")) {\n    const payload = text.replace(\"/start \", \"\").trim();\n    const listingId = parseListingIdFromPayload(payload);\n    if (listingId) {\n      // Verify the sender is the listing author to prevent unauthorized linking\n      const telegramUserId = message.from?.id;\n      if (!telegramUserId) {\n        await sendMessage(message.chat.id, \"Could not identify the sender.\");\n        return;\n      }\n\n      const linkedUser = db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM telegram_user_links WHERE telegram_user_id = ?\")\n        .get(telegramUserId) as { user_id: number } | undefined;\n\n      if (linkedUser) {\n        const listing = db\n          .prepare(\"SELECT author_id FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n          .get(listingId) as { author_id: number } | undefined;\n\n        if (listing && listing.author_id === linkedUser.user_id) {\n          await linkTelegramToListing(listingId, message.chat.id);\n          return;\n        }\n      }\n\n      // If no linked user or not the author, store for later linking via /link command\n      await sendMessage(\n        message.chat.id,\n        \"To link this group to a Bookmate listing, the listing author should use the <code>/link</code> command.\"\n      );\n      return;\n    }\n  }","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport {\n  createChatInviteLink,\n  exportChatInviteLink,\n  sendMessage,\n  parseListingIdFromPayload,\n  escapeHtml,\n} from \"@/lib/telegram\";\nimport { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n\n/**\n * Telegram webhook endpoint.\n *\n * Handles two types of updates:\n *\n * 1. `my_chat_member` — bot was added to a group\n *    When the author creates a group via the deep link, the bot is\n *    automatically added. We detect this, generate an invite link,\n *    and save it to the listing.\n *\n * 2. `message` with `/start listing_ID` — the bot receives a start\n *    command in a group with a payload referencing a listing.\n */\nexport async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n  // Verify webhook secret — fail closed if not configured\n  const webhookSecret = process.env.TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET;\n  if (!webhookSecret) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Webhook not configured\" }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n  const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\");\n  if (headerSecret !== webhookSecret) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  let update: Record<string, unknown>;\n  try {\n    update = await req.json();\n  } catch {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid JSON\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  // Handle bot being added to a group chat\n  if (update.my_chat_member) {\n    await handleChatMemberUpdate(\n      update.my_chat_member as ChatMemberUpdate\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Handle /start command in groups (fallback mechanism)\n  if (update.message) {\n    await handleMessage(update.message as TelegramMessage);\n  }\n\n  // Always return 200 to Telegram to avoid retries\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n}\n\ninterface ChatMemberUpdate {\n  chat: {\n    id: number;\n    title?: string;\n    type: string;\n  };\n  from: {\n    id: number;\n    first_name: string;\n  };\n  new_chat_member: {\n    user: {\n      id: number;\n      is_bot: boolean;\n    };\n    status: string;\n  };\n}\n\ninterface TelegramMessage {\n  chat: {\n    id: number;\n    type: string;\n    title?: string;\n  };\n  text?: string;\n  from?: {\n    id: number;\n  };\n}\n\n/**\n * When the bot is added to a group, check if it's related to a listing.\n *\n * The deep link format is: t.me/BOT?startgroup=listing_ID\n * When a user creates a group through this link, Telegram:\n * 1. Creates the group\n * 2. Adds the bot as a member\n * 3. Sends a `my_chat_member` update\n *\n * We use the group title or a pending mapping to associate the chat with a listing.\n */\nasync function handleChatMemberUpdate(update: ChatMemberUpdate) {\n  const { chat, new_chat_member } = update;\n\n  // Only process when bot is added (member or administrator)\n  if (\n    !new_chat_member.user.is_bot ||\n    ![\"member\", \"administrator\"].includes(new_chat_member.status)\n  ) {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Only process group chats\n  if (![\"group\", \"supergroup\"].includes(chat.type)) {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Try to find the listing this group belongs to.\n  // Strategy 1: Check pending_telegram_groups mapping table\n  const pending = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT listing_id FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE telegram_chat_id = ?\"\n    )\n    .get(chat.id) as { listing_id: number } | undefined;\n\n  if (pending) {\n    await linkTelegramToListing(pending.listing_id, chat.id);\n    db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE telegram_chat_id = ?\").run(\n      chat.id\n    );\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Strategy 2: Check for listings awaiting auto-telegram (most recent unlinked full listing by this author)\n  // We store the chat ID and wait for the /start command or title match\n  // For now, store the mapping and send a welcome message\n  await sendMessage(\n    chat.id,\n    \"Hello! I'm the Bookmate bot. I'll help set up this reading group.\\n\\n\" +\n      'If this group was created for a Bookmate listing, I\\'ll automatically generate an invite link. ' +\n      \"The organizer can also type <code>/link</code> to manually trigger the setup.\"\n  );\n\n  // Store the chat for potential later linking\n  try {\n    db.prepare(\n      \"INSERT OR IGNORE INTO telegram_chats (chat_id, chat_title, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, datetime('now'))\"\n    ).run(chat.id, chat.title || \"\");\n  } catch {\n    // Table might not exist yet on first run — handled gracefully\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Handle messages in group chats.\n * Supports /start with payload and /link command.\n */\nasync function handleMessage(message: TelegramMessage) {\n  if (!message.text || ![\"group\", \"supergroup\"].includes(message.chat.type)) {\n    return;\n  }\n\n  const text = message.text.trim();\n\n  // Handle /start with listing payload (sent when group is created via deep link)\n  if (text.startsWith(\"/start \")) {\n    const payload = text.replace(\"/start \", \"\").trim();\n    const listingId = parseListingIdFromPayload(payload);\n    if (listingId) {\n      await linkTelegramToListing(listingId, message.chat.id);\n      return;\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Handle /link command — allow manual linking\n  // Security: only show listings authored by a Bookmate user linked to this Telegram user\n  if (text === \"/link\") {\n    const telegramUserId = message.from?.id;\n    if (!telegramUserId) {\n      await sendMessage(message.chat.id, \"Could not identify the sender.\");\n      return;\n    }\n\n    // Look up the Bookmate user linked to this Telegram user\n    const linkedUser = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM telegram_user_links WHERE telegram_user_id = ?\")\n      .get(telegramUserId) as { user_id: number } | undefined;\n\n    if (!linkedUser) {\n      await sendMessage(\n        message.chat.id,\n        \"Your Telegram account is not linked to a Bookmate account. \" +\n          \"Please use the Telegram setup link from your Bookmate listing page to link your account first.\"\n      );\n      return;\n    }\n\n    // Only show unlinked listings authored by this verified user\n    const unlinkedListings = db\n      .prepare(\n        `SELECT id, book_title FROM listings\n         WHERE is_full = 1 AND (telegram_link = '' OR telegram_link IS NULL)\n         AND telegram_chat_id IS NULL\n         AND author_id = ?\n         ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5`\n      )\n      .all(linkedUser.user_id) as { id: number; book_title: string }[];\n\n    if (unlinkedListings.length === 0) {\n      await sendMessage(\n        message.chat.id,\n        \"No unlinked reading groups found for your account. The group may already be set up!\"\n      );\n      return;\n    }\n\n    if (unlinkedListings.length === 1) {\n      await linkTelegramToListing(unlinkedListings[0].id, message.chat.id);\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const listText = unlinkedListings\n      .map((l) => `  /link_${l.id} — \"${escapeHtml(l.book_title)}\"`)\n      .join(\"\\n\");\n    await sendMessage(\n      message.chat.id,\n      `Multiple reading groups need a Telegram link. Pick one:\\n\\n${listText}`\n    );\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Handle /link_ID command — require verified ownership\n  const linkMatch = text.match(/^\\/link_(\\d+)$/);\n  if (linkMatch) {\n    const telegramUserId = message.from?.id;\n    if (!telegramUserId) {\n      await sendMessage(message.chat.id, \"Could not identify the sender.\");\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const linkedUser = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM telegram_user_links WHERE telegram_user_id = ?\")\n      .get(telegramUserId) as { user_id: number } | undefined;\n\n    if (!linkedUser) {\n      await sendMessage(\n        message.chat.id,\n        \"Your Telegram account is not linked to a Bookmate account.\"\n      );\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const listingId = parseInt(linkMatch[1], 10);\n\n    // Verify this user is the listing author and the listing is full\n    const listing = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT author_id, is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n      .get(listingId) as { author_id: number; is_full: number } | undefined;\n\n    if (!listing || listing.author_id !== linkedUser.user_id) {\n      await sendMessage(\n        message.chat.id,\n        \"You can only link Telegram groups to your own Bookmate listings.\"\n      );\n      return;\n    }\n\n    if (!listing.is_full) {\n      await sendMessage(\n        message.chat.id,\n        \"This listing's group is not full yet. You can link a Telegram group once the group reaches its maximum size.\"\n      );\n      return;\n    }\n\n    await linkTelegramToListing(listingId, message.chat.id);\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Link a Telegram chat to a listing:\n * 1. Generate an invite link\n * 2. Save it to the listing\n * 3. Notify all members\n * 4. Send a confirmation message to the Telegram group\n */\nasync function linkTelegramToListing(listingId: number, chatId: number) {\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    await sendMessage(chatId, \"Could not find that reading group on Bookmate.\");\n    return;\n  }\n\n  if (listing.telegram_link) {\n    await sendMessage(chatId, \"This reading group already has a Telegram link set up!\");\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Try to create an invite link\n  let inviteLink = await createChatInviteLink(chatId);\n  if (!inviteLink) {\n    // Fallback: export the default invite link\n    inviteLink = await exportChatInviteLink(chatId);\n  }\n\n  if (!inviteLink) {\n    await sendMessage(\n      chatId,\n      \"I couldn't generate an invite link. Please make sure I have admin permissions in this group, \" +\n        \"then try again with /link\"\n    );\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Save to database\n  db.prepare(\n    \"UPDATE listings SET telegram_link = ?, telegram_chat_id = ? WHERE id = ?\"\n  ).run(inviteLink, chatId, listingId);\n\n  // Notify all members on Bookmate\n  const members = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n    .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];\n\n  const bookTitle = listing.book_title as string;\n  for (const member of members) {\n    createNotification(\n      member.user_id,\n      listingId,\n      \"telegram_ready\",\n      `The Telegram group for \"${bookTitle}\" is ready! Click to view the invite link.`\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Send confirmation to the Telegram group\n  // Escape book title to prevent HTML injection via Telegram's HTML parser\n  await sendMessage(\n    chatId,\n    `This group is now linked to the Bookmate reading group for \"<b>${escapeHtml(bookTitle)}</b>\".\\n\\n` +\n      `Invite link: ${inviteLink}\\n\\n` +\n      \"All group members have been notified on Bookmate. Happy reading!\"\n  );\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":166,"oldLines":7,"newStart":166,"newLines":33,"lines":["     const payload = text.replace(\"/start \", \"\").trim();","     const listingId = parseListingIdFromPayload(payload);","     if (listingId) {","-      await linkTelegramToListing(listingId, message.chat.id);","+      // Verify the sender is the listing author to prevent unauthorized linking","+      const telegramUserId = message.from?.id;","+      if (!telegramUserId) {","+        await sendMessage(message.chat.id, \"Could not identify the sender.\");","+        return;","+      }","+","+      const linkedUser = db","+        .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM telegram_user_links WHERE telegram_user_id = ?\")","+        .get(telegramUserId) as { user_id: number } | undefined;","+","+      if (linkedUser) {","+        const listing = db","+          .prepare(\"SELECT author_id FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")","+          .get(listingId) as { author_id: number } | undefined;","+","+        if (listing && listing.author_id === linkedUser.user_id) {","+          await linkTelegramToListing(listingId, message.chat.id);","+          return;","+        }","+      }","+","+      // If no linked user or not the author, store for later linking via /link command","+      await sendMessage(","+        message.chat.id,","+        \"To link this group to a Bookmate listing, the listing author should use the <code>/link</code> command.\"","+      );","       return;","     }","   }"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_017RHEmTfveDfkKo7zUVn6xf","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/profile/reading/route.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"71b3594c-3c92-4960-b469-8f6636094264","uuid":"6a1186a1-fe95-4c4d-9e5e-fb58c7eccf47","timestamp":"2026-03-24T00:22:59.525Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/profile/reading/route.ts","oldString":"interface ReadingRow {\n  id: number;\n  book_title: string;\n  book_author: string;\n  book_cover_url: string;\n  reading_pace: string;\n  start_date: string;\n  meeting_format: string;\n  is_full: number;\n  telegram_link: string;\n  member_count: number;\n  max_group_size: number;\n  author_name: string;\n  joined_at: string;\n}","newString":"interface ReadingRow {\n  id: number;\n  book_title: string;\n  book_author: string;\n  book_cover_url: string;\n  reading_pace: string;\n  start_date: string;\n  meeting_format: string;\n  is_full: number;\n  telegram_link: string;\n  discord_link: string;\n  member_count: number;\n  max_group_size: number;\n  author_name: string;\n  joined_at: string;\n}","originalFile":"import { NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n\ninterface ReadingRow {\n  id: number;\n  book_title: string;\n  book_author: string;\n  book_cover_url: string;\n  reading_pace: string;\n  start_date: string;\n  meeting_format: string;\n  is_full: number;\n  telegram_link: string;\n  member_count: number;\n  max_group_size: number;\n  author_name: string;\n  joined_at: string;\n}\n\nexport async function GET() {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  // Get all listings the user is a member of (including ones they authored)\n  const readings = db.prepare(`\n    SELECT\n      l.id,\n      l.book_title,\n      l.book_author,\n      l.book_cover_url,\n      l.reading_pace,\n      l.start_date,\n      l.meeting_format,\n      l.is_full,\n      l.telegram_link,\n      l.max_group_size,\n      u.display_name as author_name,\n      lm.joined_at,\n      (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = l.id) as member_count\n    FROM listing_members lm\n    JOIN listings l ON l.id = lm.listing_id\n    JOIN users u ON u.id = l.author_id\n    WHERE lm.user_id = ?\n    ORDER BY lm.joined_at DESC\n  `).all(session.userId) as ReadingRow[];\n\n  const today = new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n\n  // Reading history: completed groups (full + start_date in the past)\n  // Upcoming: not yet started and not full\n  // Active: everything else that has started or is full (but not completed)\n  const isHistory = (r: ReadingRow) => r.is_full === 1 && r.start_date < today;\n  const isUpcoming = (r: ReadingRow) => r.is_full === 0 && r.start_date > today;\n\n  const history = readings.filter(isHistory);\n  const upcoming = readings.filter(isUpcoming);\n  const active = readings.filter(\n    (r) => !isHistory(r) && !isUpcoming(r) && (r.is_full === 1 || r.start_date <= today)\n  );\n\n  return NextResponse.json({\n    active,\n    history,\n    upcoming,\n    total: readings.length,\n  });\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":12,"oldLines":6,"newStart":12,"newLines":7,"lines":["   meeting_format: string;","   is_full: number;","   telegram_link: string;","+  discord_link: string;","   member_count: number;","   max_group_size: number;","   author_name: string;"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_014fHHWQVd7K3CFdCDdZS2pV","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/profile/reading/route.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"71b3594c-3c92-4960-b469-8f6636094264","uuid":"df83b227-43e5-4003-a73b-7dd5852f5faf","timestamp":"2026-03-24T00:23:02.947Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/profile/reading/route.ts","oldString":"      l.telegram_link,\n      l.max_group_size,","newString":"      l.telegram_link,\n      l.discord_link,\n      l.max_group_size,","originalFile":"import { NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n\ninterface ReadingRow {\n  id: number;\n  book_title: string;\n  book_author: string;\n  book_cover_url: string;\n  reading_pace: string;\n  start_date: string;\n  meeting_format: string;\n  is_full: number;\n  telegram_link: string;\n  discord_link: string;\n  member_count: number;\n  max_group_size: number;\n  author_name: string;\n  joined_at: string;\n}\n\nexport async function GET() {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  // Get all listings the user is a member of (including ones they authored)\n  const readings = db.prepare(`\n    SELECT\n      l.id,\n      l.book_title,\n      l.book_author,\n      l.book_cover_url,\n      l.reading_pace,\n      l.start_date,\n      l.meeting_format,\n      l.is_full,\n      l.telegram_link,\n      l.max_group_size,\n      u.display_name as author_name,\n      lm.joined_at,\n      (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = l.id) as member_count\n    FROM listing_members lm\n    JOIN listings l ON l.id = lm.listing_id\n    JOIN users u ON u.id = l.author_id\n    WHERE lm.user_id = ?\n    ORDER BY lm.joined_at DESC\n  `).all(session.userId) as ReadingRow[];\n\n  const today = new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n\n  // Reading history: completed groups (full + start_date in the past)\n  // Upcoming: not yet started and not full\n  // Active: everything else that has started or is full (but not completed)\n  const isHistory = (r: ReadingRow) => r.is_full === 1 && r.start_date < today;\n  const isUpcoming = (r: ReadingRow) => r.is_full === 0 && r.start_date > today;\n\n  const history = readings.filter(isHistory);\n  const upcoming = readings.filter(isUpcoming);\n  const active = readings.filter(\n    (r) => !isHistory(r) && !isUpcoming(r) && (r.is_full === 1 || r.start_date <= today)\n  );\n\n  return NextResponse.json({\n    active,\n    history,\n    upcoming,\n    total: readings.length,\n  });\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":37,"oldLines":6,"newStart":37,"newLines":7,"lines":["       l.meeting_format,","       l.is_full,","       l.telegram_link,","+      l.discord_link,","       l.max_group_size,","       u.display_name as author_name,","       lm.joined_at,"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

method: \"POST\",\n   219→      body: { type: \"link\", guildId: \"guild-1\", listingId },\n   220→      headers: { \"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\": \"discord-webhook-secret\" },\n   221→    });\n   222→ expect(data).toHaveProperty(\"inviteLink\", \"https://discord.gg/abc123\");\n   227→\n   228→    // Verify DB was updated\n   229→    const listing = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT discord_link, { describe, it, expect, vi, beforeEach } from \"vitest\";\nimport { createTestRequest, parseResponse } from \"../../helpers/mock-request\";\n\nconst testDb = vi.hoisted(() => {\n  const Db = require(\"better-sqlite3\");\n  const db = new Db(\":memory:\");\n  db.pragma(\"journal_mode = WAL\");\n  db.pragma(\"foreign_keys = ON\");\n  db.exec(`\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      email TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,\n      password_hash TEXT NOT NULL,\n      display_name TEXT NOT NULL,\n      bio TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listings (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      author_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      book_title TEXT NOT NULL,\n      book_author TEXT NOT NULL,\n      book_cover_url TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      book_olid TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      language TEXT DEFAULT 'English',\n      reading_pace TEXT NOT NULL,\n      start_date TEXT NOT NULL,\n      meeting_format TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(meeting_format IN ('voice', 'text', 'mixed')),\n      max_group_size INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK(max_group_size >= 2 AND max_group_size <= 20),\n      telegram_link TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      is_full INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n      requires_approval INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n      platform_preference TEXT DEFAULT 'telegram',\n      discord_link TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      discord_channel_id TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      telegram_chat_id INTEGER,\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      FOREIGN KEY (author_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listing_members (\n      listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      joined_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      PRIMARY KEY (listing_id, user_id),\n      FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id),\n      FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS notifications (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      listing_id INTEGER,\n      type TEXT NOT NULL,\n      message TEXT NOT NULL,\n      is_read INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n  `);\n  return db;\n});\n\nconst mockDiscord = vi.hoisted(() => ({\n  createTextChannel: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue({ id: \"ch-123\", name: \"bookmate-test-book\" }),\n  createChannelInvite: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(\"https://discord.gg/abc123\"),\n  sendChannelMessage: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(true),\n}));\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/db\", () => ({ default: testDb }));\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/discord\", () => mockDiscord);\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/notifications\", () => ({\n  createNotification: vi.fn(),\n}));\n\nconst { POST } = await import(\"@/app/api/discord/webhook/route\");\n\nfunction insertUser(email = \"test@example.com\", name = \"Test User\") {\n  testDb\n    .prepare(\"INSERT INTO users (email, password_hash, display_name) VALUES (?, ?, ?)\")\n    .run(email, \"hash\", name);\n  return testDb.prepare(\"SELECT last_insert_rowid() as id\").get().id as number;\n}\n\nfunction insertListing(\n  authorId: number,\n  overrides: Partial<{\n    is_full: number;\n    discord_link: string;\n    book_title: string;\n  }> = {}\n) {\n  testDb\n    .prepare(\n      `INSERT INTO listings (author_id, book_title, book_author, reading_pace, start_date, meeting_format, max_group_size, is_full, discord_link)\n       VALUES (?, ?, 'Test Author', '1ch/wk', '2026-04-01', 'text', 5, ?, ?)`\n    )\n    .run(authorId, overrides.book_title ?? \"Test Book\", overrides.is_full ?? 0, overrides.discord_link ?? \"\");\n  return testDb.prepare(\"SELECT last_insert_rowid() as id\").get().id as number;\n}\n\nfunction addMember(listingId: number, userId: number) {\n  testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\").run(listingId, userId);\n}\n\ndescribe(\"POST /api/discord/webhook\", () => {\n  beforeEach(() => {\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listing_members\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM notifications\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listings\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM users\");\n    vi.stubEnv(\"DISCORD_WEBHOOK_SECRET\", \"discord-webhook-secret\");\n    mockDiscord.createTextChannel.mockResolvedValue({ id: \"ch-123\", name: \"bookmate-test-book\" });\n    mockDiscord.createChannelInvite.mockResolvedValue(\"https://discord.gg/abc123\");\n    mockDiscord.sendChannelMessage.mockResolvedValue(true);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 500 when webhook secret is not configured\", async () => {\n    vi.stubEnv(\"DISCORD_WEBHOOK_SECRET\", \"\");\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/discord/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { type: \"link\", guildId: \"g1\", listingId: 1 },\n      headers: { \"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\": \"anything\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(500);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 403 when secret header is wrong\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/discord/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { type: \"link\", guildId: \"g1\", listingId: 1 },\n      headers: { \"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\": \"wrong\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(403);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 for unknown event type\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/discord/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { type: \"unknown\" },\n      headers: { \"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\": \"discord-webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(400);\n  });\n\n  it(\"responds to Discord PING with PONG\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/discord/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { type: 1 },\n      headers: { \"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\": \"discord-webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n    expect(data).toEqual({ type: 1 });\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 when guildId or listingId missing for link type\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/discord/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { type: \"link\", guildId: \"\", listingId: 0 },\n      headers: { \"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\": \"discord-webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(400);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 404 when listing not found\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/discord/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { type: \"link\", guildId: \"guild-1\", listingId: 999 },\n      headers: { \"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\": \"discord-webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(404);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 when group is not full\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 0 });\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/discord/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { type: \"link\", guildId: \"guild-1\", listingId },\n      headers: { \"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\": \"discord-webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(400);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 when discord link already set\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1, discord_link: \"https://discord.gg/existing\" });\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/discord/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { type: \"link\", guildId: \"guild-1\", listingId },\n      headers: { \"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\": \"discord-webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(400);\n  });\n\n  it(\"creates channel and links successfully\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1 });\n    addMember(listingId, userId);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/discord/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { type: \"link\", guildId: \"guild-1\", listingId },\n      headers: { \"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\": \"discord-webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n    expect(data).toHaveProperty(\"ok\", true);\n    expect(data).toHaveProperty(\"inviteLink\", \"https://discord.gg/abc123\");\n\n    // Verify DB was updated\n    const listing = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT discord_link, discord_channel_id FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as {\n      discord_link: string;\n      discord_channel_id: string;\n    };\n    expect(listing.discord_link).toBe(\"https://discord.gg/abc123\");\n    expect(listing.discord_channel_id).toBe(\"ch-123\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"uses provided channelId instead of creating one\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1 });\n    addMember(listingId, userId);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/discord/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { type: \"link\", guildId: \"guild-1\", listingId, channelId: \"existing-ch\" },\n      headers: { \"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\": \"discord-webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n\n    // Should not have created a new channel\n    expect(mockDiscord.createTextChannel).not.toHaveBeenCalled();\n\n    // Should have created invite for the existing channel\n    expect(mockDiscord.createChannelInvite).toHaveBeenCalledWith(\"existing-ch\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 500 when channel creation fails\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1 });\n    mockDiscord.createTextChannel.mockResolvedValue(null);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/discord/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { type: \"link\", guildId: \"guild-1\", listingId },\n      headers: { \"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\": \"discord-webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(500);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 500 when invite creation fails\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1 });\n    mockDiscord.createChannelInvite.mockResolvedValue(null);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/discord/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { type: \"link\", guildId: \"guild-1\", listingId },\n      headers: { \"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\": \"discord-webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(500);\n  });\n});\n","numLines":288,"startLine":1,"totalLines":288}}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_015EveSJ9S5aM5vbyvhvF2Aw","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { describe, it, expect, vi, beforeEach } from \"vitest\";\n     2→import { createTestRequest, parseResponse } from \"../../helpers/mock-request\";\n     3→\n     4→const testDb = vi.hoisted(() => {\n     5→  const Db = require(\"better-sqlite3\");\n     6→  const db = new Db(\":memory:\");\n     7→  db.pragma(\"journal_mode = WAL\");\n     8→  db.pragma(\"foreign_keys = ON\");\n     9→  db.exec(`\n    10→    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (\n    11→      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n    12→      email TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,\n    13→      password_hash TEXT NOT NULL,\n    14→      display_name TEXT NOT NULL,\n    15→      bio TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    16→      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))\n    17→    );\n    18→    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listings (\n    19→      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n    20→      author_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    21→      book_title TEXT NOT NULL,\n    22→      book_author TEXT NOT NULL,\n    23→      book_cover_url TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    24→      book_olid TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    25→      language TEXT DEFAULT 'English',\n    26→      reading_pace TEXT NOT NULL,\n    27→      start_date TEXT NOT NULL,\n    28→      meeting_format TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(meeting_format IN ('voice', 'text', 'mixed')),\n    29→      max_group_size INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK(max_group_size >= 2 AND max_group_size <= 20),\n    30→      telegram_link TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    31→      is_full INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n    32→      requires_approval INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n    33→      platform_preference TEXT DEFAULT 'telegram',\n    34→      discord_link TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    35→      discord_channel_id TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    36→      telegram_chat_id INTEGER,\n    37→      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n    38→      FOREIGN KEY (author_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    39→    );\n    40→    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listing_members (\n    41→      listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    42→      user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    43→      joined_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n    44→      PRIMARY KEY (listing_id, user_id),\n    45→      FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id),\n    46→      FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    47→    );\n    48→    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS notifications (\n    49→      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n    50→      user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    51→      listing_id INTEGER,\n    52→      type TEXT NOT NULL,\n    53→      message TEXT NOT NULL,\n    54→      is_read INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n    55→      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n    56→      FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    57→    );\n    58→    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pending_telegram_groups (\n    59→      listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    60→      telegram_chat_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    61→      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n    62→      PRIMARY KEY (listing_id)\n    63→    );\n    64→    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS telegram_chats (\n    65→      chat_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,\n    66→      chat_title TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    67→      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))\n    68→    );\n    69→    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS telegram_user_links (\n    70→      user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    71→      telegram_user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    72→      PRIMARY KEY (user_id),\n    73→      FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    74→    );\n    75→  `);\n    76→  return db;\n    77→});\n    78→\n    79→const mockTelegram = vi.hoisted(() => ({\n    80→  createChatInviteLink: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(\"https://t.me/+invite123\"),\n    81→  exportChatInviteLink: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(null),\n    82→  sendMessage: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(true),\n    83→  parseListingIdFromPayload: vi.fn().mockImplementation((payload: string) => {\n    84→    const match = payload.match(/^listing_(\\d+)$/);\n    85→    return match ? parseInt(match[1], 10) : null;\n    86→  }),\n    87→}));\n    88→\n    89→vi.mock(\"@/lib/db\", () => ({ default: testDb }));\n    90→\n    91→vi.mock(\"@/lib/telegram\", () => mockTelegram);\n    92→\n    93→vi.mock(\"@/lib/notifications\", () => ({\n    94→  createNotification: vi.fn(),\n    95→}));\n    96→\n    97→const { POST } = await import(\"@/app/api/telegram/webhook/route\");\n    98→\n    99→function insertUser(email = \"test@example.com\", name = \"Test User\") {\n   100→  testDb\n   101→    .prepare(\"INSERT INTO users (email, password_hash, display_name) VALUES (?, ?, ?)\")\n   102→    .run(email, \"hash\", name);\n   103→  return testDb.prepare(\"SELECT last_insert_rowid() as id\").get().id as number;\n   104→}\n   105→\n   106→function insertListing(\n   107→  authorId: number,\n   108→  overrides: Partial<{\n   109→    is_full: number;\n   110→    telegram_link: string;\n   111→    book_title: string;\n   112→  }> = {}\n   113→) {\n   114→  testDb\n   115→    .prepare(\n   116→      `INSERT INTO listings (author_id, book_title, book_author, reading_pace, start_date, meeting_format, max_group_size, is_full, telegram_link)\n   117→       VALUES (?, ?, 'Test Author', '1ch/wk', '2026-04-01', 'text', 5, ?, ?)`\n   118→    )\n   119→    .run(authorId, overrides.book_title ?? \"Test Book\", overrides.is_full ?? 0, overrides.telegram_link ?? \"\");\n   120→  return testDb.prepare(\"SELECT last_insert_rowid() as id\").get().id as number;\n   121→}\n   122→\n   123→function addMember(listingId: number, userId: number) {\n   124→  testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\").run(listingId, userId);\n   125→}\n   126→\n   127→describe(\"POST /api/telegram/webhook\", () => {\n   128→  beforeEach(() => {\n   129→    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listing_members\");\n   130→    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM notifications\");\n   131→    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM pending_telegram_groups\");\n   132→    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM telegram_chats\");\n   133→    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM telegram_user_links\");\n   134→    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listings\");\n   135→    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM users\");\n   136→    vi.stubEnv(\"TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET\", \"webhook-secret\");\n   137→    mockTelegram.createChatInviteLink.mockResolvedValue(\"https://t.me/+invite123\");\n   138→    mockTelegram.exportChatInviteLink.mockResolvedValue(null);\n   139→    mockTelegram.sendMessage.mockResolvedValue(true);\n   140→  });\n   141→\n   142→  it(\"returns 500 when webhook secret is not configured\", async () => {\n   143→    vi.stubEnv(\"TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET\", \"\");\n   144→    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n   145→      method: \"POST\",\n   146→      body: {},\n   147→      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"anything\" },\n   148→    });\n   149→    const res = await POST(req);\n   150→    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n   151→    expect(status).toBe(500);\n   152→  });\n   153→\n   154→  it(\"returns 403 when secret header is wrong\", async () => {\n   155→    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n   156→      method: \"POST\",\n   157→      body: {},\n   158→      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"wrong-secret\" },\n   159→    });\n   160→    const res = await POST(req);\n   161→    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n   162→    expect(status).toBe(403);\n   163→  });\n   164→\n   165→  it(\"returns 200 for empty update (no action)\", async () => {\n   166→    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n   167→      method: \"POST\",\n   168→      body: { update_id: 1 },\n   169→      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"webhook-secret\" },\n   170→    });\n   171→    const res = await POST(req);\n   172→    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(res);\n   173→    expect(status).toBe(200);\n   174→    expect(data).toEqual({ ok: true });\n   175→  });\n   176→\n   177→  it(\"handles /start command with listing payload\", async () => {\n   178→    const userId = insertUser();\n   179→    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1 });\n   180→    addMember(listingId, userId);\n   181→\n   182→    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n   183→      method: \"POST\",\n   184→      body: {\n   185→        update_id: 2,\n   186→        message: {\n   187→          chat: { id: -100123, type: \"group\", title: \"Reading Group\" },\n   188→          text: `/start listing_${listingId}`,\n   189→          from: { id: 456 },\n   190→        },\n   191→      },\n   192→      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"webhook-secret\" },\n   193→    });\n   194→\n   195→    const res = await POST(req);\n   196→    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n   197→    expect(status).toBe(200);\n   198→\n   199→    // Verify telegram_link was set\n   200→    const listing = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT telegram_link FROM listings WHERE id { describe, it, expect, vi, beforeEach } from \"vitest\";\nimport { createTestRequest, parseResponse } from \"../../helpers/mock-request\";\n\nconst testDb = vi.hoisted(() => {\n  const Db = require(\"better-sqlite3\");\n  const db = new Db(\":memory:\");\n  db.pragma(\"journal_mode = WAL\");\n  db.pragma(\"foreign_keys = ON\");\n  db.exec(`\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      email TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,\n      password_hash TEXT NOT NULL,\n      display_name TEXT NOT NULL,\n      bio TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listings (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      author_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      book_title TEXT NOT NULL,\n      book_author TEXT NOT NULL,\n      book_cover_url TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      book_olid TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      language TEXT DEFAULT 'English',\n      reading_pace TEXT NOT NULL,\n      start_date TEXT NOT NULL,\n      meeting_format TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(meeting_format IN ('voice', 'text', 'mixed')),\n      max_group_size INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK(max_group_size >= 2 AND max_group_size <= 20),\n      telegram_link TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      is_full INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n      requires_approval INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n      platform_preference TEXT DEFAULT 'telegram',\n      discord_link TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      discord_channel_id TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      telegram_chat_id INTEGER,\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      FOREIGN KEY (author_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listing_members (\n      listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      joined_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      PRIMARY KEY (listing_id, user_id),\n      FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id),\n      FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS notifications (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      listing_id INTEGER,\n      type TEXT NOT NULL,\n      message TEXT NOT NULL,\n      is_read INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pending_telegram_groups (\n      listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      telegram_chat_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      PRIMARY KEY (listing_id)\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS telegram_chats (\n      chat_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,\n      chat_title TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS telegram_user_links (\n      user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      telegram_user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      PRIMARY KEY (user_id),\n      FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n  `);\n  return db;\n});\n\nconst mockTelegram = vi.hoisted(() => ({\n  createChatInviteLink: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(\"https://t.me/+invite123\"),\n  exportChatInviteLink: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(null),\n  sendMessage: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(true),\n  parseListingIdFromPayload: vi.fn().mockImplementation((payload: string) => {\n    const match = payload.match(/^listing_(\\d+)$/);\n    return match ? parseInt(match[1], 10) : null;\n  }),\n}));\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/db\", () => ({ default: testDb }));\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/telegram\", () => mockTelegram);\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/notifications\", () => ({\n  createNotification: vi.fn(),\n}));\n\nconst { POST } = await import(\"@/app/api/telegram/webhook/route\");\n\nfunction insertUser(email = \"test@example.com\", name = \"Test User\") {\n  testDb\n    .prepare(\"INSERT INTO users (email, password_hash, display_name) VALUES (?, ?, ?)\")\n    .run(email, \"hash\", name);\n  return testDb.prepare(\"SELECT last_insert_rowid() as id\").get().id as number;\n}\n\nfunction insertListing(\n  authorId: number,\n  overrides: Partial<{\n    is_full: number;\n    telegram_link: string;\n    book_title: string;\n  }> = {}\n) {\n  testDb\n    .prepare(\n      `INSERT INTO listings (author_id, book_title, book_author, reading_pace, start_date, meeting_format, max_group_size, is_full, telegram_link)\n       VALUES (?, ?, 'Test Author', '1ch/wk', '2026-04-01', 'text', 5, ?, ?)`\n    )\n    .run(authorId, overrides.book_title ?? \"Test Book\", overrides.is_full ?? 0, overrides.telegram_link ?? \"\");\n  return testDb.prepare(\"SELECT last_insert_rowid() as id\").get().id as number;\n}\n\nfunction addMember(listingId: number, userId: number) {\n  testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\").run(listingId, userId);\n}\n\ndescribe(\"POST /api/telegram/webhook\", () => {\n  beforeEach(() => {\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listing_members\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM notifications\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM pending_telegram_groups\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM telegram_chats\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM telegram_user_links\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listings\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM users\");\n    vi.stubEnv(\"TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET\", \"webhook-secret\");\n    mockTelegram.createChatInviteLink.mockResolvedValue(\"https://t.me/+invite123\");\n    mockTelegram.exportChatInviteLink.mockResolvedValue(null);\n    mockTelegram.sendMessage.mockResolvedValue(true);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 500 when webhook secret is not configured\", async () => {\n    vi.stubEnv(\"TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET\", \"\");\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: {},\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"anything\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(500);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 403 when secret header is wrong\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: {},\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"wrong-secret\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(403);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 200 for empty update (no action)\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { update_id: 1 },\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n    expect(data).toEqual({ ok: true });\n  });\n\n  it(\"handles /start command with listing payload\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1 });\n    addMember(listingId, userId);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: {\n        update_id: 2,\n        message: {\n          chat: { id: -100123, type: \"group\", title: \"Reading Group\" },\n          text: `/start listing_${listingId}`,\n          from: { id: 456 },\n        },\n      },\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n\n    // Verify telegram_link was set\n    const listing = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT telegram_link FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as { telegram_link: string };\n    expect(listing.telegram_link).toBe(\"https://t.me/+invite123\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"handles pending_telegram_groups mapping via my_chat_member\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1 });\n    addMember(listingId, userId);\n\n    // Insert pending mapping\n    testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO pending_telegram_groups (listing_id, telegram_chat_id) VALUES (?, ?)\").run(listingId, -100999);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: {\n        update_id: 3,\n        my_chat_member: {\n          chat: { id: -100999, type: \"group\", title: \"My Group\" },\n          from: { id: 789, first_name: \"Author\" },\n          new_chat_member: {\n            user: { id: 111, is_bot: true },\n            status: \"member\",\n          },\n        },\n      },\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n\n    // Verify listing was linked\n    const listing = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT telegram_link FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as { telegram_link: string };\n    expect(listing.telegram_link).toBe(\"https://t.me/+invite123\");\n\n    // Verify pending mapping was deleted\n    const pending = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT * FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE listing_id = ?\").get(listingId);\n    expect(pending).toBeUndefined();\n  });\n\n  it(\"ignores my_chat_member when bot is not added as member/admin\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: {\n        update_id: 4,\n        my_chat_member: {\n          chat: { id: -100123, type: \"group\" },\n          from: { id: 789, first_name: \"User\" },\n          new_chat_member: {\n            user: { id: 111, is_bot: true },\n            status: \"left\",\n          },\n        },\n      },\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n    // No crash, just silent ignore\n  });\n\n  it(\"handles /link command with linked user and single unlinked listing\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1 });\n    addMember(listingId, userId);\n\n    // Link telegram user\n    testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO telegram_user_links (user_id, telegram_user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\").run(userId, 456);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: {\n        update_id: 5,\n        message: {\n          chat: { id: -100555, type: \"group\" },\n          text: \"/link\",\n          from: { id: 456 },\n        },\n      },\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n\n    // Listing should be linked\n    const listing = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT telegram_link FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as { telegram_link: string };\n    expect(listing.telegram_link).toBe(\"https://t.me/+invite123\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"handles /link command from unlinked telegram user\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: {\n        update_id: 6,\n        message: {\n          chat: { id: -100555, type: \"group\" },\n          text: \"/link\",\n          from: { id: 999 },\n        },\n      },\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n    expect(mockTelegram.sendMessage).toHaveBeenCalledWith(\n      -100555,\n      expect.stringContaining(\"not linked\")\n    );\n  });\n\n  it(\"handles /link_ID command with verified ownership\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1 });\n    addMember(listingId, userId);\n    testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO telegram_user_links (user_id, telegram_user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\").run(userId, 456);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: {\n        update_id: 7,\n        message: {\n          chat: { id: -100666, type: \"group\" },\n          text: `/link_${listingId}`,\n          from: { id: 456 },\n        },\n      },\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n\n    const listing = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT telegram_link FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as { telegram_link: string };\n    expect(listing.telegram_link).toBe(\"https://t.me/+invite123\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"rejects /link_ID from non-author\", async () => {\n    const authorId = insertUser(\"author@test.com\", \"Author\");\n    const otherId = insertUser(\"other@test.com\", \"Other\");\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId, { is_full: 1 });\n    testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO telegram_user_links (user_id, telegram_user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\").run(otherId, 789);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: {\n        update_id: 8,\n        message: {\n          chat: { id: -100777, type: \"group\" },\n          text: `/link_${listingId}`,\n          from: { id: 789 },\n        },\n      },\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n    expect(mockTelegram.sendMessage).toHaveBeenCalledWith(\n      -100777,\n      expect.stringContaining(\"only link Telegram groups to your own\")\n    );\n  });\n\n  it(\"ignores non-group messages\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: {\n        update_id: 9,\n        message: {\n          chat: { id: 123, type: \"private\" },\n          text: \"/link\",\n          from: { id: 456 },\n        },\n      },\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n    // No action taken for private chats\n  });\n\n  it(\"uses fallback exportChatInviteLink when createChatInviteLink fails\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1 });\n    addMember(listingId, userId);\n\n    mockTelegram.createChatInviteLink.mockResolvedValue(null);\n    mockTelegram.exportChatInviteLink.mockResolvedValue(\"https://t.me/+fallback\");\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: {\n        update_id: 10,\n        message: {\n          chat: { id: -100888, type: \"supergroup\" },\n          text: `/start listing_${listingId}`,\n          from: { id: 456 },\n        },\n      },\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    expect(res.status).toBe(200);\n\n    const listing = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT telegram_link FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as { telegram_link: string };\n    expect(listing.telegram_link).toBe(\"https://t.me/+fallback\");\n  });\n});\n","numLines":420,"startLine":1,"totalLines":420}}}

\"guild-1\"","newString":"guildId: \"12345678901234567\"","originalFile":"import { describe, it, expect, vi, beforeEach } from \"vitest\";\nimport { createTestRequest, parseResponse } from \"../../helpers/mock-request\";\n\nconst testDb = vi.hoisted(() => {\n  const Db = require(\"better-sqlite3\");\n  const db = new Db(\":memory:\");\n  db.pragma(\"journal_mode = WAL\");\n  db.pragma(\"foreign_keys = ON\");\n  db.exec(`\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      email TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,\n      password_hash TEXT NOT NULL,\n      display_name TEXT NOT NULL,\n      bio TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listings (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      author_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      book_title TEXT NOT NULL,\n      book_author TEXT NOT NULL,\n      book_cover_url TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      book_olid TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      language TEXT DEFAULT 'English',\n      reading_pace TEXT NOT NULL,\n      start_date TEXT NOT NULL,\n      meeting_format TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(meeting_format IN ('voice', 'text', 'mixed')),\n      max_group_size INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK(max_group_size >= 2 AND max_group_size <= 20),\n      telegram_link TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      is_full INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n      requires_approval INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n      platform_preference TEXT DEFAULT 'telegram',\n      discord_link TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      discord_channel_id TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      telegram_chat_id INTEGER,\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      FOREIGN KEY (author_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listing_members (\n      listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      joined_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      PRIMARY KEY (listing_id, user_id),\n      FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id),\n      FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS notifications (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      listing_id INTEGER,\n      type TEXT NOT NULL,\n      message TEXT NOT NULL,\n      is_read INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n  `);\n  return db;\n});\n\nconst mockDiscord = vi.hoisted(() => ({\n  createTextChannel: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue({ id: \"ch-123\", name: \"bookmate-test-book\" }),\n  createChannelInvite: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(\"https://discord.gg/abc123\"),\n  sendChannelMessage: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(true),\n}));\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/db\", () => ({ default: testDb }));\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/discord\", () => mockDiscord);\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/notifications\", () => ({\n  createNotification: vi.fn(),\n}));\n\nconst { POST } = await import(\"@/app/api/discord/webhook/route\");\n\nfunction insertUser(email = \"test@example.com\", name = \"Test User\") {\n  testDb\n    .prepare(\"INSERT INTO users (email, password_hash, display_name) VALUES (?, ?, ?)\")\n    .run(email, \"hash\", name);\n  return testDb.prepare(\"SELECT last_insert_rowid() as id\").get().id as number;\n}\n\nfunction insertListing(\n  authorId: number,\n  overrides: Partial<{\n    is_full: number;\n    discord_link: string;\n    book_title: string;\n  }> = {}\n) {\n  testDb\n    .prepare(\n      `INSERT INTO listings (author_id, book_title, book_author, reading_pace, start_date, meeting_format, max_group_size, is_full, discord_link)\n       VALUES (?, ?, 'Test Author', '1ch/wk', '2026-04-01', 'text', 5, ?, ?)`\n    )\n    .run(authorId, overrides.book_title ?? \"Test Book\", overrides.is_full ?? 0, overrides.discord_link ?? \"\");\n  return testDb.prepare(\"SELECT last_insert_rowid() as id\").get().id as number;\n}\n\nfunction addMember(listingId: number, userId: number) {\n  testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\").run(listingId, userId);\n}\n\ndescribe(\"POST /api/discord/webhook\", () => {\n  beforeEach(() => {\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listing_members\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM notifications\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listings\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM users\");\n    vi.stubEnv(\"DISCORD_WEBHOOK_SECRET\", \"discord-webhook-secret\");\n    mockDiscord.createTextChannel.mockResolvedValue({ id: \"ch-123\", name: \"bookmate-test-book\" });\n    mockDiscord.createChannelInvite.mockResolvedValue(\"https://discord.gg/abc123\");\n    mockDiscord.sendChannelMessage.mockResolvedValue(true);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 500 when webhook secret is not configured\", async () => {\n    vi.stubEnv(\"DISCORD_WEBHOOK_SECRET\", \"\");\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/discord/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { type: \"link\", guildId: \"g1\", listingId: 1 },\n      headers: { \"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\": \"anything\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(500);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 403 when secret header is wrong\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/discord/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { type: \"link\", guildId: \"g1\", listingId: 1 },\n      headers: { \"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\": \"wrong\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(403);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 for unknown event type\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/discord/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { type: \"unknown\" },\n      headers: { \"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\": \"discord-webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(400);\n  });\n\n  it(\"responds to Discord PING with PONG\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/discord/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { type: 1 },\n      headers: { \"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\": \"discord-webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n    expect(data).toEqual({ type: 1 });\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 when guildId or listingId missing for link type\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/discord/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { type: \"link\", guildId: \"\", listingId: 0 },\n      headers: { \"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\": \"discord-webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(400);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 404 when listing not found\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/discord/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { type: \"link\", guildId: \"guild-1\", listingId: 999 },\n      headers: { \"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\": \"discord-webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(404);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 when group is not full\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 0 });\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/discord/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { type: \"link\", guildId: \"guild-1\", listingId },\n      headers: { \"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\": \"discord-webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(400);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 when discord link already set\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1, discord_link: \"https://discord.gg/existing\" });\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/discord/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { type: \"link\", guildId: \"guild-1\", listingId },\n      headers: { \"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\": \"discord-webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(400);\n  });\n\n  it(\"creates channel and links successfully\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1 });\n    addMember(listingId, userId);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/discord/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { type: \"link\", guildId: \"guild-1\", listingId },\n      headers: { \"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\": \"discord-webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n    expect(data).toHaveProperty(\"ok\", true);\n    expect(data).toHaveProperty(\"inviteLink\", \"https://discord.gg/abc123\");\n\n    // Verify DB was updated\n    const listing = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT discord_link, discord_channel_id FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as {\n      discord_link: string;\n      discord_channel_id: string;\n    };\n    expect(listing.discord_link).toBe(\"https://discord.gg/abc123\");\n    expect(listing.discord_channel_id).toBe(\"ch-123\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"uses provided channelId instead of creating one\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1 });\n    addMember(listingId, userId);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/discord/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { type: \"link\", guildId: \"guild-1\", listingId, channelId: \"existing-ch\" },\n      headers: { \"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\": \"discord-webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n\n    // Should not have created a new channel\n    expect(mockDiscord.createTextChannel).not.toHaveBeenCalled();\n\n    // Should have created invite for the existing channel\n    expect(mockDiscord.createChannelInvite).toHaveBeenCalledWith(\"existing-ch\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 500 when channel creation fails\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1 });\n    mockDiscord.createTextChannel.mockResolvedValue(null);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/discord/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { type: \"link\", guildId: \"guild-1\", listingId },\n      headers: { \"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\": \"discord-webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(500);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 500 when invite creation fails\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1 });\n    mockDiscord.createChannelInvite.mockResolvedValue(null);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/discord/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { type: \"link\", guildId: \"guild-1\", listingId },\n      headers: { \"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\": \"discord-webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(500);\n  });\n});\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":175,"oldLines":7,"newStart":175,"newLines":7,"lines":["   it(\"returns 404 when listing not found\", async () => {","     const req =
