{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01WQDfhG8va8LfjHtMAtJ6fv","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/__tests__/api/discord/discord-webhook.test.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"71b3594c-3c92-4960-b469-8f6636094264","uuid":"ac2e634d-dedb-4dfe-a81c-15465f6389f3","timestamp":"2026-03-24T00:23:41.142Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/__tests__/api/discord/discord-webhook.test.ts","oldString":"channelId: \"existing-ch\"","newString":"channelId: \"98765432109876543\"","originalFile":"import { describe, it, expect, vi, beforeEach } from \"vitest\";\nimport { createTestRequest, parseResponse } from \"../../helpers/mock-request\";\n\nconst testDb = vi.hoisted(() => {\n  const Db = require(\"better-sqlite3\");\n  const db = new Db(\":memory:\");\n  db.pragma(\"journal_mode = WAL\");\n  db.pragma(\"foreign_keys = ON\");\n  db.exec(`\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      email TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,\n      password_hash TEXT NOT NULL,\n      display_name TEXT NOT NULL,\n      bio TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listings (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      author_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      book_title TEXT NOT NULL,\n      book_author TEXT NOT NULL,\n      book_cover_url TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      book_olid TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      language TEXT DEFAULT 'English',\n      reading_pace TEXT NOT NULL,\n      start_date TEXT NOT NULL,\n      meeting_format TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(meeting_format IN ('voice', 'text', 'mixed')),\n      max_group_size INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK(max_group_size >= 2 AND max_group_size <= 20),\n      telegram_link TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      is_full INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n      requires_approval INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n      platform_preference TEXT DEFAULT 'telegram',\n      discord_link TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      discord_channel_id TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      telegram_chat_id INTEGER,\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      FOREIGN KEY (author_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listing_members (\n      listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      joined_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      PRIMARY KEY (listing_id, user_id),\n      FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id),\n      FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS notifications (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      listing_id INTEGER,\n      type TEXT NOT NULL,\n      message TEXT NOT NULL,\n      is_read INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n  `);\n  return db;\n});\n\nconst mockDiscord = vi.hoisted(() => ({\n  createTextChannel: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue({ id: \"ch-123\", name: \"bookmate-test-book\" }),\n  createChannelInvite: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(\"https://discord.gg/abc123\"),\n  sendChannelMessage: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(true),\n}));\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/db\", () => ({ default: testDb }));\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/discord\", () => mockDiscord);\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/notifications\", () => ({\n  createNotification: vi.fn(),\n}));\n\nconst { POST } = await import(\"@/app/api/discord/webhook/route\");\n\nfunction insertUser(email = \"test@example.com\", name = \"Test User\") {\n  testDb\n    .prepare(\"INSERT INTO users (email, password_hash, display_name) VALUES (?, ?, ?)\")\n    .run(email, \"hash\", name);\n  return testDb.prepare(\"SELECT last_insert_rowid() as id\").get().id as number;\n}\n\nfunction insertListing(\n  authorId: number,\n  overrides: Partial<{\n    is_full: number;\n    discord_link: string;\n    book_title: string;\n  }> = {}\n) {\n  testDb\n    .prepare(\n      `INSERT INTO listings (author_id, book_title, book_author, reading_pace, start_date, meeting_format, max_group_size, is_full, discord_link)\n       VALUES (?, ?, 'Test Author', '1ch/wk', '2026-04-01', 'text', 5, ?, ?)`\n    )\n    .run(authorId, overrides.book_title ?? \"Test Book\", overrides.is_full ?? 0, overrides.discord_link ?? \"\");\n  return testDb.prepare(\"SELECT last_insert_rowid() as id\").get().id as number;\n}\n\nfunction addMember(listingId: number, userId: number) {\n  testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\").run(listingId, userId);\n}\n\ndescribe(\"POST /api/discord/webhook\", () => {\n  beforeEach(() => {\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listing_members\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM notifications\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listings\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM users\");\n    vi.stubEnv(\"DISCORD_WEBHOOK_SECRET\", \"discord-webhook-secret\");\n    mockDiscord.createTextChannel.mockResolvedValue({ id: \"ch-123\", name: \"bookmate-test-book\" });\n    mockDiscord.createChannelInvite.mockResolvedValue(\"https://discord.gg/abc123\");\n    mockDiscord.sendChannelMessage.mockResolvedValue(true);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 500 when webhook secret is not configured\", async () => {\n    vi.stubEnv(\"DISCORD_WEBHOOK_SECRET\", \"\");\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/discord/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { type: \"link\", guildId: \"g1\", listingId: 1 },\n      headers: { \"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\": \"anything\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(500);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 403 when secret header is wrong\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/discord/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { type: \"link\", guildId: \"g1\", listingId: 1 },\n      headers: { \"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\": \"wrong\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(403);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 for unknown event type\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/discord/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { type: \"unknown\" },\n      headers: { \"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\": \"discord-webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(400);\n  });\n\n  it(\"responds to Discord PING with PONG\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/discord/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { type: 1 },\n      headers: { \"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\": \"discord-webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n    expect(data).toEqual({ type: 1 });\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 when guildId or listingId missing for link type\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/discord/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { type: \"link\", guildId: \"\", listingId: 0 },\n      headers: { \"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\": \"discord-webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(400);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 404 when listing not found\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/discord/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { type: \"link\", guildId: \"12345678901234567\", listingId: 999 },\n      headers: { \"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\": \"discord-webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(404);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 when group is not full\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 0 });\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/discord/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { type: \"link\", guildId: \"12345678901234567\", listingId },\n      headers: { \"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\": \"discord-webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(400);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 when discord link already set\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1, discord_link: \"https://discord.gg/existing\" });\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/discord/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { type: \"link\", guildId: \"12345678901234567\", listingId },\n      headers: { \"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\": \"discord-webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(400);\n  });\n\n  it(\"creates channel and links successfully\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1 });\n    addMember(listingId, userId);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/discord/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { type: \"link\", guildId: \"12345678901234567\", listingId },\n      headers: { \"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\": \"discord-webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n    expect(data).toHaveProperty(\"ok\", true);\n    expect(data).toHaveProperty(\"inviteLink\", \"https://discord.gg/abc123\");\n\n    // Verify DB was updated\n    const listing = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT discord_link, discord_channel_id FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as {\n      discord_link: string;\n      discord_channel_id: string;\n    };\n    expect(listing.discord_link).toBe(\"https://discord.gg/abc123\");\n    expect(listing.discord_channel_id).toBe(\"ch-123\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"uses provided channelId instead of creating one\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1 });\n    addMember(listingId, userId);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/discord/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { type: \"link\", guildId: \"12345678901234567\", listingId, channelId: \"existing-ch\" },\n      headers: { \"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\": \"discord-webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n\n    // Should not have created a new channel\n    expect(mockDiscord.createTextChannel).not.toHaveBeenCalled();\n\n    // Should have created invite for the existing channel\n    expect(mockDiscord.createChannelInvite).toHaveBeenCalledWith(\"existing-ch\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 500 when channel creation fails\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1 });\n    mockDiscord.createTextChannel.mockResolvedValue(null);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/discord/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { type: \"link\", guildId: \"12345678901234567\", listingId },\n      headers: { \"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\": \"discord-webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(500);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 500 when invite creation fails\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1 });\n    mockDiscord.createChannelInvite.mockResolvedValue(null);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/discord/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { type: \"link\", guildId: \"12345678901234567\", listingId },\n      headers: { \"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\": \"discord-webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(500);\n  });\n});\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":241,"oldLines":7,"newStart":241,"newLines":7,"lines":[" ","     const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/discord/webhook\", {","       method: \"POST\",","-      body: { type: \"link\", guildId: \"12345678901234567\", listingId, channelId: \"existing-ch\" },","+      body: { type: \"link\", guildId: \"12345678901234567\", listingId, channelId: \"98765432109876543\" },","       headers: { \"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\": \"discord-webhook-secret\" },","     });","     const res = await POST(req);"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

   expect(mockDiscord.createChannelInvite).toHaveBeenCalledWith(\"existing-ch\");","newString":"    expect(mockDiscord.createChannelInvite).toHaveBeenCalledWith(\"98765432109876543\");","originalFile":"import { describe, it, expect, vi, beforeEach } from \"vitest\";\nimport { createTestRequest, parseResponse } from \"../../helpers/mock-request\";\n\nconst testDb = vi.hoisted(() => {\n  const Db = require(\"better-sqlite3\");\n  const db = new Db(\":memory:\");\n  db.pragma(\"journal_mode = WAL\");\n  db.pragma(\"foreign_keys = ON\");\n  db.exec(`\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      email TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,\n      password_hash TEXT NOT NULL,\n      display_name TEXT NOT NULL,\n      bio TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listings (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      author_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      book_title TEXT NOT NULL,\n      book_author TEXT NOT NULL,\n      book_cover_url TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      book_olid TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      language TEXT DEFAULT 'English',\n      reading_pace TEXT NOT NULL,\n      start_date TEXT NOT NULL,\n      meeting_format TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(meeting_format IN ('voice', 'text', 'mixed')),\n      max_group_size INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK(max_group_size >= 2 AND max_group_size <= 20),\n      telegram_link TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      is_full INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n      requires_approval INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n      platform_preference TEXT DEFAULT 'telegram',\n      discord_link TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      discord_channel_id TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      telegram_chat_id INTEGER,\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      FOREIGN KEY (author_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listing_members (\n      listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      joined_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      PRIMARY KEY (listing_id, user_id),\n      FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id),\n      FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS notifications (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      listing_id INTEGER,\n      type TEXT NOT NULL,\n      message TEXT NOT NULL,\n      is_read INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n  `);\n  return db;\n});\n\nconst mockDiscord = vi.hoisted(() => ({\n  createTextChannel: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue({ id: \"ch-123\", name: \"bookmate-test-book\" }),\n  createChannelInvite: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(\"https://discord.gg/abc123\"),\n  sendChannelMessage: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(true),\n}));\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/db\", () => ({ default: testDb }));\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/discord\", () => mockDiscord);\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/notifications\", () => ({\n  createNotification: vi.fn(),\n}));\n\nconst { POST } = await import(\"@/app/api/discord/webhook/route\");\n\nfunction insertUser(email = \"test@example.com\", name = \"Test User\") {\n  testDb\n    .prepare(\"INSERT INTO users (email, password_hash, display_name) VALUES (?, ?, ?)\")\n    .run(email, \"hash\", name);\n  return testDb.prepare(\"SELECT last_insert_rowid() as id\").get().id as number;\n}\n\nfunction insertListing(\n  authorId: number,\n  overrides: Partial<{\n    is_full: number;\n    discord_link: string;\n    book_title: string;\n  }> = {}\n) {\n  testDb\n    .prepare(\n      `INSERT INTO listings (author_id, book_title, book_author, reading_pace, start_date, meeting_format, max_group_size, is_full, discord_link)\n       VALUES (?, ?, 'Test Author', '1ch/wk', '2026-04-01', 'text', 5, ?, ?)`\n    )\n    .run(authorId, overrides.book_title ?? \"Test Book\", overrides.is_full ?? 0, overrides.discord_link ?? \"\");\n  return testDb.prepare(\"SELECT last_insert_rowid() as id\").get().id as number;\n}\n\nfunction addMember(listingId: number, userId: number) {\n  testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\").run(listingId, userId);\n}\n\ndescribe(\"POST /api/discord/webhook\", () => {\n  beforeEach(() => {\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listing_members\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM notifications\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listings\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM users\");\n    vi.stubEnv(\"DISCORD_WEBHOOK_SECRET\", \"discord-webhook-secret\");\n    mockDiscord.createTextChannel.mockResolvedValue({ id: \"ch-123\", name: \"bookmate-test-book\" });\n    mockDiscord.createChannelInvite.mockResolvedValue(\"https://discord.gg/abc123\");\n    mockDiscord.sendChannelMessage.mockResolvedValue(true);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 500 when webhook secret is not configured\", async () => {\n    vi.stubEnv(\"DISCORD_WEBHOOK_SECRET\", \"\");\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/discord/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { type: \"link\", guildId: \"g1\", listingId: 1 },\n      headers: { \"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\": \"anything\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(500);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 403 when secret header is wrong\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/discord/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { type: \"link\", guildId: \"g1\", listingId: 1 },\n      headers: { \"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\": \"wrong\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(403);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 for unknown event type\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/discord/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { type: \"unknown\" },\n      headers: { \"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\": \"discord-webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(400);\n  });\n\n  it(\"responds to Discord PING with PONG\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/discord/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { type: 1 },\n      headers: { \"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\": \"discord-webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n    expect(data).toEqual({ type: 1 });\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 when guildId or listingId missing for link type\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/discord/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { type: \"link\", guildId: \"\", listingId: 0 },\n      headers: { \"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\": \"discord-webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(400);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 404 when listing not found\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/discord/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { type: \"link\", guildId: \"12345678901234567\", listingId: 999 },\n      headers: { \"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\": \"discord-webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(404);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 when group is not full\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 0 });\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/discord/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { type: \"link\", guildId: \"12345678901234567\", listingId },\n      headers: { \"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\": \"discord-webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(400);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 when discord link already set\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1, discord_link: \"https://discord.gg/existing\" });\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/discord/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { type: \"link\", guildId: \"12345678901234567\", listingId },\n      headers: { \"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\": \"discord-webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(400);\n  });\n\n  it(\"creates channel and links successfully\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1 });\n    addMember(listingId, userId);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/discord/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { type: \"link\", guildId: \"12345678901234567\", listingId },\n      headers: { \"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\": \"discord-webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n    expect(data).toHaveProperty(\"ok\", true);\n    expect(data).toHaveProperty(\"inviteLink\", \"https://discord.gg/abc123\");\n\n    // Verify DB was updated\n    const listing = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT discord_link, discord_channel_id FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as {\n      discord_link: string;\n      discord_channel_id: string;\n    };\n    expect(listing.discord_link).toBe(\"https://discord.gg/abc123\");\n    expect(listing.discord_channel_id).toBe(\"ch-123\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"uses provided channelId instead of creating one\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1 });\n    addMember(listingId, userId);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/discord/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { type: \"link\", guildId: \"12345678901234567\", listingId, channelId: \"98765432109876543\" },\n      headers: { \"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\": \"discord-webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n\n    // Should not have created a new channel\n    expect(mockDiscord.createTextChannel).not.toHaveBeenCalled();\n\n    // Should have created invite for the existing channel\n    expect(mockDiscord.createChannelInvite).toHaveBeenCalledWith(\"existing-ch\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 500 when channel creation fails\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1 });\n    mockDiscord.createTextChannel.mockResolvedValue(null);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/discord/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { type: \"link\", guildId: \"12345678901234567\", listingId },\n      headers: { \"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\": \"discord-webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(500);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 500 when invite creation fails\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1 });\n    mockDiscord.createChannelInvite.mockResolvedValue(null);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/discord/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { type: \"link\", guildId: \"12345678901234567\", listingId },\n      headers: { \"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\": \"discord-webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(500);\n  });\n});\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":252,"oldLines":7,"newStart":252,"newLines":7,"lines":["     expect(mockDiscord.createTextChannel).not.toHaveBeenCalled();"," ","     // Should have created invite for the existing channel","-    expect(mockDiscord.createChannelInvite).toHaveBeenCalledWith(\"existing-ch\");","+    expect(mockDiscord.createChannelInvite).toHaveBeenCalledWith(\"98765432109876543\");","   });"," "," vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(\"https://discord.gg/abc123\"),\n  sendChannelMessage: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(true),\n}));","newString":"const mockDiscord = vi.hoisted(() => ({\n  createTextChannel: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue({ id: \"ch-123\", name: \"bookmate-test-book\" }),\n  createChannelInvite: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(\"https://discord.gg/abc123\"),\n  sendChannelMessage: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(true),\n  isValidSnowflake: vi.fn().mockImplementation((id: string) => /^\\d{17,20}$/.test(id)),\n}));","originalFile":"import { describe, it, expect, vi, beforeEach } from \"vitest\";\nimport { createTestRequest, parseResponse } from \"../../helpers/mock-request\";\n\nconst testDb = vi.hoisted(() => {\n  const Db = require(\"better-sqlite3\");\n  const db = new Db(\":memory:\");\n  db.pragma(\"journal_mode = WAL\");\n  db.pragma(\"foreign_keys = ON\");\n  db.exec(`\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      email TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,\n      password_hash TEXT NOT NULL,\n      display_name TEXT NOT NULL,\n      bio TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listings (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      author_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      book_title TEXT NOT NULL,\n      book_author TEXT NOT NULL,\n      book_cover_url TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      book_olid TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      language TEXT DEFAULT 'English',\n      reading_pace TEXT NOT NULL,\n      start_date TEXT NOT NULL,\n      meeting_format TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(meeting_format IN ('voice', 'text', 'mixed')),\n      max_group_size INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK(max_group_size >= 2 AND max_group_size <= 20),\n      telegram_link TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      is_full INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n      requires_approval INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n      platform_preference TEXT DEFAULT 'telegram',\n      discord_link TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      discord_channel_id TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      telegram_chat_id INTEGER,\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      FOREIGN KEY (author_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listing_members (\n      listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      joined_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      PRIMARY KEY (listing_id, user_id),\n      FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id),\n      FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS notifications (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      listing_id INTEGER,\n      type TEXT NOT NULL,\n      message TEXT NOT NULL,\n      is_read INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n  `);\n  return db;\n});\n\nconst mockDiscord = vi.hoisted(() => ({\n  createTextChannel: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue({ id: \"ch-123\", name: \"bookmate-test-book\" }),\n  createChannelInvite: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(\"https://discord.gg/abc123\"),\n  sendChannelMessage: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(true),\n}));\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/db\", () => ({ default: testDb }));\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/discord\", () => mockDiscord);\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/notifications\", () => ({\n  createNotification: vi.fn(),\n}));\n\nconst { POST } = await import(\"@/app/api/discord/webhook/route\");\n\nfunction insertUser(email = \"test@example.com\", name = \"Test User\") {\n  testDb\n    .prepare(\"INSERT INTO users (email, password_hash, display_name) VALUES (?, ?, ?)\")\n    .run(email, \"hash\", name);\n  return testDb.prepare(\"SELECT last_insert_rowid() as id\").get().id as number;\n}\n\nfunction insertListing(\n  authorId: number,\n  overrides: Partial<{\n    is_full: number;\n    discord_link: string;\n    book_title: string;\n  }> = {}\n) {\n  testDb\n    .prepare(\n      `INSERT INTO listings (author_id, book_title, book_author, reading_pace, start_date, meeting_format, max_group_size, is_full, discord_link)\n       VALUES (?, ?, 'Test Author', '1ch/wk', '2026-04-01', 'text', 5, ?, ?)`\n    )\n    .run(authorId, overrides.book_title ?? \"Test Book\", overrides.is_full ?? 0, overrides.discord_link ?? \"\");\n  return testDb.prepare(\"SELECT last_insert_rowid() as id\").get().id as number;\n}\n\nfunction addMember(listingId: number, userId: number) {\n  testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\").run(listingId, userId);\n}\n\ndescribe(\"POST /api/discord/webhook\", () => {\n  beforeEach(() => {\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listing_members\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM notifications\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listings\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM users\");\n    vi.stubEnv(\"DISCORD_WEBHOOK_SECRET\", \"discord-webhook-secret\");\n    mockDiscord.createTextChannel.mockResolvedValue({ id: \"ch-123\", name: \"bookmate-test-book\" });\n    mockDiscord.createChannelInvite.mockResolvedValue(\"https://discord.gg/abc123\");\n    mockDiscord.sendChannelMessage.mockResolvedValue(true);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 500 when webhook secret is not configured\", async () => {\n    vi.stubEnv(\"DISCORD_WEBHOOK_SECRET\", \"\");\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/discord/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { type: \"link\", guildId: \"g1\", listingId: 1 },\n      headers: { \"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\": \"anything\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(500);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 403 when secret header is wrong\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/discord/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { type: \"link\", guildId: \"g1\", listingId: 1 },\n      headers: { \"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\": \"wrong\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(403);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 for unknown event type\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/discord/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { type: \"unknown\" },\n      headers: { \"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\": \"discord-webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(400);\n  });\n\n  it(\"responds to Discord PING with PONG\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/discord/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { type: 1 },\n      headers: { \"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\": \"discord-webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n    expect(data).toEqual({ type: 1 });\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 when guildId or listingId missing for link type\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/discord/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { type: \"link\", guildId: \"\", listingId: 0 },\n      headers: { \"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\": \"discord-webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(400);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 404 when listing not found\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/discord/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { type: \"link\", guildId: \"12345678901234567\", listingId: 999 },\n      headers: { \"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\": \"discord-webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(404);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 when group is not full\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 0 });\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/discord/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { type: \"link\", guildId: \"12345678901234567\", listingId },\n      headers: { \"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\": \"discord-webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(400);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 when discord link already set\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1, discord_link: \"https://discord.gg/existing\" });\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/discord/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { type: \"link\", guildId: \"12345678901234567\", listingId },\n      headers: { \"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\": \"discord-webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(400);\n  });\n\n  it(\"creates channel and links successfully\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1 });\n    addMember(listingId, userId);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/discord/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { type: \"link\", guildId: \"12345678901234567\", listingId },\n      headers: { \"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\": \"discord-webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n    expect(data).toHaveProperty(\"ok\", true);\n    expect(data).toHaveProperty(\"inviteLink\", \"https://discord.gg/abc123\");\n\n    // Verify DB was updated\n    const listing = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT discord_link, discord_channel_id FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as {\n      discord_link: string;\n      discord_channel_id: string;\n    };\n    expect(listing.discord_link).toBe(\"https://discord.gg/abc123\");\n    expect(listing.discord_channel_id).toBe(\"ch-123\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"uses provided channelId instead of creating one\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1 });\n    addMember(listingId, userId);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/discord/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { type: \"link\", guildId: \"12345678901234567\", listingId, channelId: \"98765432109876543\" },\n      headers: { \"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\": \"discord-webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n\n    // Should not have created a new channel\n    expect(mockDiscord.createTextChannel).not.toHaveBeenCalled();\n\n    // Should have created invite for the existing channel\n    expect(mockDiscord.createChannelInvite).toHaveBeenCalledWith(\"98765432109876543\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 500 when channel creation fails\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1 });\n    mockDiscord.createTextChannel.mockResolvedValue(null);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/discord/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { type: \"link\", guildId: \"12345678901234567\", listingId },\n      headers: { \"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\": \"discord-webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(500);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 500 when invite creation fails\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1 });\n    mockDiscord.createChannelInvite.mockResolvedValue(null);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/discord/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { type: \"link\", guildId: \"12345678901234567\", listingId },\n      headers: { \"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\": \"discord-webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(500);\n  });\n});\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":63,"oldLines":6,"newStart":63,"newLines":7,"lines":["   createTextChannel: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue({ id: \"ch-123\", name: \"bookmate-test-book\" }),","   createChannelInvite: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(\"https://discord.gg/abc123\"),","   sendChannelMessage: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(true),","+  isValidSnowflake: vi.fn().mockImplementation((id: string) => /^\\d{17,20}$/.test(id)),"," }));"," "," vi.mock(\"@/lib/db\", () => ({ default: testDb }));"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01RreQcjF472hNCRGHoSAGPq","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_015UoMgvd94acu184CksK1jn","name":"Edit","input":{"replace_all":false,"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/__tests__/api/telegram/telegram-webhook.test.ts","old_string":"const mockTelegram = vi.hoisted(() => ({\n  createChatInviteLink: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(\"https://t.me/+invite123\"),\n  exportChatInviteLink: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(null),\n  sendMessage: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(true),\n  parseListingIdFromPayload: vi.fn().mockImplementation((payload: string) => {\n    const match = payload.match(/^listing_(\\d+)$/);\n    return match ? parseInt(match[1], 10) : null;\n  }),\n}));","new_string":"const mockTelegram = vi.hoisted(() => ({\n  createChatInviteLink: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(\"https://t.me/+invite123\"),\n  exportChatInviteLink: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(null),\n  sendMessage: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(true),\n  parseListingIdFromPayload: vi.fn().mockImplementation((payload: string) => {\n    const match = payload.match(/^listing_(\\d+)$/);\n    return match ? parseInt(match[1], 10) : null;\n  }),\n  escapeHtml: vi.fn().mockImplementation((text: string) =>\n    text.replace(/&/g, \"&amp;\").replace(/</g, \"&lt;\").replace(/>/g, \"&gt;\").replace(/\"/g, \"&quot;\")\n  ),\n}));"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":421,"cache_read_input_tokens":64452,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":421},"output_tokens":2,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"71b3594c-3c92-4960-b469-8f6636094264","uuid":"6646d9a8-3cd3-4f86-b5af-b46c33fdf6a9"}

mockTelegram = vi.hoisted(() => ({\n  createChatInviteLink: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(\"https://t.me/+invite123\"),\n  exportChatInviteLink: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(null),\n  sendMessage: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(true),\n  parseListingIdFromPayload: vi.fn().mockImplementation((payload: string) => {\n    const match = payload.match(/^listing_(\\d+)$/);\n    return match ? parseInt(match[1], 10) : null;\n  }),\n}));","newString":"const mockTelegram = vi.hoisted(() => ({\n  createChatInviteLink: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(\"https://t.me/+invite123\"),\n  exportChatInviteLink: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(null),\n  sendMessage: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(true),\n  parseListingIdFromPayload: vi.fn().mockImplementation((payload: string) => {\n    const match = payload.match(/^listing_(\\d+)$/);\n    return match ? parseInt(match[1], 10) : null;\n  }),\n  escapeHtml: vi.fn().mockImplementation((text: string) =>\n    text.replace(/&/g, \"&amp;\").replace(/</g, \"&lt;\").replace(/>/g, \"&gt;\").replace(/\"/g, \"&quot;\")\n  ),\n}));","originalFile":"import { describe, it, expect, vi, beforeEach } from \"vitest\";\nimport { createTestRequest, parseResponse } from \"../../helpers/mock-request\";\n\nconst testDb = vi.hoisted(() => {\n  const Db = require(\"better-sqlite3\");\n  const db = new Db(\":memory:\");\n  db.pragma(\"journal_mode = WAL\");\n  db.pragma(\"foreign_keys = ON\");\n  db.exec(`\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      email TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,\n      password_hash TEXT NOT NULL,\n      display_name TEXT NOT NULL,\n      bio TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listings (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      author_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      book_title TEXT NOT NULL,\n      book_author TEXT NOT NULL,\n      book_cover_url TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      book_olid TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      language TEXT DEFAULT 'English',\n      reading_pace TEXT NOT NULL,\n      start_date TEXT NOT NULL,\n      meeting_format TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(meeting_format IN ('voice', 'text', 'mixed')),\n      max_group_size INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK(max_group_size >= 2 AND max_group_size <= 20),\n      telegram_link TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      is_full INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n      requires_approval INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n      platform_preference TEXT DEFAULT 'telegram',\n      discord_link TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      discord_channel_id TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      telegram_chat_id INTEGER,\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      FOREIGN KEY (author_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listing_members (\n      listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      joined_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      PRIMARY KEY (listing_id, user_id),\n      FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id),\n      FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS notifications (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      listing_id INTEGER,\n      type TEXT NOT NULL,\n      message TEXT NOT NULL,\n      is_read INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pending_telegram_groups (\n      listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      telegram_chat_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      PRIMARY KEY (listing_id)\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS telegram_chats (\n      chat_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,\n      chat_title TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS telegram_user_links (\n      user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      telegram_user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      PRIMARY KEY (user_id),\n      FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n  `);\n  return db;\n});\n\nconst mockTelegram = vi.hoisted(() => ({\n  createChatInviteLink: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(\"https://t.me/+invite123\"),\n  exportChatInviteLink: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(null),\n  sendMessage: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(true),\n  parseListingIdFromPayload: vi.fn().mockImplementation((payload: string) => {\n    const match = payload.match(/^listing_(\\d+)$/);\n    return match ? parseInt(match[1], 10) : null;\n  }),\n}));\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/db\", () => ({ default: testDb }));\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/telegram\", () => mockTelegram);\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/notifications\", () => ({\n  createNotification: vi.fn(),\n}));\n\nconst { POST } = await import(\"@/app/api/telegram/webhook/route\");\n\nfunction insertUser(email = \"test@example.com\", name = \"Test User\") {\n  testDb\n    .prepare(\"INSERT INTO users (email, password_hash, display_name) VALUES (?, ?, ?)\")\n    .run(email, \"hash\", name);\n  return testDb.prepare(\"SELECT last_insert_rowid() as id\").get().id as number;\n}\n\nfunction insertListing(\n  authorId: number,\n  overrides: Partial<{\n    is_full: number;\n    telegram_link: string;\n    book_title: string;\n  }> = {}\n) {\n  testDb\n    .prepare(\n      `INSERT INTO listings (author_id, book_title, book_author, reading_pace, start_date, meeting_format, max_group_size, is_full, telegram_link)\n       VALUES (?, ?, 'Test Author', '1ch/wk', '2026-04-01', 'text', 5, ?, ?)`\n    )\n    .run(authorId, overrides.book_title ?? \"Test Book\", overrides.is_full ?? 0, overrides.telegram_link ?? \"\");\n  return testDb.prepare(\"SELECT last_insert_rowid() as id\").get().id as number;\n}\n\nfunction addMember(listingId: number, userId: number) {\n  testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\").run(listingId, userId);\n}\n\ndescribe(\"POST /api/telegram/webhook\", () => {\n  beforeEach(() => {\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listing_members\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM notifications\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM pending_telegram_groups\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM telegram_chats\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM telegram_user_links\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listings\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM users\");\n    vi.stubEnv(\"TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET\", \"webhook-secret\");\n    mockTelegram.createChatInviteLink.mockResolvedValue(\"https://t.me/+invite123\");\n    mockTelegram.exportChatInviteLink.mockResolvedValue(null);\n    mockTelegram.sendMessage.mockResolvedValue(true);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 500 when webhook secret is not configured\", async () => {\n    vi.stubEnv(\"TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET\", \"\");\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: {},\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"anything\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(500);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 403 when secret header is wrong\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: {},\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"wrong-secret\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(403);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 200 for empty update (no action)\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { update_id: 1 },\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n    expect(data).toEqual({ ok: true });\n  });\n\n  it(\"handles /start command with listing payload\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1 });\n    addMember(listingId, userId);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: {\n        update_id: 2,\n        message: {\n          chat: { id: -100123, type: \"group\", title: \"Reading Group\" },\n          text: `/start listing_${listingId}`,\n          from: { id: 456 },\n        },\n      },\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n\n    // Verify telegram_link was set\n    const listing = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT telegram_link FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as { telegram_link: string };\n    expect(listing.telegram_link).toBe(\"https://t.me/+invite123\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"handles pending_telegram_groups mapping via my_chat_member\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1 });\n    addMember(listingId, userId);\n\n    // Insert pending mapping\n    testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO pending_telegram_groups (listing_id, telegram_chat_id) VALUES (?, ?)\").run(listingId, -100999);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: {\n        update_id: 3,\n        my_chat_member: {\n          chat: { id: -100999, type: \"group\", title: \"My Group\" },\n          from: { id: 789, first_name: \"Author\" },\n          new_chat_member: {\n            user: { id: 111, is_bot: true },\n            status: \"member\",\n          },\n        },\n      },\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n\n    // Verify listing was linked\n    const listing = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT telegram_link FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as { telegram_link: string };\n    expect(listing.telegram_link).toBe(\"https://t.me/+invite123\");\n\n    // Verify pending mapping was deleted\n    const pending = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT * FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE listing_id = ?\").get(listingId);\n    expect(pending).toBeUndefined();\n  });\n\n  it(\"ignores my_chat_member when bot is not added as member/admin\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: {\n        update_id: 4,\n        my_chat_member: {\n          chat: { id: -100123, type: \"group\" },\n          from: { id: 789, first_name: \"User\" },\n          new_chat_member: {\n            user: { id: 111, is_bot: true },\n            status: \"left\",\n          },\n        },\n      },\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n    // No crash, just silent ignore\n  });\n\n  it(\"handles /link command with linked user and single unlinked listing\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1 });\n    addMember(listingId, userId);\n\n    // Link telegram user\n    testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO telegram_user_links (user_id, telegram_user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\").run(userId, 456);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: {\n        update_id: 5,\n        message: {\n          chat: { id: -100555, type: \"group\" },\n          text: \"/link\",\n          from: { id: 456 },\n        },\n      },\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n\n    // Listing should be linked\n    const listing = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT telegram_link FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as { telegram_link: string };\n    expect(listing.telegram_link).toBe(\"https://t.me/+invite123\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"handles /link command from unlinked telegram user\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: {\n        update_id: 6,\n        message: {\n          chat: { id: -100555, type: \"group\" },\n          text: \"/link\",\n          from: { id: 999 },\n        },\n      },\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n    expect(mockTelegram.sendMessage).toHaveBeenCalledWith(\n      -100555,\n      expect.stringContaining(\"not linked\")\n    );\n  });\n\n  it(\"handles /link_ID command with verified ownership\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1 });\n    addMember(listingId, userId);\n    testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO telegram_user_links (user_id, telegram_user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\").run(userId, 456);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: {\n        update_id: 7,\n        message: {\n          chat: { id: -100666, type: \"group\" },\n          text: `/link_${listingId}`,\n          from: { id: 456 },\n        },\n      },\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n\n    const listing = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT telegram_link FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as { telegram_link: string };\n    expect(listing.telegram_link).toBe(\"https://t.me/+invite123\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"rejects /link_ID from non-author\", async () => {\n    const authorId = insertUser(\"author@test.com\", \"Author\");\n    const otherId = insertUser(\"other@test.com\", \"Other\");\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId, { is_full: 1 });\n    testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO telegram_user_links (user_id, telegram_user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\").run(otherId, 789);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: {\n        update_id: 8,\n        message: {\n          chat: { id: -100777, type: \"group\" },\n          text: `/link_${listingId}`,\n          from: { id: 789 },\n        },\n      },\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n    expect(mockTelegram.sendMessage).toHaveBeenCalledWith(\n      -100777,\n      expect.stringContaining(\"only link Telegram groups to your own\")\n    );\n  });\n\n  it(\"ignores non-group messages\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: {\n        update_id: 9,\n        message: {\n          chat: { id: 123, type: \"private\" },\n          text: \"/link\",\n          from: { id: 456 },\n        },\n      },\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n    // No action taken for private chats\n  });\n\n  it(\"uses fallback exportChatInviteLink when createChatInviteLink fails\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1 });\n    addMember(listingId, userId);\n\n    mockTelegram.createChatInviteLink.mockResolvedValue(null);\n    mockTelegram.exportChatInviteLink.mockResolvedValue(\"https://t.me/+fallback\");\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: {\n        update_id: 10,\n        message: {\n          chat: { id: -100888, type: \"supergroup\" },\n          text: `/start listing_${listingId}`,\n          from: { id: 456 },\n        },\n      },\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    expect(res.status).toBe(200);\n\n    const listing = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT telegram_link FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as { telegram_link: string };\n    expect(listing.telegram_link).toBe(\"https://t.me/+fallback\");\n  });\n});\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":84,"oldLines":6,"newStart":84,"newLines":9,"lines":["     const match = payload.match(/^listing_(\\d+)$/);","     return match ? parseInt(match[1], 10) : expect(listing.telegram_link).toBe(\"https://t.me/+invite123\");\n  });","new_string":"  it(\"handles /start command with listing payload when sender is linked author\", async () => {\n    const testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO telegram_user_links (user_id, telegram_user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\").run(userId, 456);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: {\n        update_id: 2,\n        message: {\n          chat: { id: -100123, type: \"group\", title: \"Reading Group\" },\n          text: `/start listing_${listingId}`,\n          from: { id: 456 },\n        },\n      },\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n\n    // Verify telegram_link was set\n    const listing = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT telegram_link FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as { telegram_link: string };\n    expect(listing.telegram_link).toBe(\"https://t.me/+invite123\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"rejects /start command when sender is not the listing author\", async () => {\n    const authorId = insertUser(\"author@test.com\", \"Author\");\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId, { is_full: 1 });\n    addMember(listingId, authorId);\n    // Link a different user\n    const otherId = insertUser(\"other@test.com\", \"Other\");\n    testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO telegram_user_links (user_id, telegram_user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\").run(otherId, 789);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: {\n        update_id: 2,\n        message: {\n          chat: { id: -100123, type: \"group\", title: \"Reading Group\" },\n          text: `/start listing_${listingId}`,\n          from: { id: 789 },\n        },\n      },\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n\n    // Listing should NOT be linked\n    const listing = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT telegram_link FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as { telegram_link: string };\n    expect(listing.telegram_link).toBe(\"\");\n\n    // Should have sent a  body: {\n        update_id: 2,\n        message: {\n          chat: { id: -100123, type: \"group\", title: \"Reading Group\" },\n          text: `/start listing_${listingId}`,\n          from: { id: otherId = insertUser(\"other@test.com\", \"Other\");\n    testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO telegram_user_links (user_id, telegram_user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\").run(otherId, 789);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: {\n        update_id: 2,\n        message: {\n          chat: { id: -100123, type: \"group\", title: \"Reading Group\" },\n          text: `/start listing_${listingId}`,\n          from: { id: 789 },\n        },\n      },\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n\n    // Listing should NOT be linked\n    const listing = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT telegram_link FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as { telegram_link: string };\n    expect(listing.telegram_link).toBe(\"\");\n\n    // Should have sent a message about using /link\n    expect(mockTelegram.sendMessage).toHaveBeenCalledWith(\n      -100123,\n      expect.stringContaining(\"/link\")\n    );\n  });","originalFile":"import { describe, it, expect, vi, beforeEach } from \"vitest\";\nimport { createTestRequest, parseResponse } from \"../../helpers/mock-request\";\n\nconst testDb = vi.hoisted(() => {\n  const Db = require(\"better-sqlite3\");\n  const db = new Db(\":memory:\");\n  db.pragma(\"journal_mode = WAL\");\n  db.pragma(\"foreign_keys = ON\");\n  db.exec(`\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      email TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,\n      password_hash TEXT NOT NULL,\n      display_name TEXT NOT NULL,\n      bio TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listings (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      author_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      book_title TEXT NOT NULL,\n      book_author TEXT NOT NULL,\n      book_cover_url TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      book_olid TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      language TEXT DEFAULT 'English',\n      reading_pace TEXT NOT NULL,\n      start_date TEXT NOT NULL,\n      meeting_format TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(meeting_format IN ('voice', 'text', 'mixed')),\n      max_group_size INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK(max_group_size >= 2 AND max_group_size <= 20),\n      telegram_link TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      is_full INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n      requires_approval INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n      platform_preference TEXT DEFAULT 'telegram',\n      discord_link TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      discord_channel_id TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      telegram_chat_id INTEGER,\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      FOREIGN KEY (author_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listing_members (\n      listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      joined_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      PRIMARY KEY (listing_id, user_id),\n      FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id),\n      FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS notifications (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      listing_id INTEGER,\n      type TEXT NOT NULL,\n      message TEXT NOT NULL,\n      is_read INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pending_telegram_groups (\n      listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      telegram_chat_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      PRIMARY KEY (listing_id)\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS telegram_chats (\n      chat_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,\n      chat_title TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS telegram_user_links (\n      user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      telegram_user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      PRIMARY KEY (user_id),\n      FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n  `);\n  return db;\n});\n\nconst mockTelegram = vi.hoisted(() => ({\n  createChatInviteLink: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(\"https://t.me/+invite123\"),\n  exportChatInviteLink: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(null),\n  sendMessage: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(true),\n  parseListingIdFromPayload: vi.fn().mockImplementation((payload: string) => {\n    const match = payload.match(/^listing_(\\d+)$/);\n    return match ? parseInt(match[1], 10) : null;\n  }),\n  escapeHtml: vi.fn().mockImplementation((text: string) =>\n    text.replace(/&/g, \"&amp;\").replace(/</g, \"&lt;\").replace(/>/g, \"&gt;\").replace(/\"/g, \"&quot;\")\n  ),\n}));\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/db\", () => ({ default: testDb }));\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/telegram\", () => mockTelegram);\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/notifications\", () => ({\n  createNotification: vi.fn(),\n}));\n\nconst { POST } = await import(\"@/app/api/telegram/webhook/route\");\n\nfunction insertUser(email = \"test@example.com\", name = \"Test User\") {\n  testDb\n    .prepare(\"INSERT INTO users (email, password_hash, display_name) VALUES (?, ?, ?)\")\n    .run(email, \"hash\", name);\n  return testDb.prepare(\"SELECT last_insert_rowid() as id\").get().id as number;\n}\n\nfunction insertListing(\n  authorId: number,\n  overrides: Partial<{\n    is_full: number;\n    telegram_link: string;\n    book_title: string;\n  }> = {}\n) {\n  testDb\n    .prepare(\n      `INSERT INTO listings (author_id, book_title, book_author, reading_pace, start_date, meeting_format, max_group_size, is_full, telegram_link)\n       VALUES (?, ?, 'Test Author', '1ch/wk', '2026-04-01', 'text', 5, ?, ?)`\n    )\n    .run(authorId, overrides.book_title ?? \"Test Book\", overrides.is_full ?? 0, overrides.telegram_link ?? \"\");\n  return testDb.prepare(\"SELECT last_insert_rowid() as id\").get().id as number;\n}\n\nfunction addMember(listingId: number, userId: number) {\n  testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\").run(listingId, userId);\n}\n\ndescribe(\"POST /api/telegram/webhook\", () => {\n  beforeEach(() => {\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listing_members\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM notifications\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM pending_telegram_groups\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM telegram_chats\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM telegram_user_links\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listings\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM users\");\n    vi.stubEnv(\"TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET\", \"webhook-secret\");\n    mockTelegram.createChatInviteLink.mockResolvedValue(\"https://t.me/+invite123\");\n    mockTelegram.exportChatInviteLink.mockResolvedValue(null);\n    mockTelegram.sendMessage.mockResolvedValue(true);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 500 when webhook secret is not configured\", async () => {\n    vi.stubEnv(\"TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET\", \"\");\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: {},\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"anything\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(500);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 403 when secret header is wrong\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: {},\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"wrong-secret\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(403);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 200 for empty update (no action)\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { update_id: 1 },\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n    expect(data).toEqual({ ok: true });\n  });\n\n  it(\"handles /start command with listing payload\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1 });\n    addMember(listingId, userId);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: {\n        update_id: 2,\n        message: {\n          chat: { id: -100123, type: \"group\", title: \"Reading Group\" },\n          text: `/start listing_${listingId}`,\n          from: { id: 456 },\n        },\n      },\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n\n    // Verify telegram_link was set\n    const listing = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT telegram_link FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as { telegram_link: string };\n    expect(listing.telegram_link).toBe(\"https://t.me/+invite123\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"handles pending_telegram_groups mapping via my_chat_member\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1 });\n    addMember(listingId, userId);\n\n    // Insert pending mapping\n    testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO pending_telegram_groups (listing_id, telegram_chat_id) VALUES (?, ?)\").run(listingId, -100999);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: {\n        update_id: 3,\n        my_chat_member: {\n          chat: { id: -100999, type: \"group\", title: \"My Group\" },\n          from: { id: 789, first_name: \"Author\" },\n          new_chat_member: {\n            user: { id: 111, is_bot: true },\n            status: \"member\",\n          },\n        },\n      },\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n\n    // Verify listing was linked\n    const listing = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT telegram_link FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as { telegram_link: string };\n    expect(listing.telegram_link).toBe(\"https://t.me/+invite123\");\n\n    // Verify pending mapping was deleted\n    const pending = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT * FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE listing_id = ?\").get(listingId);\n    expect(pending).toBeUndefined();\n  });\n\n  it(\"ignores my_chat_member when bot is not added as member/admin\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: {\n        update_id: 4,\n        my_chat_member: {\n          chat: { id: -100123, type: \"group\" },\n          from: { id: 789, first_name: \"User\" },\n          new_chat_member: {\n            user: { id: 111, is_bot: true },\n            status: \"left\",\n          },\n        },\n      },\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n    // No crash, just silent ignore\n  });\n\n  it(\"handles /link command with linked user and single unlinked listing\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1 });\n    addMember(listingId, userId);\n\n    // Link telegram user\n    testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO telegram_user_links (user_id, telegram_user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\").run(userId, 456);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: {\n        update_id: 5,\n        message: {\n          chat: { id: -100555, type: \"group\" },\n          text: \"/link\",\n          from: { id: 456 },\n        },\n      },\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n\n    // Listing should be linked\n    const listing = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT telegram_link FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as { telegram_link: string };\n    expect(listing.telegram_link).toBe(\"https://t.me/+invite123\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"handles /link command from unlinked telegram user\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: {\n        update_id: 6,\n        message: {\n          chat: { id: -100555, type: \"group\" },\n          text: \"/link\",\n          from: { id: 999 },\n        },\n      },\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n    expect(mockTelegram.sendMessage).toHaveBeenCalledWith(\n      -100555,\n      expect.stringContaining(\"not linked\")\n    );\n  });\n\n  it(\"handles /link_ID command with verified ownership\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1 });\n    addMember(listingId, userId);\n    testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO telegram_user_links (user_id, telegram_user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\").run(userId, 456);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: {\n        update_id: 7,\n        message: {\n          chat: { id: -100666, type: \"group\" },\n          text: `/link_${listingId}`,\n          from: { id: 456 },\n        },\n      },\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n\n    const listing = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT telegram_link FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as { telegram_link: string };\n    expect(listing.telegram_link).toBe(\"https://t.me/+invite123\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"rejects /link_ID from non-author\", async () => {\n    const authorId = insertUser(\"author@test.com\", \"Author\");\n    const otherId = insertUser(\"other@test.com\", \"Other\");\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId, { is_full: 1 });\n    testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO telegram_user_links (user_id, telegram_user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\").run(otherId, 789);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: {\n        update_id: 8,\n        message: {\n          chat: { id: -100777, type: \"group\" },\n          text: `/link_${listingId}`,\n          from: { id: 789 },\n        },\n      },\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n    expect(mockTelegram.sendMessage).toHaveBeenCalledWith(\n      -100777,\n      expect.stringContaining(\"only link Telegram groups to your own\")\n    );\n  });\n\n  it(\"ignores non-group messages\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: {\n        update_id: 9,\n        message: {\n          chat: { id: 123, type: \"private\" },\n          text: \"/link\",\n          from: { id: 456 },\n        },\n      },\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n    // No action taken for private chats\n  });\n\n  it(\"uses fallback exportChatInviteLink when createChatInviteLink fails\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1 });\n    addMember(listingId, userId);\n\n    mockTelegram.createChatInviteLink.mockResolvedValue(null);\n    mockTelegram.exportChatInviteLink.mockResolvedValue(\"https://t.me/+fallback\");\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n     },\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    expect(res.status).toBe(200);\n\n    const listing =  it(\"uses fallback exportChatInviteLink when createChatInviteLink fails\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1 });\n    addMember(listingId, userId);\n\n    mockTelegram.createChatInviteLink.mockResolvedValue(null);\n    mockTelegram.exportChatInviteLink.mockResolvedValue(\"https://t.me/+fallback\");\n\n    const req = \"supergroup\" },\n          text: `/start listing_${listingId}`,\n          from: { id: 456 },\n        },\n      },\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"webhook-secret\" },\n
