testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO telegram_user_links (user_id, telegram_user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\").run(userId, 456);\n\n    mockTelegram.createChatInviteLink.mockResolvedValue(null);\n    mockTelegram.exportChatInviteLink.mockResolvedValue(\"https://t.me/+fallback\");\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: {\n        update_id: 10,\n        message: {\n          chat: { id: -100888, type: \"supergroup\" },\n          text: `/start listing_${listingId}`,\n          from: { id: 456 },\n        },\n      },\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    expect(res.status).toBe(200);\n\n    const listing = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT telegram_link FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as { telegram_link: string };\n    expect(listing.telegram_link).toBe(\"https://t.me/+fallback\");\n  });","originalFile":"import { describe, it, expect, vi, beforeEach } from \"vitest\";\nimport { createTestRequest, parseResponse } from \"../../helpers/mock-request\";\n\nconst testDb = vi.hoisted(() => {\n  const Db = require(\"better-sqlite3\");\n  const db = new Db(\":memory:\");\n  db.pragma(\"journal_mode = WAL\");\n  db.pragma(\"foreign_keys = ON\");\n  db.exec(`\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      email TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,\n      password_hash TEXT NOT NULL,\n      display_name TEXT NOT NULL,\n      bio TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listings (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      author_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      book_title TEXT NOT NULL,\n      book_author TEXT NOT NULL,\n      book_cover_url TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      book_olid TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      language TEXT DEFAULT 'English',\n      reading_pace TEXT NOT NULL,\n      start_date TEXT NOT NULL,\n      meeting_format TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(meeting_format IN ('voice', 'text', 'mixed')),\n      max_group_size INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK(max_group_size >= 2 AND max_group_size <= 20),\n      telegram_link TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      is_full INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n      requires_approval INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n      platform_preference TEXT DEFAULT 'telegram',\n      discord_link TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      discord_channel_id TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      telegram_chat_id INTEGER,\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      FOREIGN KEY (author_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listing_members (\n      listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      joined_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      PRIMARY KEY (listing_id, user_id),\n      FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id),\n      FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS notifications (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      listing_id INTEGER,\n      type TEXT NOT NULL,\n      message TEXT NOT NULL,\n      is_read INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pending_telegram_groups (\n      listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      telegram_chat_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      PRIMARY KEY (listing_id)\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS telegram_chats (\n      chat_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,\n      chat_title TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS telegram_user_links (\n      user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      telegram_user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      PRIMARY KEY (user_id),\n      FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n  `);\n  return db;\n});\n\nconst mockTelegram = vi.hoisted(() => ({\n  createChatInviteLink: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(\"https://t.me/+invite123\"),\n  exportChatInviteLink: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(null),\n  sendMessage: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(true),\n  parseListingIdFromPayload: vi.fn().mockImplementation((payload: string) => {\n    const match = payload.match(/^listing_(\\d+)$/);\n    return match ? parseInt(match[1], 10) : null;\n  }),\n  escapeHtml: vi.fn().mockImplementation((text: string) =>\n    text.replace(/&/g, \"&amp;\").replace(/</g, \"&lt;\").replace(/>/g, \"&gt;\").replace(/\"/g, \"&quot;\")\n  ),\n}));\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/db\", () => ({ default: testDb }));\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/telegram\", () => mockTelegram);\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/notifications\", () => ({\n  createNotification: vi.fn(),\n}));\n\nconst { POST } = await import(\"@/app/api/telegram/webhook/route\");\n\nfunction insertUser(email = \"test@example.com\", name = \"Test User\") {\n  testDb\n    .prepare(\"INSERT INTO users (email, password_hash, display_name) VALUES (?, ?, ?)\")\n    .run(email, \"hash\", name);\n  return testDb.prepare(\"SELECT last_insert_rowid() as id\").get().id as number;\n}\n\nfunction insertListing(\n  authorId: number,\n  overrides: Partial<{\n    is_full: number;\n    telegram_link: string;\n    book_title: string;\n  }> = {}\n) {\n  testDb\n    .prepare(\n      `INSERT INTO listings (author_id, book_title, book_author, reading_pace, start_date, meeting_format, max_group_size, is_full, telegram_link)\n       VALUES (?, ?, 'Test Author', '1ch/wk', '2026-04-01', 'text', 5, ?, ?)`\n    )\n    .run(authorId, overrides.book_title ?? \"Test Book\", overrides.is_full ?? 0, overrides.telegram_link ?? \"\");\n  return testDb.prepare(\"SELECT last_insert_rowid() as id\").get().id as number;\n}\n\nfunction addMember(listingId: number, userId: number) {\n  testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\").run(listingId, userId);\n}\n\ndescribe(\"POST /api/telegram/webhook\", () => {\n  beforeEach(() => {\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listing_members\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM notifications\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM pending_telegram_groups\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM telegram_chats\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM telegram_user_links\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listings\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM users\");\n    vi.stubEnv(\"TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET\", \"webhook-secret\");\n    mockTelegram.createChatInviteLink.mockResolvedValue(\"https://t.me/+invite123\");\n    mockTelegram.exportChatInviteLink.mockResolvedValue(null);\n    mockTelegram.sendMessage.mockResolvedValue(true);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 500 when webhook secret is not configured\", async () => {\n    vi.stubEnv(\"TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET\", \"\");\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: {},\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"anything\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(500);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 403 when secret header is wrong\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: {},\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"wrong-secret\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(403);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 200 for empty update (no action)\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { update_id: 1 },\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n    expect(data).toEqual({ ok: true });\n  });\n\n  it(\"handles /start command with listing payload when sender is linked author\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1 });\n    addMember(listingId, userId);\n    // Link the telegram user to the listing author\n    testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO telegram_user_links (user_id, telegram_user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\").run(userId, 456);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: {\n        update_id: 2,\n        message: {\n          chat: { id: -100123, type: \"group\", title: \"Reading Group\" },\n          text: `/start listing_${listingId}`,\n          from: { id: 456 },\n        },\n      },\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n\n    // Verify telegram_link was set\n    const listing = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT telegram_link FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as { telegram_link: string };\n    expect(listing.telegram_link).toBe(\"https://t.me/+invite123\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"rejects /start command when sender is not the listing author\", async () => {\n    const authorId = insertUser(\"author@test.com\", \"Author\");\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId, { is_full: 1 });\n    addMember(listingId, authorId);\n    // Link a different user\n    const otherId = insertUser(\"other@test.com\", \"Other\");\n    testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO telegram_user_links (user_id, telegram_user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\").run(otherId, 789);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: {\n        update_id: 2,\n        message: {\n          chat: { id: -100123, type: \"group\", title: \"Reading Group\" },\n          text: `/start listing_${listingId}`,\n          from: { id: 789 },\n        },\n      },\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n\n    // Listing should NOT be linked\n    const listing = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT telegram_link FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as { telegram_link: string };\n    expect(listing.telegram_link).toBe(\"\");\n\n    // Should have sent a message about using /link\n    expect(mockTelegram.sendMessage).toHaveBeenCalledWith(\n      -100123,\n      expect.stringContaining(\"/link\")\n    );\n  });\n\n  it(\"handles pending_telegram_groups mapping via my_chat_member\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1 });\n    addMember(listingId, userId);\n\n    // Insert pending mapping\n    testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO pending_telegram_groups (listing_id, telegram_chat_id) VALUES (?, ?)\").run(listingId, -100999);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: {\n        update_id: 3,\n        my_chat_member: {\n          chat: { id: -100999, type: \"group\", title: \"My Group\" },\n          from: { id: 789, first_name: \"Author\" },\n          new_chat_member: {\n            user: { id: 111, is_bot: true },\n            status: \"member\",\n          },\n        },\n      },\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n\n    // Verify listing was linked\n    const listing = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT telegram_link FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as { telegram_link: string };\n    expect(listing.telegram_link).toBe(\"https://t.me/+invite123\");\n\n    // Verify pending mapping was deleted\n    const pending = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT * FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE listing_id = ?\").get(listingId);\n    expect(pending).toBeUndefined();\n  });\n\n  it(\"ignores my_chat_member when bot is not added as member/admin\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: {\n        update_id: 4,\n        my_chat_member: {\n          chat: { id: -100123, type: \"group\" },\n          from: { id: 789, first_name: \"User\" },\n          new_chat_member: {\n            user: { id: 111, is_bot: true },\n            status: \"left\",\n          },\n        },\n      },\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n    // No crash, just silent ignore\n  });\n\n  it(\"handles /link command with linked user and single unlinked listing\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1 });\n    addMember(listingId, userId);\n\n    // Link telegram user\n    testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO telegram_user_links (user_id, telegram_user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\").run(userId, 456);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: {\n        update_id: 5,\n        message: {\n          chat: { id: -100555, type: \"group\" },\n          text: \"/link\",\n          from: { id: 456 },\n        },\n      },\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n\n    // Listing should be linked\n    const listing = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT telegram_link FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as { telegram_link: string };\n    expect(listing.telegram_link).toBe(\"https://t.me/+invite123\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"handles /link command from unlinked telegram user\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: {\n        update_id: 6,\n        message: {\n          chat: { id: -100555, type: \"group\" },\n          text: \"/link\",\n          from: { id: 999 },\n        },\n      },\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n    expect(mockTelegram.sendMessage).toHaveBeenCalledWith(\n      -100555,\n      expect.stringContaining(\"not linked\")\n    );\n  });\n\n  it(\"handles /link_ID command with verified ownership\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1 });\n    addMember(listingId, userId);\n    testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO telegram_user_links (user_id, telegram_user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\").run(userId, 456);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: {\n        update_id: 7,\n        message: {\n          chat: { id: -100666, type: \"group\" },\n          text: `/link_${listingId}`,\n          from: { id: 456 },\n        },\n      },\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n\n    const listing = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT telegram_link FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as { telegram_link: string };\n    expect(listing.telegram_link).toBe(\"https://t.me/+invite123\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"rejects /link_ID from non-author\", async () => {\n    const authorId = insertUser(\"author@test.com\", \"Author\");\n    const otherId = insertUser(\"other@test.com\", \"Other\");\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId, { is_full: 1 });\n    testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO telegram_user_links (user_id, telegram_user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\").run(otherId, 789);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: {\n        update_id: 8,\n        message: {\n          chat: { id: -100777, type: \"group\" },\n          text: `/link_${listingId}`,\n          from: { id: 789 },\n        },\n      },\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n    expect(mockTelegram.sendMessage).toHaveBeenCalledWith(\n      -100777,\n      expect.stringContaining(\"only link Telegram groups to your own\")\n    );\n  });\n\n  it(\"ignores non-group messages\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: {\n        update_id: 9,\n        message: {\n          chat: { id: 123, type: \"private\" },\n          text: \"/link\",\n          from: { id: 456 },\n        },\n      },\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(res);\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n    // No action taken for private chats\n  });\n\n  it(\"uses fallback exportChatInviteLink when createChatInviteLink fails\", async () => {\n    const userId = insertUser();\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1 });\n    addMember(listingId, userId);\n\n    mockTelegram.createChatInviteLink.mockResolvedValue(null);\n    mockTelegram.exportChatInviteLink.mockResolvedValue(\"https://t.me/+fallback\");\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"http://localhost:3000/api/telegram/webhook\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: {\n        update_id: 10,\n        message: {\n          chat: { id: -100888, type: \"supergroup\" },\n          text: `/start listing_${listingId}`,\n          from: { id: 456 },\n        },\n      },\n      headers: { \"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\": \"webhook-secret\" },\n    });\n\n    const res = await POST(req);\n    expect(res.status).toBe(200);\n\n    const listing = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT telegram_link FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as { telegram_link: string };\n    expect(listing.telegram_link).toBe(\"https://t.me/+fallback\");\n  });\n});\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":434,"oldLines":6,"newStart":434,"newLines":8,"lines":["     const userId = insertUser();","     const listingId = insertListing(userId, { is_full: 1 });"," {"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01ENfJWRRCV5aVGaqovpZch1","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Now I also need to check whether the `sendMessage` calls in the tests involving `linkTelegramToListing` use the escaped HTML. The mock `escapeHtml` returns escaped text, so the `sendMessage` mock should receive the escaped version. Let me check the tests for `/link` and `/link_ID` — those also call `linkTelegramToListing` which calls `sendMessage` with `escapeHtml(bookTitle)`. But since the mock tracks calls, the assertions check for the link being set (which doesn't depend on escapeHtml). Should be fine.\n\nLet me run the tests now:"}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":908,"cache_read_input_tokens":66791,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":908},"output_tokens":2,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"71b3594c-3c92-4960-b469-8f6636094264","uuid":"a8f79df2-1575-45c6-a54b-6c9fdbb7a5e8"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01RGAcyxnaeuMdanKrZ7zKW5","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_013ypKXKEpyqf8931c7tSvFU","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"git commit -m \"$(cat <<'EOF'\nfix: HTML injection, /start auth bypass, Discord ID validation, missing discord_link (#88)\n\n- Escape HTML entities in Telegram messages to prevent injection via book titles\n- Add author ownership check on /start listing_ID command (was unauthenticated)\n- Validate Discord guildId/channelId as snowflake IDs to prevent path traversal\n- Add discord_link to profile reading API response\n\nCo-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>\nEOF\n)\"","description":"Commit fixes"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":196,"cache_read_input_tokens":68303,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":196},"output_tokens":51,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"71b3594c-3c92-4960-b469-8f6636094264","uuid":"bb091e88-7bda-4f47-afca-9ad774f817ed"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01VpxMBwfWa5wnkKue73krmL","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_015pQnEK2eqDdDxTnWjw8W41","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"export GH_TOKEN=$(grep GH_TOKEN /root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/.env | cut -d= -f2) && gh pr create --title \"fix: code review round 7 — HTML injection, auth bypass, validation\" --body \"$(cat <<'EOF'\n## Summary\n- **HTML injection in Telegram messages** — Book titles were interpolated directly into HTML-mode Telegram messages. Added `escapeHtml()` to sanitize `<`, `>`, `&`, `\"` characters before sending.\n- **Telegram /start auth bypass** — `/start listing_ID` command linked any group to any listing without checking ownership. Now verifies the sender is the listing author via `telegram_user_links`.\n- **Discord ID path traversal** — `guildId` and `channelId` were used unvalidated in Discord API URL paths. Added snowflake format validation (17-20 digit numeric strings).\n- **Missing discord_link in profile** — Profile reading API returned `telegram_link` but not `discord_link`. Added to query and interface.\n\nCloses #88\n\n## Test plan\n- [x] All 198 tests pass (1 new test for /start rejection)\n- [x] ESLint clean\n- [x] Build passes\n- [ ] CI green\n\n🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)\nEOF\n)\"","description":"Create pull request","timeout":30000},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":393,"cache_read_input_tokens":68772,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":393},"output_tokens":64,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"71b3594c-3c92-4960-b469-8f6636094264","uuid":"32d59181-a905-4150-9660-214308cdc324"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01SCsHkUxciqLd4FFHcSi34b","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01KUnJD23eus4RjRXkyJDQav","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/logs/session-2026-03-24-0000.md","content":"# Session Log — 2026-03-24 00:00 UTC\n\n## Summary\nCode review round 7: found and fixed 4 security/correctness bugs. Created issue #88, implemented fixes in PR #89, CI passed, merged to main, deployed to production.\n\n## Review Findings\n- **Production**: Healthy — HTTP 200, PM2 online, 198 tests pass\n- **CI**: Green on main\n- **Open PRs**: None\n- **Open issues**: #54 (needs-human, PAT expiry ~3 days), #21 (needs-human, Telegram token)\n- **Emails**: GitHub notifications for #74 (already resolved), NomadLingo (different project), Google Workspace promo\n- **PRD sync**: All PRD features have corresponding closed issues\n\n## Work Completed\n\n### Issue #88: Code review round 7 (PR #89 — merged + deployed)\n\n4 bugs fixed:\n\n1. **HTML injection in Telegram messages** (CRITICAL) — Book titles were interpolated directly into HTML-mode Telegram messages (`<b>${bookTitle}</b>`). Added `escapeHtml()` helper to sanitize `<`, `>`, `&`, `\"` characters. Applied to all user content in Telegram webhook route.\n\n2. **Telegram /start auth bypass** (IMPORTANT) — `/start listing_ID` command linked any group to any listing without checking ownership. Now verifies the sender is the listing author via `telegram_user_links` table. Non-authors get a message to use `/link` instead.\n\n3. **Discord guildId/channelId path traversal** (IMPORTANT) — `guildId` and `channelId` from webhook payload were used unvalidated in Discord API URL paths (`/guilds/${guildId}/channels`). Added `isValidSnowflake()` validation (17-20 digit numeric strings).\n\n4. **Missing discord_link in profile reading** (IMPORTANT) — Profile reading API returned `telegram_link` but not `discord_link`. Added to SQL query and TypeScript interface.\n\nAll 198 tests pass (1 new), ESLint clean, build clean, CI green.\n\n## Issues Monitored\n- **#54 (PAT expiry)**: ~3 days remaining — critical, needs-human\n- **#21 (Telegram token)**: Still needs-human\n\n## Next Session Priority\n1. Check production health\n2. Monitor PAT expiry (#54) — critical\n3. Consider E2E testing, performance improvements, or new feature proposals\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":273,"cache_read_input_tokens":73614,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":273},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"71b3594c-3c92-4960-b469-8f6636094264","uuid":"bcb2b0a1-5316-409b-99bb-a790ec2a06a0"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01KUnJD23eus4RjRXkyJDQav","type":"tool_result","content":"File created successfully at: /root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/logs/session-2026-03-24-0000.md"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"71b3594c-3c92-4960-b469-8f6636094264","uuid":"69fb667d-1388-478b-8087-89303599e5fe","timestamp":"2026-03-24T00:27:53.921Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"create","filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/logs/session-2026-03-24-0000.md","content":"# Session Log — 2026-03-24 00:00 UTC\n\n## Summary\nCode review round 7: found and fixed 4 security/correctness bugs. Created issue #88, implemented fixes in PR #89, CI passed, merged to main, deployed to production.\n\n## Review Findings\n- **Production**: Healthy — HTTP 200, PM2 online, 198 tests pass\n- **CI**: Green on main\n- **Open PRs**: None\n- **Open issues**: #54 (needs-human, PAT expiry ~3 days), #21 (needs-human, Telegram token)\n- **Emails**: GitHub notifications for #74 (already resolved), NomadLingo (different project), Google Workspace promo\n- **PRD sync**: All PRD features have corresponding closed issues\n\n## Work Completed\n\n### Issue #88: Code review round 7 (PR #89 — merged + deployed)\n\n4 bugs fixed:\n\n1. **HTML injection in Telegram messages** (CRITICAL) — Book titles were interpolated directly into HTML-mode Telegram messages (`<b>${bookTitle}</b>`). Added `escapeHtml()` helper to sanitize `<`, `>`, `&`, `\"` characters. Applied to all user content in Telegram webhook route.\n\n2. **Telegram /start auth bypass** (IMPORTANT) — `/start listing_ID` command linked any group to any listing without checking ownership. Now verifies the sender is the listing author via `telegram_user_links` table. Non-authors get a message to use `/link` instead.\n\n3. **Discord guildId/channelId path traversal** (IMPORTANT) — `guildId` and `channelId` from webhook payload were used unvalidated in Discord API URL paths (`/guilds/${guildId}/channels`). Added `isValidSnowflake()` validation (17-20 digit numeric strings).\n\n4. **Missing discord_link in profile reading** (IMPORTANT) — Profile reading API returned `telegram_link` but not `discord_link`. Added to SQL query and TypeScript interface.\n\nAll 198 tests pass (1 new), ESLint clean, build clean, CI green.\n\n## Issues Monitored\n- **#54 (PAT expiry)**: ~3 days remaining — critical, needs-human\n- **#21 (Telegram token)**: Still needs-human\n\n## Next Session Priority\n1. Check production health\n2. Monitor PAT expiry (#54) — critical\n3. Consider E2E testing, performance improvements, or new feature proposals\n","structuredPatch":[],"originalFile":null}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_012DQrRkBVByHk8JbSu6oedq","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Session complete. Here's a summary of what was accomplished:\n\n## Session Summary — 2026-03-24 00:00 UTC\n\n**Production**: Healthy ✅ (HTTP 200, PM2 online, 198 tests passing)\n\n**Work Completed**: Code review round 7 — found and fixed 4 bugs:\n\n1. **HTML injection in Telegram messages** (CRITICAL) — Book titles with HTML characters (`<`, `>`, `&`) were sent unescaped in Telegram's HTML parse mode. Added `escapeHtml()` sanitization.\n\n2. **Telegram `/start` auth bypass** (IMPORTANT) — Anyone could link a Telegram group to any listing via `/start listing_ID`. Now requires the sender to be the verified listing author.\n\n3. **Discord ID path traversal** (IMPORTANT) — `guildId`/`channelId` weren't validated before being used in API URL paths. Added snowflake format validation.\n\n4. **Missing `discord_link` in profile** (IMPORTANT) — Profile reading API omitted Discord links. Added to SQL query and interface.\n\n**PR #89**: Merged + deployed to production. CI green. 198 tests pass.\n\n**Monitoring**: PAT expiry issue #54 (~3 days remaining, needs-human)."}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":297,"cache_read_input_tokens":74629,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":297},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"71b3594c-3c92-4960-b469-8f6636094264","uuid":"6a92f4d3-2c39-4309-9664-5f9a4d2c44ab"}
